lemmas.name: mkarrayK
lemmas.statement: : cancel ofarray<:'a> mkarray

lemmas.name: ofarrayK
lemmas.statement: : cancel mkarray<:'a> ofarray

lemmas.name: arrayW
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a array -> bool):
     (forall s, P (mkarray s))
  => forall n, P n

lemmas.name: mkarray_inj
lemmas.statement: : injective mkarray<:'a>

lemmas.name: ofarray_inj
lemmas.statement: : injective ofarray<:'a>

lemmas.name: sizeE
lemmas.statement: (arr: 'a array): size arr = size (ofarray arr)

lemmas.name: getE
lemmas.statement: (arr: 'a array) i: arr.[i] = nth witness (ofarray arr) i

lemmas.name: setE
lemmas.statement:
(arr : 'a array) (i : int) (x : 'a): arr.[i<-x] =
  mkarray (mkseq (fun k => if i = k then x else arr.[k]) (size arr))

lemmas.name: size_ge0
lemmas.statement: (arr : 'a array): 0 <= size arr

lemmas.name: size_mkarray
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): size (mkarray s) = size s

lemmas.name: get_neg
lemmas.statement:
(arr : 'a array) (i : int):
  i < 0 => arr.[i] = witness

lemmas.name: get_default
lemmas.statement:
(arr : 'a array) (i : int):
  size arr <= i => arr.[i] = witness

lemmas.name: arrayP
lemmas.statement:
(arr1 arr2 : 'a array):
  arr1 = arr2 <=>
  (size arr1 = size arr2
   /\ (forall i, 0 <= i < size arr1 => arr1.[i] = arr2.[i]))

lemmas.name: eq_from_get
lemmas.statement:
(arr1 arr2 : 'a array):
  size arr1 = size arr2 =>
  (forall i, 0 <= i < size arr1 => arr1.[i] = arr2.[i]) =>
  arr1 = arr2

lemmas.name: get_set_if
lemmas.statement:
(arr : 'a array) (x : 'a) (i j : int):
  arr.[i <- x].[j] = if 0 <= i < size arr /\ j = i then x else arr.[j]

lemmas.name: get_set
lemmas.statement:
(arr : 'a array) (x : 'a) (i j : int): 0 <= i < size arr =>
  arr.[i <- x].[j] = if j = i then x else arr.[j]

lemmas.name: size_set
lemmas.statement:
(arr : 'a array) (x : 'a) (i : int):
  size arr.[i <- x] = size arr

lemmas.name: set_out
lemmas.statement:
(i : int) (x : 'a) (arr : 'a array):
  ! (0 <= i < size arr) => arr.[i <- x] = arr

lemmas.name: set_neg
lemmas.statement:
(i : int) (a : 'a) (arr : 'a array):
  i < 0 => arr.[i<- a] = arr

lemmas.name: set_above
lemmas.statement:
(i : int) (a : 'a) (arr : 'a array):
  size arr <= i => arr.[i <- a] = arr

lemmas.name: set_set_if
lemmas.statement:
(arr : 'a array) (k k' : int) (x x' : 'a):
       arr.[k <- x].[k' <- x']
    =  if   k = k'
       then arr.[k' <- x']
       else arr.[k' <- x'].[k <- x]

lemmas.name: set_set_eq
lemmas.statement:
(arr : 'a array) (k : int) (x x' : 'a):
  arr.[k <- x].[k <- x'] = arr.[k <- x']

lemmas.name: set_set_swap
lemmas.statement:
(arr : 'a array) (k k' : int) (x x' : 'a):
  k <> k' => arr.[k <- x].[k' <- x'] = arr.[k' <- x'].[k <- x]

lemmas.name: offunifE
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a) n i:
  (offun f n).[i] = if 0 <= i < n then f i else witness

lemmas.name: offunE
lemmas.statement: n (f : int -> 'a) i: 0 <= i < n => (offun f n).[i] = f i

lemmas.name: size_offun
lemmas.statement: (f : int -> 'a) n: size (offun f n) = max 0 n

lemmas.name: mapE
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) arr i: 0 <= i < size arr =>
  (map f arr).[i] = f arr.[i]

lemmas.name: size_map
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b) arr: size (map f arr) = size arr

lemmas.name: map_comp
lemmas.statement:
(f1: 'b -> 'c) (f2: 'a -> 'b) arr :
    map (f1 \o f2) arr = map f1 (map f2 arr)

lemmas.name: size_int2bs
lemmas.statement: N n : size (int2bs N n) = max 0 N

lemmas.name: bs2int_nil
lemmas.statement: : bs2int [] = 0

lemmas.name: bs2int_cons
lemmas.statement:
x s :
  bs2int (x :: s) = b2i x + 2 * bs2int s

lemmas.name: bs2int_nseq_false
lemmas.statement:
N :
  bs2int (nseq N false) = 0

lemmas.name: bs2int_rcons
lemmas.statement:
b (s : bool list):
  bs2int (rcons s b) = (bs2int s) + 2^(size s) * (b2i b)

lemmas.name: int2bs0s
lemmas.statement: i : int2bs 0 i = []

lemmas.name: int2bs0s_le
lemmas.statement: N i : N <= 0 => int2bs N i = []

lemmas.name: int2bs0
lemmas.statement: N : int2bs N 0 = nseq N false

lemmas.name: int2bs_nseq_false
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  (2 ^ N) %| n =>
  int2bs N n = nseq N false

lemmas.name: int2bsS
lemmas.statement:
N i : 0 <= N =>
  int2bs (N + 1) i = rcons (int2bs N i) ((i %/ 2^N) %% 2 <> 0)

lemmas.name: int2bs_cons
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  0 < N =>
  int2bs N n = (!2 %| n) :: int2bs (N - 1) (n %/ 2)

lemmas.name: int2bs_rcons
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  0 < N =>
  int2bs N n = rcons (int2bs (N - 1) n) ((n %/ 2 ^ (N - 1)) %% 2 <> 0)

lemmas.name: int2bs_mod
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  int2bs N (n %% 2 ^ N) = int2bs N n

lemmas.name: int2bs_nseq_true
lemmas.statement:
N :
  int2bs N (2 ^ N - 1) = nseq N true

lemmas.name: bs2int_eq
lemmas.statement:
N i j: 0 <= i => 0 <= j => i %% 2^N = j %% 2^N =>
  int2bs N i = int2bs N j

lemmas.name: bs2int_ge0
lemmas.statement: s : 0 <= bs2int s

lemmas.name: bs2int_le2Xs
lemmas.statement: s : bs2int s < 2^(size s)

lemmas.name: bs2intK
lemmas.statement: s : int2bs (size s) (bs2int s) = s

lemmas.name: int2bsK
lemmas.statement: N i : 0 <= N => 0 <= i < 2^N => bs2int (int2bs N i) = i

lemmas.name: int2bs_cat
lemmas.statement:
K N n :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  int2bs N n = (int2bs K n) ++ (int2bs (N - K) (n %/ (2 ^ K)))

lemmas.name: int2bs1
lemmas.statement:
N :
  0 < N =>
  int2bs N 1 = true :: nseq (N - 1) false

lemmas.name: int2bs_cat_nseq_true_false
lemmas.statement:
K N :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  int2bs N (2 ^ K - 1) = nseq K true ++ nseq (N - K) false

lemmas.name: int2bs_mulr_pow2
lemmas.statement:
K N n :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  int2bs N (2 ^ K * n) = nseq K false ++ int2bs (N - K) n

lemmas.name: int2bs_divr_pow2
lemmas.statement:
K N n :
  int2bs N (n %/ 2 ^ K) = drop `|K| (int2bs (N + `|K|) n)

lemmas.name: int2bs_pow2
lemmas.statement:
K N :
  K \in range 0 N =>
  int2bs N (2 ^ K) = nseq K false ++ true :: nseq (N - 1 - K) false

lemmas.name: bs2int_cat
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2 :
  bs2int (s1 ++ s2) = bs2int s1 + (2 ^ (size s1)) * bs2int s2

lemmas.name: bs2intD
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : bool list) (i : int) :
  i = size s1 => bs2int s1 + (2 ^ i) * bs2int s2 = bs2int (s1 ++ s2)

lemmas.name: bs2int_take_drop
lemmas.statement:
(i : int)  (s : bool list) :
  0 <= i => bs2int s = bs2int (take i s) + 2 ^ i * bs2int (drop i s)

lemmas.name: bs2int_div
lemmas.statement:
(i : int) (s : bool list) :
  0 <= i => bs2int s %/ 2^i = bs2int (drop i s)

lemmas.name: bs2int_mod
lemmas.statement:
(s : bool list) (i : int) :
  0 <= i => bs2int s %% 2^i = bs2int (take i s)

lemmas.name: inj_bs2int_eqsize
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : bool list) :
  size s1 = size s2 => bs2int s1 = bs2int s2 => s1 = s2

lemmas.name: bs2int_range
lemmas.statement:
s :
  bs2int s \in range 0 (2 ^ size s)

lemmas.name: bs2int1
lemmas.statement:
N :
  bs2int (true :: nseq N false) = 1

lemmas.name: bs2int_nseq_true
lemmas.statement:
N :
  0 <= N =>
  bs2int (nseq N true) = 2 ^ N - 1

lemmas.name: bs2int_cat_nseq_true_false
lemmas.statement:
K N :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  bs2int (nseq K true ++ nseq (N - K) false) = 2 ^ K - 1

lemmas.name: bs2int_mulr_pow2
lemmas.statement:
N s :
  bs2int (nseq N false ++ s) = 2 ^ max 0 N * bs2int s

lemmas.name: bs2int_pow2
lemmas.statement:
K N :
  bs2int (nseq K false ++ true :: nseq N false) = 2 ^ max 0 K

lemmas.name: int2bs_strikeE
lemmas.statement:
(l n : int) :
  let k = index false (int2bs (l+1) n) in

     0 <= l
  => 0 <= n < 2^l
  => int2bs (l+1) n = nseq k true ++ false :: drop (k+1) (int2bs (l+1) n)

lemmas.name: int2bs_strike_succE
lemmas.statement:
(l n : int) :
  let k = index false (int2bs (l+1) n) in

     0 <= l
  => 0 <= n < 2^l
  => int2bs (l+1) (n + 1)
       = nseq k false ++ true :: drop (k + 1) (int2bs (l+1) n)

lemmas.name: int2bs_bsrev
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  int2bs N (bsrev N n) = rev (int2bs N n)

lemmas.name: bsrev_bs2int
lemmas.statement:
s :
  bsrev (size s) (bs2int s) = bs2int (rev s)

lemmas.name: bsrev_neg
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  N <= 0 =>
  bsrev N n = 0

lemmas.name: bsrev_cons
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  0 < N =>
  bsrev N n = 2 ^ (N - 1) * b2i (!2 %| n) + bsrev (N - 1) (n %/ 2)

lemmas.name: bsrev_ge0
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  0 <= bsrev N n

lemmas.name: bsrev_lt_pow2
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  bsrev N n < 2 ^ N

lemmas.name: bsrev_range
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  bsrev N n \in range 0 (2 ^ N)

lemmas.name: bsrev_cat
lemmas.statement:
K N n :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  bsrev N n = bsrev (N - K) (n %/ 2 ^ K) + 2 ^ (N - K) * bsrev K n

lemmas.name: bsrev_mod
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  bsrev N (n %% 2 ^ N) = bsrev N n

lemmas.name: bsrev_involutive
lemmas.statement:
N n :
  0 <= N =>
  n \in range 0 (2 ^ N) =>
  bsrev N (bsrev N n) = n

lemmas.name: bsrev_injective
lemmas.statement:
N n1 n2 :
  0 <= N =>
  n1 \in range 0 (2 ^ N) =>
  n2 \in range 0 (2 ^ N) =>
  bsrev N n1 = bsrev N n2 =>
  n1 = n2

lemmas.name: bsrev_bijective
lemmas.statement:
N n1 n2 :
  0 <= N =>
  n1 \in range 0 (2 ^ N) =>
  n2 \in range 0 (2 ^ N) =>
  bsrev N n1 = bsrev N n2 <=>
  n1 = n2

lemmas.name: bsrev0
lemmas.statement:
N :
  bsrev N 0 = 0

lemmas.name: bsrev1
lemmas.statement:
N :
  0 < N =>
  bsrev N 1 = 2 ^ (N - 1)

lemmas.name: bsrev_mulr_pow2
lemmas.statement:
K N n :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  bsrev N (2 ^ K * n) = bsrev N n %/ 2 ^ K

lemmas.name: bsrev_divr_pow2
lemmas.statement:
K N n :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  bsrev N (n %/ 2 ^ K) = (bsrev (N + K) n) %% (2 ^ N)

lemmas.name: bsrev_pow2
lemmas.statement:
K N :
  K \in range 0 N =>
  bsrev N (2 ^ K) = 2 ^ (N - 1 - K)

lemmas.name: bsrev_range_dvdz
lemmas.statement:
K N n :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  n \in range 0 (2 ^ (N - K)) =>
  2 ^ K %| bsrev N n

lemmas.name: bsrev_dvdz_range
lemmas.statement:
K N n :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  (2 ^ (N - K)) %| n =>
  bsrev N n \in range 0 (2 ^ K)

lemmas.name: bsrev_add
lemmas.statement:
K N m n :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  m \in range 0 (2 ^ K) =>
  bsrev N (m + 2 ^ K * n) = bsrev N m + bsrev N n %/ 2 ^ K

lemmas.name: bsrev2_le
lemmas.statement:
M N n :
  0 <= M <= N =>
  bsrev M (bsrev N n) = n %% 2 ^ N %/ 2 ^ (N - M)

lemmas.name: bsrev2_ge
lemmas.statement:
M N n :
  0 <= N <= M =>
  bsrev M (bsrev N n) = 2 ^ (M - N) * (n %% 2 ^ N)

lemmas.name: bsrev_range_pow2_perm_eq
lemmas.statement:
K N :
  0 <= K <= N =>
  perm_eq
    (map (bsrev N)             (range 0 (2 ^ K)))
    (map (( * ) (2 ^ (N - K))) (range 0 (2 ^ K)))

lemmas.name: bsrev_mul_range_pow2_perm_eq
lemmas.statement:
K M N :
  0 <= K =>
  0 <= M =>
  K + M <= N =>
  perm_eq
    (map (bsrev N \o (( * ) (2 ^ M))) (range 0 (2 ^ K)))
    (map (( * ) (2 ^ (N - K - M)))    (range 0 (2 ^ K)))

lemmas.name: chunk_nil
lemmas.statement: ['a] (n : int) : chunk<:'a> n [] = []

lemmas.name: chunk_exact
lemmas.statement: ['a] (xs : 'a list) : xs <> [] => chunk (size xs) xs = [xs]

lemmas.name: chunk_le0
lemmas.statement: r (s : 'a list) : r <= 0 => chunk r s = []

lemmas.name: nth_flatten
lemmas.statement:
x0 n (bs : 'a list list) i :
     all (fun s => size s = n) bs
  => nth x0 (flatten bs) i = nth x0 (nth [] bs (i %/ n)) (i %% n)

lemmas.name: size_chunk
lemmas.statement:
r (bs : 'a list) : 0 < r =>
  size (chunk r bs) = size bs %/ r

lemmas.name: in_chunk_size
lemmas.statement:
r (bs : 'a list) b: 0 < r =>
  mem (chunk r bs) b => size b = r

lemmas.name: size_nth_chunk
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x0 : 'a list) (s : 'a list) (i n : int) :
  0 <= n => 0 <= i < (size s) %/ n => size (nth x0 (chunk n s) i) = n

lemmas.name: size_flatten_chunk
lemmas.statement:
r (bs : 'a list) : 0 < r =>
  size (flatten (chunk r bs)) = (size bs) %/ r * r

lemmas.name: chunkK
lemmas.statement:
r (bs : 'a list) : 0 < r =>
  r %| size bs => flatten (chunk r bs) = bs

lemmas.name: flattenK
lemmas.statement:
r (bs : 'a list list) : 0 < r =>
  (forall b, mem bs b => size b = r) => chunk r (flatten bs) = bs

lemmas.name: chunk_cat
lemmas.statement:
r (xs ys : 'a list) :
  r %| size xs => chunk r (xs ++ ys) = chunk r xs ++ chunk r ys

lemmas.name: inj_chunk
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  0 < n => n %| size s1 => n %| size s2 => chunk n s1 = chunk n s2 => s1 = s2

lemmas.name: domE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x :
  dom m x <=> m.[x] <> None

lemmas.name: rngE
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap):
  rng m = fun y => exists x, m.[x] = Some y by rewrite /rng

lemmas.name: get_none
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap, x : 'a) :
  x \notin m => m.[x] = None

lemmas.name: get_some
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap, x : 'a) :
  x \in m => m.[x] = Some (oget m.[x])

lemmas.name: fmapP
lemmas.statement: (m : ('a,'b) fmap) x : x \in m <=> exists y, m.[x] = Some y

lemmas.name: getE
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x : m.[x] = (tomap m).[x]

lemmas.name: tomapK
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] : cancel tomap ofmap<:'a, 'b>

lemmas.name: ofmapK
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b option) map) :
  is_finite (fun x => m.[x] <> None) => tomap (ofmap m) = m

lemmas.name: isfmap_offmap
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  is_finite (fun x => (tomap m).[x] <> None)

lemmas.name: finite_dom
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  is_finite (dom m)

lemmas.name: finite_rng
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) : is_finite (rng m)

lemmas.name: fmap_eqP
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  (forall x, m1.[x] = m2.[x]) <=> m1 = m2

lemmas.name: empty_valE
lemmas.statement: ['a, 'b] : tomap empty<:'a, 'b> = cst None

lemmas.name: emptyE
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] x : empty<:'a, 'b>.[x] = None

lemmas.name: mem_empty
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] x : x \notin empty<:'a, 'b>

lemmas.name: mem_rng_empty
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] y : !rng empty<:'a, 'b> y

lemmas.name: set_valE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x v :
  tomap m.[x <- v] = (tomap m).[x <- Some v]

lemmas.name: domNE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap, x : 'a) :
  x \notin m <=> m.[x] = None

lemmas.name: get_setE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) (x y : 'a) b :
  m.[x <- b].[y] = if y = x then Some b else m.[y]

lemmas.name: get_set_sameE
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a,'b) fmap) (x : 'a) b :
  m.[x <- b].[x] = Some b

lemmas.name: get_set_eqE
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap) (x y : 'a) b :
  y = x => m.[x <- b].[y] = Some b

lemmas.name: get_set_id
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a,'b) fmap) x y:
  m.[x] = Some y => m.[x <- y] = m

lemmas.name: set_get
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap, x : 'a) :
  x \in m => m.[x <- oget m.[x]] = m

lemmas.name: set_get_eq
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap, x : 'a, y : 'b) :
  m.[x] = Some y => m.[x <- y] = m

lemmas.name: mem_set
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x b y :
  y \in m.[x <- b] <=> (y \in m \/ y = x)

lemmas.name: rem_valE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x :
  tomap (rem m x) = (tomap m).[x <- None]

lemmas.name: remE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x y :
  (rem m x).[y] = if y = x then None else m.[y]

lemmas.name: rem_set
lemmas.statement: (m: ('a, 'b) fmap) x: x \in m => (rem m x).[x <- oget m.[x]] = m

lemmas.name: mem_rem
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x y :
  y \in (rem m x) <=> (y \in m /\ y <> x)

lemmas.name: rem_id
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap, x : 'a) :
  x \notin m => rem m x = m

lemmas.name: rng_set
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap) (x : 'a) (y z : 'b) :
  rng m.[x <- y] z <=> rng (rem m x) z \/ z = y

lemmas.name: rng_set_notin
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap) (x : 'a) (y z : 'b) :
     x \notin m
  => rng m.[x <- y] z <=> rng m z \/ z = y

lemmas.name: eq_except_refl
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] X : reflexive (eq_except<:'a, 'b> X)

lemmas.name: eq_except_sym
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] X (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  eq_except X m1 m2 => eq_except X m2 m1

lemmas.name: eq_except_trans
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] X (m1 m2 m3 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  eq_except X m1 m2 => eq_except X m2 m3 => eq_except X m1 m3

lemmas.name: eq_except_sub
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (X Y : 'a -> bool) (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
   X <= Y => eq_except X m1 m2 => eq_except Y m1 m2

lemmas.name: eq_exceptP
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] X (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  eq_except X m1 m2 <=> (forall x, !X x => m1.[x] = m2.[x])

lemmas.name: eq_except0
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  eq_except pred0 m1 m2 <=> m1 = m2

lemmas.name: eq_except_notp_in
lemmas.statement:
(X : 'a -> bool, y : 'a, m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  eq_except X m1 m2 => ! X y => y \in m1 => y \in m2

lemmas.name: eq_exceptSm
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] X x y (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
     eq_except X m1 m2
  => eq_except (predU X (pred1 x)) m1.[x <- y] m2

lemmas.name: eq_exceptmS
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] X x y (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
     eq_except X m1 m2
  => eq_except (predU X (pred1 x)) m1 m2.[x <- y]

lemmas.name: eq_except_setl
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] x y (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  eq_except (pred1 x) m.[x <- y] m

lemmas.name: eq_except_setr
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] x y (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  eq_except (pred1 x) m m.[x <- y]

lemmas.name: eq_except_set
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] X x y y' (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  eq_except X m1 m2 =>
  eq_except ((y <> y') ? predU X (pred1 x) : X) m1.[x <- y] m2.[x <- y']

lemmas.name: eq_except_set_eq
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] X x y (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  eq_except X m1 m2 => eq_except X m1.[x <- y] m2.[x <- y]

lemmas.name: eq_except_set_same
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] X x y y' (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
     y = y'
  => eq_except X m1 m2
  => eq_except X m1.[x <- y] m2.[x <- y']

lemmas.name: eq_except_set_neq
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] X x y y' (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
     y <> y'
  => eq_except X m1 m2
  => eq_except (predU X (pred1 x)) m1.[x <- y] m2.[x <- y']

lemmas.name: eq_except_set_getlr
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m1 m2 : ('a, 'b) fmap, x) :
     x \in m1
  => eq_except (pred1 x) m1 m2
  => m1 = m2.[x <- oget m1.[x]]

lemmas.name: eq_except_setlr
lemmas.statement:
(X : 'a -> bool, m : ('a, 'b) fmap, x, b, b'):
  X x => eq_except X m.[x <- b] m.[x <- b']

lemmas.name: eq_except_remr
lemmas.statement:
(X : 'a -> bool, m1 m2 : ('a,'b) fmap, x) :
   X x => eq_except X m1 m2 => eq_except X m1 (rem m2 x)

lemmas.name: eq_except_reml
lemmas.statement:
(X : 'a -> bool, m1 m2 : ('a,'b) fmap, x) :
   X x => eq_except X m1 m2 => eq_except X (rem m1 x) m2

lemmas.name: map_valE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) m :
  tomap (map f m) = SmtMap.map (fun k => omap (f k)) (tomap m)

lemmas.name: mapE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) m x :
  (map f m).[x] = omap (f x) m.[x]

lemmas.name: mem_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) m x :
  x \in map f m <=> x \in m

lemmas.name: map_set
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) m x b :
  map f (m.[x <- b]) = (map f m).[x <- f x b]

lemmas.name: map_comp
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c 'd]
  (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) (g : 'a -> 'c -> 'd) m
: map g (map f m) = map (fun a b => g a (f a b)) m

lemmas.name: map_id
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a,'b) fmap) :
  map (fun _ b => b) m = m

lemmas.name: map_empty
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) :
  map f empty = empty

lemmas.name: map_rem
lemmas.statement:
(f:'a -> 'b -> 'c, m, x) :
  map f (rem m x) = rem (map f m) x

lemmas.name: oget_map
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a,'b) fmap) (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) i :
  i \in m => oget (map f m).[i] = f i (oget m.[i])

lemmas.name: filter_valE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (p : 'a -> 'b -> bool) m :
  tomap (filter p m) =
    SmtMap.offun (fun x => oapp (p x) false m.[x] ? m.[x] : None)

lemmas.name: filterE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (p : 'a -> 'b -> bool) m x :
  (filter p m).[x] = oapp (p x) false m.[x] ? m.[x] : None

lemmas.name: mem_filter
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a,'b) fmap) (p : 'a -> 'b -> bool) x :
   x \in filter p m <=> x \in m /\ p x (oget m.[x])

lemmas.name: get_filter
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a,'b) fmap) (p : 'a -> 'b -> bool) x :
  x \in filter p m => (filter p m).[x] = m.[x]

lemmas.name: filter_empty
lemmas.statement: (p:'a -> 'b -> bool) : filter p empty = empty

lemmas.name: eq_in_filter
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (p1 p2 : 'a -> 'b -> bool) (m : ('a,'b) fmap) :
  (forall (x : 'a) y , m.[x] = Some y => p1 x y <=> p2 x y) =>
  filter p1 m = filter p2 m

lemmas.name: rem_filter
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a,'b) fmap) x (p : 'a -> 'b -> bool) :
  (forall y, !p x y) => rem (filter p m) x = filter p m

lemmas.name: filter_set
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> 'b -> bool) m x b :
  filter p (m.[x <- b]) = p x b ? (filter p m).[x <- b] : rem (filter p m) x

lemmas.name: fdomE
lemmas.statement: (m : ('a, 'b) fmap): fdom m = oflist (to_seq (dom m))

lemmas.name: mem_fdom
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) (x : 'a) :
  x \in fdom m <=> x \in m

lemmas.name: fdomP
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) (x : 'a) :
  x \in fdom m <=> m.[x] <> None

lemmas.name: fdom0
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] : fdom empty<:'a, 'b> = fset0

lemmas.name: fdom_eq0
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) : fdom m = fset0 => m = empty

lemmas.name: fdom_set
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x v :
  fdom m.[x <- v] = fdom m `|` fset1 x

lemmas.name: fdom_rem
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x :
  fdom (rem m x) = fdom m `\` fset1 x

lemmas.name: fdom_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) m :
  fdom (map f m) = fdom m

lemmas.name: mem_fdom_set
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x v y :
  y \in fdom m.[x <- v] <=> (y \in fdom m \/ y = x)

lemmas.name: mem_fdom_rem
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x y :
  y \in fdom (rem m x) <=> (y \in fdom m /\ y <> x)

lemmas.name: mem_offset
lemmas.statement: (s: 'a fset) x: x \in (offset s) <=> x \in s

lemmas.name: offset_get
lemmas.statement: s (e: 'a): (offset s).[e] = if e \in s then Some () else None

lemmas.name: offsetK
lemmas.statement: : cancel offset fdom<:'a, unit>

lemmas.name: offsetmapT
lemmas.statement: (s: 'a fset) (f: 'a -> 'b) e: e \in s => (offsetmap f s).[e] = Some (f e)

lemmas.name: offsetmapN
lemmas.statement: (s: 'a fset) (f: 'a -> 'b) e: e \notin s => (offsetmap f s).[e] = None

lemmas.name: mem_offsetmap
lemmas.statement: s (f: 'a -> 'b) e: e \in offsetmap f s <=> e \in s

lemmas.name: frngE
lemmas.statement: (m : ('a, 'b) fmap): frng m = oflist (to_seq (rng m))

lemmas.name: mem_frng
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) (y : 'b) :
  y \in frng m <=> rng m y

lemmas.name: frng0
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] : frng empty<:'a, 'b> = fset0

lemmas.name: frng_set
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap, x : 'a, y : 'b) :
  frng m.[x <- y] = frng (rem m x) `|` fset1 y

lemmas.name: fmapW
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (p : ('a, 'b) fmap -> bool) :
      p empty
   => (forall m k v, !k \in fdom m => p m => p m.[k <- v])
   => forall m, p m

lemmas.name: le_card_frng_fdom
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  card (frng m) <= card (fdom m)

lemmas.name: joinE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m1 m2 : ('a,'b) fmap) (x : 'a):
  (m1 + m2).[x] = if x \in m2 then m2.[x] else m1.[x]

lemmas.name: mem_join
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (m1 m2 : ('a,'b) fmap) (x : 'a):
  x \in (m1 + m2) <=> x \in m1 \/ x \in m2

lemmas.name: fdom_join
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b] (m1 m2 : ('a,'b) fmap):
 fdom (m1 + m2) = fdom m1 `|` fdom m2

lemmas.name: hasE
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> 'b -> bool) m:
  has P m = has (fun x=>P x (oget m.[x])) (elems (fdom m)) by rewrite/has

lemmas.name: hasP
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> 'b -> bool) (m : ('a, 'b) fmap):
  has P m <=> exists x y, m.[x] = Some y /\ P x y

lemmas.name: findE
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> 'b -> bool) m: find P m =
  onth (elems (fdom m)) (find (fun x=> P x (oget m.[x])) (elems (fdom m)))

lemmas.name: find_some
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> 'b -> bool) (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) x:
  find P m = Some x => exists y, m.[x] = Some y /\ P x y

lemmas.name: find_not_none
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> 'b -> bool) (m : ('a,'b) fmap) :
     find P m <> None
  => exists x y, find P m = Some x /\ m.[x] = Some y /\ P x y

lemmas.name: find_eq_none
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> 'b -> bool) (m : ('a,'b) fmap):
  (forall x, x \in m => !p x (oget m.[x])) => find p m = None

lemmas.name: findP
lemmas.statement: (P : 'a -> 'b -> bool) (m : ('a, 'b) fmap): find_spec P m

lemmas.name: find_some_unique
lemmas.statement:
x0 x' P (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  (forall x y, m.[x] = Some y => P x y => x = x0)
  => find P m = Some x'
  => x' = x0

lemmas.name: uniq_find_eq_some
lemmas.statement:
z (P : 'a -> 'b -> bool) (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) :
  (forall (x : 'a) (y : 'b), m.[x] = Some y => P x y => x = z) =>
  z \in m => P z (oget m.[z]) => find P m = Some z

lemmas.name: find_map
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap) (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) P :
  find P (map f m) = find (fun x y => P x (f x y)) m

lemmas.name: ofassoc_get
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (xs : ('a * 'b) list) k :
  (ofassoc xs).[k] = List.assoc xs k

lemmas.name: mem_ofassoc
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b] (xs : ('a * 'b) list) k:
 k \in ofassoc xs <=> k \in map fst xs

lemmas.name: fdom_ofassoc
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (xs : ('a * 'b) list) :
  fdom (ofassoc xs) = oflist (map fst xs)

lemmas.name: fsize_empty
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] : fsize<:'a,'b> empty = 0

lemmas.name: ge0_fsize
lemmas.statement: (m : ('a, 'b) fmap) : 0 <= fsize m

lemmas.name: fsize_set
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap) k v :
  fsize m.[k <- v] = b2i (k \notin m) + fsize m

lemmas.name: fsize0_empty
lemmas.statement: (m: ('a, 'b) fmap): fsize m = 0 => m = empty

lemmas.name: fsize_map
lemmas.statement: m (f: 'a -> 'b -> 'c): fsize (map f m) = fsize m

lemmas.name: fcollPn
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'b -> 'c) (m : ('a,'b) fmap) :
      !fcoll f m
  <=> forall i j, i \in m => j \in m =>
        i <> j => f (oget m.[i]) <> f (oget m.[j])

lemmas.name: restrP
lemmas.statement:
['k, 'v, 'f] (m : ('k, 'v * 'f) fmap) f x : (restr f m).[x] =
  obind (fun (p : _ * _) => if p.`2 = f then Some p.`1 else None) m.[x]

lemmas.name: dom_restr
lemmas.statement:
['k, 'v, 'f] (m : ('k, 'v * 'f) fmap) f x :
  dom (restr f m) x <=> in_dom_with m x f

lemmas.name: restr_set
lemmas.statement:
['k, 'v, 'f] (m : ('k, 'v * 'f) fmap) f1 f2 x y :
  restr f1 m.[x <- (y, f2)]
    = if f1 = f2 then (restr f1 m).[x <- y] else rem (restr f1 m) x

lemmas.name: restr_set_eq
lemmas.statement:
['k, 'v, 'f] (m : ('k, 'v * 'f) fmap) f x y :
  restr f m.[x <- (y, f)] = (restr f m).[x <- y]

lemmas.name: restr0
lemmas.statement: ['k, 'v, 'f] f : restr f empty<:'k, 'v * 'f> = empty

lemmas.name: restr_set_neq
lemmas.statement:
['k, 'v, 'f] f2 f1 (m : ('k, 'v * 'f) fmap) x y :
  ! dom m x => f2 <> f1 => restr f1 m.[x <- (y, f2)] = restr f1 m

lemmas.name: restr_rem
lemmas.statement:
['k, 'v, 'f] (m : ('k, 'v * 'f) fmap) (x : 'k) f :
  restr f (rem m x)
    = (if in_dom_with m x f then rem (restr f m) x else restr f m)

lemmas.name: bounded_set
lemmas.statement:
['from 'to] (m : ('from, 'to)fmap) (size:int) x e :
  bounded m size => bounded (m.[x<-e]) (size + 1)

lemmas.name: bounded_empty
lemmas.statement: ['from 'to] : bounded empty<:'from, 'to> 0

lemmas.name: is_finite_merge
lemmas.statement:
(f:'a -> 'b1 option -> 'b2 option -> 'b3 option)
         (m1 : ('a, 'b1)fmap) (m2: ('a,'b2)fmap) :
  (forall a, f a None None = None) =>
  Finite.is_finite
     (fun (x0 : 'a) => (offun (fun (a : 'a) => f a (tomap m1).[a] (tomap m2).[a])).[x0] <> None)

lemmas.name: mergeE
lemmas.statement:
(f:'a -> 'b1 option -> 'b2 option -> 'b3 option) (m1 : ('a, 'b1)fmap) (m2: ('a,'b2)fmap) x:
  (forall a, f a None None = None) =>
  (merge f m1 m2).[x] = f x m1.[x] m2.[x]

lemmas.name: merge_empty
lemmas.statement:
(f:'a -> 'b1 option -> 'b2 option -> 'b3 option) :
  (forall a, f a None None = None) =>
  merge f empty empty = empty

lemmas.name: rem_merge
lemmas.statement:
(f:'a -> 'b1 option -> 'b2 option -> 'b3 option) (m1 : ('a, 'b1)fmap) (m2: ('a,'b2)fmap) x:
  (forall a, f a None None = None) =>
  rem (merge f m1 m2) x = merge f (rem m1 x) (rem m2 x)

lemmas.name: o_union_none
lemmas.statement: a : o_union<:'a,'b> a None None = None

lemmas.name: set_union_map_l
lemmas.statement:
(m1 m2: ('a, 'b)fmap) x y:
  (union_map m1 m2).[x <- y] = union_map m1.[x <- y] m2

lemmas.name: set_union_map_r
lemmas.statement:
(m1 m2: ('a, 'b)fmap) x y:
  x \notin m1 =>
  (union_map m1 m2).[x <- y] = union_map m1 m2.[x <- y]

lemmas.name: mem_union_map
lemmas.statement: (m1 m2:('a, 'b)fmap) x: (x \in union_map m1 m2) = (x \in m1 || x \in m2)

lemmas.name: o_pair_none
lemmas.statement: a : o_pair <:'a,'b1, 'b2> a None None = None

lemmas.name: set_pair_map
lemmas.statement:
(m1: ('a, 'b1)fmap) (m2: ('a, 'b2)fmap) x y:
  (pair_map m1 m2).[x <- y] = pair_map m1.[x <- y.`1] m2.[x <- y.`2]

lemmas.name: mem_pair_map
lemmas.statement:
(m1: ('a, 'b1)fmap) (m2: ('a, 'b2)fmap) x:
  (x \in pair_map m1 m2) = (x \in m1 /\ x \in m2)

lemmas.name: elemsK
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a fset): oflist (elems  s) = s

lemmas.name: oflistK
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): perm_eq (undup s) (elems (oflist s))

lemmas.name: fset_eq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a fset):
  (perm_eq (elems s1) (elems s2)) => (s1 = s2)

lemmas.name: oflist_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) : uniq s =>
  perm_eq s (elems (oflist s))

lemmas.name: uniq_elems
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a fset): uniq (elems s)

lemmas.name: perm_eq_oflist
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  oflist s1 = oflist s2 => perm_eq (undup s1) (undup s2)

lemmas.name: oflist_perm_eq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
  perm_eq s1 s2 => oflist s1 = oflist s2

lemmas.name: oflist_perm_eq_undup
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
  perm_eq (undup s1) (undup s2) => oflist s1 = oflist s2

lemmas.name: perm_eq_oflistP
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
  oflist s1 = oflist s2 <=> perm_eq (undup s1) (undup s2)

lemmas.name: cardE
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a fset): card s = size (elems s) by rewrite/card

lemmas.name: memE
lemmas.statement: (s : 's fset) x: mem s x = mem (elems s) x by rewrite /mem

lemmas.name: mem_oflist
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list):
  forall x, mem (oflist s) x <=> mem s x

lemmas.name: fsetP
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a fset):
  (s1 = s2) <=> (forall x, mem s1 x <=> mem s2 x)

lemmas.name: finite_mem
lemmas.statement: (s: 'a fset): is_finite (mem s)

lemmas.name: set0E
lemmas.statement: : fset0<:'a> = oflist [<:'a>] by rewrite/fset0

lemmas.name: set1E
lemmas.statement: (z : 'a): fset1 z = oflist [z] by rewrite/fset1

lemmas.name: setUE
lemmas.statement: (s1 s2 : 'a fset): s1 `|` s2 = oflist (elems s1 ++ elems s2)

lemmas.name: setIE
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a fset):
  s1 `&` s2 = oflist (filter (mem s2) (elems s1)) by rewrite/(`&`)

lemmas.name: setDE
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a fset):
  s1 `\` s2 = oflist (filter (predC (mem s2)) (elems s1)) by rewrite/(`\`)

lemmas.name: in_fset0
lemmas.statement: : forall x, mem fset0<:'a> x <=> false

lemmas.name: in_eq_fset0
lemmas.statement: ['a] (X : 'a fset): (forall x, !x \in X) => X = fset0

lemmas.name: elems_fset0
lemmas.statement: ['a]: elems fset0 = [<:'a>]

lemmas.name: elems_eq_fset0
lemmas.statement: ['a] (A : 'a fset): elems A = [<:'a>] => A = fset0

lemmas.name: in_fset1
lemmas.statement: z: forall x, mem (fset1<:'a> z) x <=> x = z

lemmas.name: in_eq_fset1
lemmas.statement:
['a] (X : 'a fset) x0:
  (forall x, x \in X <=> x = x0) => X = fset1 x0

lemmas.name: elems_fset1
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a) : elems (fset1 x) = [x]

lemmas.name: elems_eq_fset1
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) x : elems A = [x] => A = fset1 x

lemmas.name: in_fsetU
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a fset):
  forall x, mem (s1 `|` s2) x <=> mem s1 x \/ mem s2 x

lemmas.name: in_fsetI
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a fset):
  forall x, mem (s1 `&` s2) x <=> mem s1 x /\ mem s2 x

lemmas.name: in_fsetD
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a fset):
  forall x, mem (s1 `\` s2) x <=> mem s1 x /\ !mem s2 x

lemmas.name: setD1E
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a fset) x :
  perm_eq (elems (s `\` fset1 x)) (rem x (elems s))

lemmas.name: perm_to_rem
lemmas.statement:
(s:'a fset) x :
  mem s x => perm_eq (elems s) (x :: elems (s `\` fset1 x))

lemmas.name: oflist_cons
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x : 'a) s : oflist (x::s) = fset1 x `|` oflist s

lemmas.name: oflist_cat
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  oflist (s1 ++ s2) = oflist s1 `|` oflist s2

lemmas.name: in_fsetU1
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a fset) x:
  forall x', mem (s `|` fset1 x) x' <=> mem s x' \/ x' = x

lemmas.name: in_fsetI1
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a fset) x:
  forall x', mem (s `&` fset1 x) x' <=> mem s x /\ x' = x

lemmas.name: in_fsetD1
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a fset) x:
  forall x', mem (s `\` fset1 x) x' <=> mem s x' /\ x' <> x

lemmas.name: disjointP
lemmas.statement:
(xs ys : 'a fset):
  disjoint xs ys <=> forall (x : 'a), x \in xs => ! x \in ys

lemmas.name: pickE
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset): pick A = head witness (elems A) by rewrite/pick

lemmas.name: pick0
lemmas.statement: : pick<:'a> fset0 = witness

lemmas.name: mem_pick
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset): A <> fset0 => mem A (pick A)

lemmas.name: filterE
lemmas.statement: (p: 'a -> bool) s: filter p s = oflist (filter p (elems s))

lemmas.name: in_filter
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) (s : 'a fset):
  forall x, mem (filter p s) x <=> p x /\ mem s x

lemmas.name: filter0
lemmas.statement: (p : 'a -> bool): filter p fset0 = fset0

lemmas.name: filter1
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) (a : 'a):
  filter p (fset1 a) = if (p a) then fset1 a else fset0

lemmas.name: filterU
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) (A B : 'a fset):
  filter p (A `|` B) = filter p A `|` filter p B

lemmas.name: filterI
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) (A B : 'a fset):
  filter p (A `&` B) = filter p A `&` filter p B

lemmas.name: filterD
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) (A B : 'a fset):
  filter p (A `\` B) = filter p A `\` filter p B

lemmas.name: filter_pred0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset): filter pred0 A = fset0

lemmas.name: filter_pred1
lemmas.statement:
(a : 'a) (A : 'a fset):
  filter (pred1 a) A = if mem A a then fset1 a else fset0

lemmas.name: filter_mem
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset): filter (mem A) B = A `&` B

lemmas.name: filter_memC
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset): filter (predC (mem A)) B = B `\` A

lemmas.name: subsetP
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a fset):
  (s1 \subset s2) <=> (mem s1 <= mem s2)

lemmas.name: subset_trans
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 s3 : 'a fset):
  s1 \subset s2 => s2 \subset s3 => s1 \subset s3

lemmas.name: properP
lemmas.statement:
(X Y : 'a fset) :
  X \proper Y <=> X \subset Y /\ exists y, y \in Y /\ ! y \in X

lemmas.name: eqEsubset
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : (A = B) <=> (A \subset B) /\ (B \subset A)

lemmas.name: fset_ind
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a fset -> bool):
  p fset0 =>
  (forall x s, !mem s x => p s => p (s `|` (fset1 x))) =>
  (forall s, p s)

lemmas.name: fsetUC
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : A `|` B = B `|` A

lemmas.name: fset0U
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : fset0 `|` A = A

lemmas.name: fsetU0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : A `|` fset0 = A

lemmas.name: fsetUA
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a fset) : A `|` (B `|` C) = A `|` B `|` C

lemmas.name: fsetUAC
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a fset) : A `|` B `|` C = A `|` C `|` B

lemmas.name: fsetUid
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : A `|` A = A

lemmas.name: fsetIC
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : A `&` B = B `&` A

lemmas.name: fset0I
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : fset0 `&` A = fset0

lemmas.name: fsetI0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : A `&` fset0 = fset0

lemmas.name: fset1I
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) (D : 'a fset):
  fset1 x `&` D = if mem D x then fset1 x else fset0

lemmas.name: fsetI1
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) (D : 'a fset):
  D `&` fset1 x = if mem D x then fset1 x else fset0

lemmas.name: fsetIA
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a fset) : A `&` (B `&` C) = A `&` B `&` C

lemmas.name: fsetIAC
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a fset) : A `&` B `&` C = A `&` C `&` B

lemmas.name: fsetIid
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : A `&` A = A

lemmas.name: fsetUK
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : (A `|` B) `&` A = A

lemmas.name: fsetKU
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : A `&` (B `|` A) = A

lemmas.name: fsetIK
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : (A `&` B) `|` A = A

lemmas.name: fsetKI
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : A `|` (B `&` A) = A

lemmas.name: fsetD0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : A `\` fset0 = A

lemmas.name: fset0D
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : fset0 `\` A = fset0

lemmas.name: fset1D
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) (D : 'a fset):
  fset1 x `\` D = if mem D x then fset0 else fset1 x

lemmas.name: fsetDv
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : A `\` A = fset0

lemmas.name: fsetID
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : A `&` B `|` A `\` B = A

lemmas.name: fsetII
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : (A `&` B) `&` (A `\` B) = fset0

lemmas.name: fsetDK
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : (A `|` B) `\` B = A `\` B

lemmas.name: fsetDKv
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : (A `&` B) `\` B = fset0

lemmas.name: subsetIl
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : (A `&` B) \subset A

lemmas.name: subsetIr
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : (A `&` B) \subset B

lemmas.name: subsetDl
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a fset) : A `\` B \subset A

lemmas.name: sub0set
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : fset0 \subset A

lemmas.name: sub1set
lemmas.statement: x (A : 'a fset) : fset1 x \subset A <=> x \in A

lemmas.name: fcards0
lemmas.statement: : card fset0<:'a> = 0

lemmas.name: eq_fcards0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset): A = fset0 => card A = 0

lemmas.name: fcard_ge0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : 0 <= card A

lemmas.name: fcard1
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a) : card (fset1 x) = 1

lemmas.name: fcardUI_indep
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) : A `&` B = fset0 =>
  card (A `|` B) = card A + card B

lemmas.name: fcardUI
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) :
  card (A `|` B) + card (A `&` B) = card A + card B

lemmas.name: fcardU
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) :
  card (A `|` B) = card A + card B - card (A `&` B)

lemmas.name: fcardI
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) :
  card (A `&` B) = card A + card B - card (A `|` B)

lemmas.name: fcardID
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) :
  card (A `&` B) + card (A `\` B) = card A

lemmas.name: fcardD
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) :
  card (A `\` B) = card A - card (A `&` B)

lemmas.name: fcardI1
lemmas.statement:
(A : 'a fset) x :
  card (A `&` fset1 x) = b2i (x \in A)

lemmas.name: fcardU1
lemmas.statement:
(A : 'a fset) x :
  card (A `|` fset1 x) = b2i (x \notin A) + card A

lemmas.name: fcardD1
lemmas.statement:
(A : 'a fset) (x : 'a) :
  card A = card (A `\` fset1 x) + (if mem A x then 1 else 0)

lemmas.name: fcard_oflist
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : card (oflist s) <= size s

lemmas.name: uniq_card_oflist
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : uniq s => card (oflist s) = size s

lemmas.name: card_iota
lemmas.statement: (n : int) : 0 <= n => card (oflist (iota_ 1 n)) = n

lemmas.name: subset_fsetU_id
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) :
  A \subset B => A `|` B = B

lemmas.name: subset_fsetI_id
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) :
  B \subset A => A `&` B = B

lemmas.name: subset_leq_fcard
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) :
  A \subset B => card A <= card B

lemmas.name: subset_cardP
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) :
  card A = card B => (A = B <=> A \subset B)

lemmas.name: eqEcard
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset) :
  (A = B) <=> (A \subset B) /\ (card B <= card A)

lemmas.name: fcard_eq0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : (card A = 0) <=> (A = fset0)

lemmas.name: fcard_eq1
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a fset) : (card A = 1) <=> (exists a, A = fset1 a)

lemmas.name: imageE
lemmas.statement: (f: 'a -> 'b) A: image f A = oflist (map f (elems A))

lemmas.name: imageP
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (A : 'a fset) (b : 'b):
  mem (image f A) b <=> (exists a, mem A a /\ f a = b)

lemmas.name: mem_image
lemmas.statement:
(f:'a->'b) (s:'a fset) x:
  mem s x => mem (image f s) (f x)

lemmas.name: image0
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b): image f fset0 = fset0

lemmas.name: image1
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (a : 'a):
  image f (fset1 a) = fset1 (f a)

lemmas.name: imageU
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (A B : 'a fset):
  image f (A `|` B) = image f A `|` image f B

lemmas.name: imageI
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (A B : 'a fset):
  image f (A `&` B) \subset image f A `&` image f B

lemmas.name: imageD
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (A B : 'a fset):
  image f A `\` image f B \subset image f (A `\` B)

lemmas.name: fcard_image_leq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (A : 'a fset):
  card (image f A) <= card A

lemmas.name: inj_fcard_image
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (A : 'a fset) :
    injective f => card (image f A) = card A

lemmas.name: productE
lemmas.statement:
(A : 'a fset) (B : 'b fset):
  product A B = oflist (allpairs (fun x y => (x,y)) (elems A) (elems B))

lemmas.name: productP
lemmas.statement:
(A : 'a fset) (B : 'b fset) (a : 'a) (b : 'b):
  (a, b) \in product A B <=> (a \in A) /\ (b \in B)

lemmas.name: card_product
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a fset):
  card (product A B) = card A * card B

lemmas.name: foldE
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) z A: fold f z A = foldr f z (elems A)

lemmas.name: fold0
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) (z : 'b): fold f z fset0 = z

lemmas.name: fold1
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) (z : 'b) (a : 'a):
  fold f z (fset1 a) = f a z

lemmas.name: foldC
lemmas.statement:
(a : 'a) (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) (z : 'b) (A : 'a fset):
  (forall a a' b, f a (f a' b) = f a' (f a b)) =>
  mem A a =>
  fold f z A = f a (fold f z (A `\` fset1 a))

lemmas.name: card_rangeset
lemmas.statement: m n : card (rangeset m n) = max 0 (n - m)

lemmas.name: mem_rangeset
lemmas.statement: m n i : i \in rangeset m n <=> m <= i && i < n

lemmas.name: ceil_floor
lemmas.statement: x : ceil x = - (floor (-x))

lemmas.name: floor_mono
lemmas.statement: (x y : real) : x <= y => floor x <= floor y

lemmas.name: floorE
lemmas.statement:
(n : int, x : real) :
  n%r <= x < (n + 1)%r => floor x = n

lemmas.name: ceilE
lemmas.statement:
(n : int, x : real) :
  (n - 1)%r < x <= n%r => ceil x = n

lemmas.name: intind
lemmas.statement:
(p:int -> bool):
  (p 0) =>
  (forall i, 0 <= i => p i => p (i + 1)) =>
  (forall i, 0 <= i => p i)

lemmas.statement: (y x : int): (x + y) - y = x by smt()

lemmas.name: natind
lemmas.statement:
(p : int -> bool):
     (forall n, n <= 0 => p n)
  => (forall n, 0 <= n => p n => p (n+1))
  => forall n, p n

lemmas.name: natcase
lemmas.statement:
(p : int -> bool):
     (forall n, n <= 0 => p n)
  => (forall n, 0 <= n => p (n+1))
  => forall n, p n

lemmas.name: ge0ind
lemmas.statement:
(p : int -> bool):
     (forall n, n < 0 => p n)
  => p 0
  => (forall n, 0 <= n => p n => p (n+1))
  => forall n, p n

lemmas.name: ge0case
lemmas.statement:
(p : int -> bool):
     (forall n, n < 0 => p n)
  => p 0
  => (forall n, 0 <= n => p (n+1))
  => forall n, p n

lemmas.name: intwlog
lemmas.statement:
(p:int -> bool):
  (forall i, p (-i) => p i) =>
  (p 0) =>
  (forall i, 0 <= i => p i => p (i + 1)) =>
  (forall i, p i)

lemmas.name: intswlog
lemmas.statement:
(p:int -> bool):
  ((forall i, 0 <= i => p i) => (forall i, i < 0 => p i)) =>
  (p 0) =>
  (forall i, 0 <= i => p i => p (i + 1)) =>
  (forall i, p i)

lemmas.name: sintind
lemmas.statement:
(p : int -> bool):
  (forall i, 0 <= i => (forall j, 0 <= j < i => p j) => p i) =>

lemmas.name: b2i0
lemmas.statement: : b2i false = 0. proof. by []. qed

lemmas.name: b2i1
lemmas.statement: : b2i true  = 1. proof. by []. qed

lemmas.name: b2i_or
lemmas.statement: b1 b2: b2i (b1 \/ b2) = b2i b1 + b2i b2 - b2i b1 * b2i b2

lemmas.name: b2i_and
lemmas.statement: b1 b2: b2i (b1 /\ b2) = b2i b1 * b2i b2

lemmas.name: b2i_ge0
lemmas.statement: b: 0 <= b2i b

lemmas.name: b2i_le1
lemmas.statement: b: b2i b <= 1

lemmas.name: b2i_eq1
lemmas.statement: b : b2i b = 1 <=> b

lemmas.name: iteri0
lemmas.statement:
['a] n opr (x : 'a):
    n <= 0 => iteri n opr x  = x

lemmas.name: iteriS
lemmas.statement:
['a] n opr (x : 'a):
    0 <= n => iteri (n+1) opr x = opr n (iteri n opr x)

lemmas.name: iteriS_rw
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (opr : int -> 'a -> 'a) (x : 'a) :
    0 < n => iteri n opr x = opr (n - 1) (iteri (n - 1) opr x)

lemmas.name: eq_iteri
lemmas.statement:
(f1 f2 : int -> 'a -> 'a) k a:
       (forall i a, 0 <= i < k => f1 i a = f2 i a)
    => iteri k f1 a = iteri k f2 a

lemmas.name: iter0
lemmas.statement: ['a] n opr (x : 'a): n <= 0 => iter n opr x = x

lemmas.name: iterS
lemmas.statement:
['a] n opr (x : 'a): 0 <= n =>
    iter (n+1) opr x = opr (iter n opr x)

lemmas.name: iter1
lemmas.statement: ['a] opr (x : 'a): iter 1 opr x = opr x

lemmas.name: iter2
lemmas.statement: ['a] opr (x : 'a): iter 2 opr x = opr (opr x)

lemmas.name: iterSr
lemmas.statement:
n opr (x : 'a):
    0 <= n => iter (n + 1) opr x = iter n opr (opr x)

lemmas.name: iterop0
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) opr (x z : 'a): n <= 0 =>
    iterop n opr x z = z

lemmas.name: iterop1
lemmas.statement: ['a] opr (x z : 'a): iterop 1 opr x z = x

lemmas.name: iteropS
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) opr (x z : 'a): 0 <= n =>
    iterop (n+1) opr x z = iter n (opr x) x

lemmas.name: odd0
lemmas.statement: : !odd 0. proof. by rewrite /odd iter0. qed

 p <= 0 => fold f a p = a

lemmas.name: argmin_out
lemmas.statement: (f : int -> 'a) p: (forall i, 0 <= i => !p (f i)) => argmin f p = 0

lemmas.name: argminP_r
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a) p i: 0 <= i => p (f i) =>
     0 <= argmin f p
  /\ p (f (argmin f p))
  /\ forall i, 0 <= i < (argmin f p) => !p (f i)

lemmas.name: argminP
lemmas.statement: (f : int -> 'a) p i: 0 <= i => p (f i) => p (f (argmin f p))

lemmas.name: ge0_argmin
lemmas.statement: (f : int -> 'a) p: 0 <= argmin f p

lemmas.name: argmin_min
lemmas.statement: (f : int -> 'a) p: forall j, 0 <= j < argmin f p => !p (f j)

lemmas.name: argmin_eq
lemmas.statement:
['a] f p i :
  0 <= i => p (f i) => (forall j, 0 <= j < i => !p (f j)) => argmin<:'a> f p = i

lemmas.name: le_argmin
lemmas.statement:
['a] f p i :
  0 <= i =>
  ((exists j, (0 <= j) /\ (p (f j))) => (exists j, (0 <= j <= i) /\ (p (f j)))) <=>
  (argmin<:'a> f p <= i)

lemmas.name: ge_argmin
lemmas.statement:
['a] f p i :
  0 < i =>
  ((exists j, (0 <= j) /\ (p (f j))) /\ (forall j, (0 <= j < i) => !(p (f j)))) <=>
  (i <= argmin<:'a> f p)

lemmas.name: argmin_le
lemmas.statement:
['a] f p q :
  (exists j, (0 <= j) /\ (p (f j))) =>
  (forall j, 0 <= j => p (f j) => q (f j)) =>
  argmin<:'a> f q <= argmin<:'a> f p

lemmas.name: argmax_out
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a) p:
(forall i, 0 <= i => !p (f i)) \/
(forall i, 0 <= i => exists j, i <= j /\ p (f j)) =>
argmax f p = 0

lemmas.name: argmaxP_r
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a) p i j:
  0 <= i =>
  0 <= j =>
  p (f i) =>
  (forall k, j <= k => !(p (f k))) =>
     0 <= argmax f p
  /\ p (f (argmax f p))
  /\ forall i, (argmax f p) < i => !p (f i)

lemmas.name: argmaxP
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a) p i j:
  0 <= i =>
  0 <= j =>
  p (f i) =>
  (forall k, j <= k => !(p (f k))) =>
  p (f (argmax f p))

lemmas.name: ge0_argmax
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a) p:
  0 <= argmax f p

lemmas.name: argmax_max
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a) p j:
  0 <= j =>
  (forall k, j <= k => !(p (f k))) =>
  forall j, argmax f p < j => !p (f j)

lemmas.name: argmax_eq
lemmas.statement:
['a] f p i :
  0 <= i => p (f i) => (forall j, i < j => !p (f j)) => argmax<:'a> f p = i

lemmas.name: le_argmax
lemmas.statement:
['a] f p i :
  0 <= i =>
  ((exists j, (0 <= j) /\ (forall k, (j <= k) => !(p (f k)))) => (forall j, i < j => !(p (f j)))) <=>
  (argmax<:'a> f p <= i)

lemmas.name: ge_argmax
lemmas.statement:
['a] f p i :
  0 < i =>
  ((exists j, (0 <= j) /\ (forall k, (j <= k) => !(p (f k)))) /\ (exists j, (i <= j) /\ (p (f j)))) <=>
  (i <= argmax<:'a> f p)

lemmas.name: argmax_le
lemmas.statement:
['a] f p q :
  (exists j, (0 <= j) /\ (forall k, (j <= k) => !(q (f k)))) =>
  (forall j, 0 <= j => p (f j) => q (f j)) =>
  argmax<:'a> f p <= argmax<:'a> f q

lemmas.name: pmin_spec

lemmas.name: pmin_min

lemmas.name: pmin_eq

lemmas.name: pmin_max
lemmas.statement: E i : ! sempty (pcap E) => 0 <= i => (forall j , 0 <= j < i => ! E j) => i <= pmin E

lemmas.name: fminP
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : 'a -> int) (p : 'a -> bool) :
  (exists x, 0 <= f x /\ p x) =>
    0 <= f (fmin f p) /\ p (fmin f p) /\
      forall y, 0 <= f y => p y => f (fmin f p) <= f y

lemmas.name: size_ge0

last_nth

lemmas.name: in_nil

lemmas.name: count_ge0
lemmas.statement: (p : 'a -> bool) s: 0 <= count p s

lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): count p s <= size s

lemmas.statement: ['a] x (s : 'a list) : (x \in s) <=> (0 < count (pred1 x) s)

lemmas.statement:
['a] (p1 p2 : 'a -> bool) (s : 'a list) :

lemmas.name: countU

lemmas.name: hasPn

lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): all predT s

lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): all (predC p) s = ! has p s

lemmas.statement: p1 p2 (s : 'a list): all (predI p1 p2) s = (all p1 s /\ all p2 s)

lemmas.name: eq_filter_in

lemmas.statement:
p1 p2 (s : 'a list):
  (forall x, x \in s => p1 x <=> p2 x) => count p1 s = count p2 s

lemmas.name: eq_count
lemmas.statement:
p1 p2 (s : 'a list):
  (forall x, p1 x <=> p2 x) => count p1 s = count p2 s

lemmas.statement:
p (s : 'a list) :

p (s : 'a list):

p (s : 'a list):

lemmas.name: eq_has_in
lemmas.statement:
p1 p2 (s : 'a list):

p1 p2 (s : 'a list):

lemmas.name: eq_all
lemmas.statement:
p1 p2 (s : 'a list):
  (forall x, p1 x <=> p2 x) => all p1 s <=> all p2 s

lemmas.name: has_sym
lemmas.statement: (s1 s2 : 'a list): has (mem s1) s2 <=> has (mem s2) s1

lemmas.name: has_pred1
lemmas.statement: (z : 'a) s: has (pred1 z) s <=> mem s z

lemmas.name: filter_all
lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): all p (filter p s)

lemmas.name: all_filterP
lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): all p s <=> filter p s = s

lemmas.name: filter_id
lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): filter p (filter p s) = filter p s

lemmas.name: filter_cat
lemmas.statement: p (s1 s2 : 'a list): filter p (s1 ++ s2) = filter p s1 ++ filter p s2

lemmas.name: filter_cons
lemmas.statement:
p x (s : 'a list):
  filter p (x :: s) = if p x then x :: filter p s else filter p s

lemmas.name: filter_rcons
lemmas.statement:
p x (s : 'a list):
  filter p (rcons s x) = if p x then rcons (filter p s) x else filter p s

lemmas.name: count_cat
lemmas.statement: p (s1 s2 : 'a list): count p (s1 ++ s2) = count p s1 + count p s2

lemmas.name: has_cat
lemmas.statement: p (s1 s2 : 'a list): has p (s1 ++ s2) <=> has p s1 \/ has p s2

lemmas.name: all_cat
lemmas.statement: p (s1 s2 : 'a list): all p (s1 ++ s2) <=> all p s1 /\ all p s2

lemmas.name: mem_filter
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) x s:

lemmas.name: find_eq_in
lemmas.statement:
(q p : 'a -> bool) (xs : 'a list) :
  (forall x, x \in xs => p x <=> q x)
  => find p xs = find q xs

lemmas.name: find_ge0
lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): 0 <= find p s

lemmas.name: has_find
lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): has p s <=> (find p s < size s)

lemmas.name: find_size
lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): find p s <= size s

lemmas.name: find_cat
lemmas.statement:
p (s1 s2 : 'a list):

lemmas.name: nth_find
lemmas.statement: z0 p (s : 'a list): has p s => p (nth z0 s (find p s))

lemmas.name: before_find
lemmas.statement:
(x0 : 'a) p s i :
  0 <= i < find p s => ! p (nth x0 s i)

lemmas.name: filter_pred1
lemmas.statement:
x (s : 'a list) :
  filter (pred1 x) s = nseq (count (pred1 x) s) x

lemmas.name: count_nseq
lemmas.statement: (x: 'a) n p: count p (nseq n x) = if p x then max 0 n else 0

lemmas.name: has_nseq
lemmas.statement: a n (x : 'a) : has a (nseq n x) <=> (0 < n) /\ a x

lemmas.name: all_nseq
lemmas.statement: a n (x : 'a) : all a (nseq n x) <=> n <= 0 \/ a x

lemmas.name: mem_nseq
lemmas.statement: n (x y: 'a): mem (nseq n x) y = (0 < n /\ x = y)

lemmas.name: all_pred1P
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) s :
  (s = nseq (size s) x) <=> (all (pred1 x) s)

lemmas.name: all_nthP
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) s x0 :
      (forall i, 0 <= i < size s => p (nth x0 s i))
  <=> (all p s)

lemmas.name: has_nthP
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) s x0 :
      (exists i, 0 <= i < size s /\ p (nth x0 s i))
  <=> (has p s)

lemmas.name: index_cons
lemmas.statement:
x y (s : 'a list):
  index x (y :: s) = if x = y then 0 else index x s + 1

lemmas.name: index_ge0
lemmas.statement: x (s : 'a list): 0 <= index x s

lemmas.name: index_size
lemmas.statement: x (s : 'a list): index x s <= size s

lemmas.name: index_mem
lemmas.statement: x (s : 'a list): (index x s < size s) = (mem s x)

lemmas.name: nth_index
lemmas.statement: z0 x (s : 'a list): mem s x => nth z0 s (index x s) = x

lemmas.name: onth_index
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x : 'a) xs:
  x \in xs => onth xs (index x xs) = Some x

lemmas.name: onth_mem
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x : 'a) xs:
  x \in xs => exists n, onth xs n = Some x

lemmas.name: index_cat
lemmas.statement:
x (s1 s2 : 'a list):
 index x (s1 ++ s2) = if mem s1 x then index x s1 else size s1 + index x s2

lemmas.name: index_head
lemmas.statement: x (s : 'a list): index x (x :: s) = 0

lemmas.name: before_index
lemmas.statement:
(x0 : 'a) x s i :
  0 <= i < index x s => nth x0 s i <> x

lemmas.name: index_nth
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x0 : 'a) s i : 0 <= i < size s =>

lemmas.name: drop0
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): drop 0 s = s

lemmas.name: drop_le0
lemmas.statement: n (s : 'a list): n <= 0 => drop n s = s

lemmas.name: drop_oversize
lemmas.statement:
n (s : 'a list):
  size s <= n => drop n s = []

lemmas.name: drop_size
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): drop (size s) s = []

lemmas.name: drop_cons
lemmas.statement:
n x (s : 'a list):
  drop n (x :: s) = if 0 < n then drop (n-1) s else x :: s

lemmas.name: size_drop
lemmas.statement:
n (s : 'a list):

lemmas.name: drop_cat
lemmas.statement:
n (s1 s2 : 'a list):

    if n < size s1 then drop n s1 ++ s2 else drop (n - size s1) s2

lemmas.name: drop_cat_le
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (s1 s2 : 'a list) :

lemmas.name: drop_catl
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) (i : int) :

lemmas.name: drop_catr
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) (i : int) :
  size s1 <= i => drop i (s1 ++ s2) = drop (i - size s1) s2

lemmas.name: drop_size_cat
lemmas.statement:
n (s1 s2 : 'a list):
  size s1 = n => drop n (s1 ++ s2) = s2

lemmas.name: drop_nth
lemmas.statement:
(z0 : 'a) n s: 0 <= n < size s =>
  drop n s = nth z0 s n :: drop (n+1) s

lemmas.name: drop_drop
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (i j : int) : 0 <= i => 0 <= j =>
  drop i (drop j s) = drop (i + j) s

lemmas.name: behead_drop
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (n : int) :

lemmas.name: take0
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): take 0 s = []

lemmas.name: take_le0
lemmas.statement: n (s : 'a list): n <= 0 => take n s = []

lemmas.name: take_oversize
lemmas.statement:
n (s : 'a list):
  size s <= n => take n s = s

lemmas.name: take_size
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): take (size s) s = s

lemmas.name: take_cons
lemmas.statement:
n x (s : 'a list):
  take n (x :: s) = if 0 < n then x :: take (n-1) s else []

lemmas.name: size_take
lemmas.statement:
n (s : 'a list):
  0 <= n => size (take n s) = if n < size s then n else size s

lemmas.name: size_take_condle
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (s : 'a list) :
  0 <= n => size (take n s) = if n <= size s then n else size s

lemmas.name: size_takel
lemmas.statement:
n (s : 'a list ):
  0 <= n <= size s => size (take n s) = n

lemmas.name: size_take_le
lemmas.statement: n (s : 'a list) : 0 <= n => size (take n s) <= n

lemmas.name: take_cat
lemmas.statement:
n (s1 s2 : 'a list):
   take n (s1 ++ s2) =
     if n < size s1 then take n s1 else s1 ++ take (n - size s1) s2

lemmas.name: take_cat_le
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  take n (s1 ++ s2) =
    if n <= size s1 then take n s1 else s1 ++ take (n - size s1) s2

lemmas.name: take_catl
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) (i : int) :
  i <= size s1 => take i (s1 ++ s2) = take i s1

lemmas.name: take_catr
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) (i : int) :
  size s1 <= i => take i (s1 ++ s2) = s1 ++ take (i - size s1) s2

lemmas.name: take_size_cat
lemmas.statement:
n (s1 s2 : 'a list):
  size s1 = n => take n (s1 ++ s2) = s1

lemmas.name: take_nth
lemmas.statement:
(z0 : 'a) n s: 0 <= n < size s =>
  take (n+1) s = rcons (take n s) (nth z0 s n)

lemmas.name: cat_take_drop
lemmas.statement: n (s : 'a list): take n s ++ drop n s = s

lemmas.name: takeD
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a list) (i j : int) :
  0 <= i => 0 <= j => take (i + j) s = take i s ++ take j (drop i s)

lemmas.name: size_eqD
lemmas.statement:
['a] (m n : int) (s : 'a list) :
  0 <= m => 0 <= n => size s = m + n =>
    exists s1 s2, (size s1 = m /\ size s2 = n) /\ s = s1 ++ s2

lemmas.name: drop_take
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a list) (i j : int) :
  0 <= i => 0 <= j => drop i (take j s) = take (j-i) (drop i s)

lemmas.name: mem_drop
lemmas.statement: n (s:'a list) x: mem (drop n s) x => mem s x

lemmas.name: mem_take
lemmas.statement: n (s:'a list) x: mem (take n s) x => mem s x

lemmas.name: nth_drop
lemmas.statement:
(x0 : 'a) n s i:
  0 <= n => 0 <= i => nth x0 (drop n s) i = nth x0 s (n + i)

lemmas.name: head_drop
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x0 : 'a) (n : int) (l : 'a list) :
  0 <= n => nth x0 l n = head x0 (drop n l)

lemmas.name: nth_take
lemmas.statement:
(x0 : 'a) n s i:
  0 <= n => i < n => nth x0 (take n s) i = nth x0 s i

lemmas.name: take_take
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (i j : int) :

lemmas.statement:
['a] (x0 : 'a) (s : 'a list) (i : int) :

lemmas.name: rot0

lemmas.statement: n (s : 'a list): n <= 0 => rot n s = s

lemmas.statement: n (s : 'a list): size (rot n s) = size s

lemmas.name: rot_oversize
lemmas.statement: n (s : 'a list): size s <= n => rot n s = s

lemmas.name: rot_size
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): rot (size s) s = s

lemmas.name: has_rot
lemmas.statement: n (s : 'a list) p: has p (rot n s) = has p s

lemmas.name: rot_size_cat
lemmas.statement: (s1 s2 : 'a list): rot (size s1) (s1 ++ s2) = s2 ++ s1

lemmas.name: mem_rot
lemmas.statement: n (s : 'a list): forall x, mem (rot n s) x <=> mem s x

lemmas.name: rotK
lemmas.statement: n: cancel<:'a list, 'a list> (rot n) (rotr n)

lemmas.name: rot_inj
lemmas.statement: n (s1 s2 : 'a list): rot n s1 = rot n s2 => s1 = s2

lemmas.name: rot1_cons
lemmas.statement: x (s : 'a list): rot 1 (x :: s) = rcons s x

lemmas.name: perm_eqP

lemmas.name: perm_eq_trans

lemmas.name: perm_eqlP

(s1 s2 : 'a list):

(s1 s2 : 'a list):

['a]:

lemmas.statement: (s1 s2 : 'a list): perm_eq (s1 ++ s2) (s2 ++ s1)

lemmas.name: perm_catCl
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):

lemmas.name: perm_cat2l

(s1 s2 s3 : 'a list):

lemmas.name: perm_cat2r
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 s3 : 'a list):
  perm_eq (s2 ++ s1) (s3 ++ s1) <=> perm_eq s2 s3

lemmas.name: perm_catCAl
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 s3 : 'a list):

lemmas.name: perm_catAC
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 s3 : 'a list):

lemmas.name: perm_catCA
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 s3 : 'a list):
  forall s, perm_eq (s1 ++ s2 ++ s3) s <=> perm_eq (s2 ++ s1 ++ s3) s

lemmas.name: perm_consCA
lemmas.statement:
(x y : 'a) s:

lemmas.name: perm_eq_mem

(s1 s2 : 'a list):

lemmas.name: rem_id
lemmas.statement: (z : 'a) s: ! mem s z => rem z s = s

lemmas.name: perm_to_rem
lemmas.statement: (z : 'a) s : mem s z => perm_eq s (z :: rem z s)

lemmas.name: size_rem
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a) s: mem s x => size (rem x s) = (size s) - 1

lemmas.name: mem_rem
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) (s : 'a list):

lemmas.name: all_rem
lemmas.statement: p (x : 'a) (s : 'a list): all p s => all p (rem x s)

lemmas.name: count_remP
lemmas.statement:
['a] (p : 'a -> bool) (s : 'a list) x :
  count p (rem x s) = count p s - b2i (p x /\ x \in s)

lemmas.name: count_rem
lemmas.statement:
['a] (p : 'a -> bool) (s : 'a list) x : x \in s =>
  count p s = b2i (p x) + count p (rem x s)

lemmas.name: count_gt0
lemmas.statement:
['a] (p : 'a -> bool) s :
  0 < count p s => exists x,
    perm_eq s (x :: rem x s) /\ p x /\ count p (rem x s) = count p s - 1

lemmas.name: count_eq1
lemmas.statement:
['a] (p : 'a -> bool) s :
  count p s = 1 => exists x,
    x \in s /\ p x /\ forall y, y \in s => y <> x => !p y

lemmas.name: mem_rem_neq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x : 'a) (s : 'a list) y :

lemmas.name: remC

lemmas.name: perm_eqP_pred1
lemmas.statement: ['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) : perm_eq s1 s2 <=> forall (x : 'a), count (pred1 x) s1 = count (pred1 x) s2

lemmas.name: size_insert
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x : 'a) (s : 'a list) (n : int) :
  0 <= n <= size s => size (insert x s n) = size s + 1

lemmas.name: nth_insert
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x0 x : 'a) (s : 'a list) (n : int) :

lemmas.name: mem_insert
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x : 'a) (s : 'a list) (n : int) (y : 'a) :

lemmas.name: insert_cat
insert0
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x : 'a) (s : 'a list) : insert x s 0 = x :: s

lemmas.name: insert_nth_take_drop
lemmas.statement:

lemmas.name: take_insert_le
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x : 'a) (s : 'a list) (i j : int) :

lemmas.name: drop_insert_gt
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x : 'a) (s : 'a list) (i j : int) :

lemmas.name: trim_neg
lemmas.statement: (xs : 'a list) (n : int): n < 0 => trim xs n = xs

lemmas.name: size_trim
lemmas.statement:

lemmas.name: trim_head
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) (xs : 'a list):

lemmas.name: trim_tail
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) (xs : 'a list) (n : int): 0 <= n =>
  trim (x :: xs) (n+1) = x :: trim xs n

lemmas.name: trim_cat
lemmas.statement:
(xs ys : 'a list) (n : int): n < size (xs ++ ys) =>
  trim (xs ++ ys) n =
    if   n < size xs
    then (trim xs n) ++ ys
    else xs ++ trim ys (n - size xs)

lemmas.name: catrev_catl

lemmas.name: catrev_catr

lemmas.name: catrevE

lemmas.name: rev_cons
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a) s: rev (x :: s) = rcons (rev s) x

lemmas.name: rev1
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a): rev [x] = [x]

lemmas.name: size_rev
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): size (rev s) = size s

lemmas.name: rev_cat
lemmas.statement: (s t : 'a list): rev (s ++ t) = rev t ++ rev s

lemmas.name: rev_rcons

lemmas.name: last_rev
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x0 : 'a) (s : 'a list) :

lemmas.name: revK

lemmas.name: rev_inj
lemmas.statement: : injective rev<:'a>

lemmas.name: catsI
lemmas.statement: (s t1 t2 : 'a list): s ++ t1 = s ++ t2 => t1 = t2

lemmas.name: catIs
lemmas.statement: (s1 s2 t : 'a list): s1 ++ t = s2 ++ t => s1 = s2

lemmas.name: rconsIs

['a] xs xs' (x x' : 'a):

lemmas.name: rconssI
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x x' : 'a) xs xs':

lemmas.name: mem_rev
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list):
