lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): filter p (rev s) = rev (filter p s)

lemmas.name: count_rev
lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): count p (rev s) = count p s

lemmas.name: has_rev
lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): has p (rev s) = has p s

lemmas.name: all_rev
lemmas.statement: p (s : 'a list): all p (rev s) = all p s

lemmas.name: rev_nseq
lemmas.statement: n (x : 'a): rev (nseq n x) = nseq n x

lemmas.name: nth_rev
lemmas.statement:
(x0 : 'a) n s :
  0 <= n < size s => nth x0 (rev s) n = nth x0 s (size s - (n+1))

lemmas.name: perm_eq_rev
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : perm_eq s (rev s)

lemmas.name: rev_drop
lemmas.statement:
['a] n (s : 'a list) :
  0 <= n <= size s =>
  rev (drop n s) = take (size s - n) (rev s)

lemmas.name: rev_take
lemmas.statement:
['a] n (s : 'a list) :
  0 <= n <= size s =>
  rev (take n s) = drop (size s - n) (rev s)

lemmas.name: cons_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) s:
  uniq (x :: s) <=> (!mem s x) /\ uniq s

lemmas.name: cat_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
  uniq (s1 ++ s2) <=> uniq s1 /\ ! has (mem s1) s2 /\ uniq s2

lemmas.name: uniq_catC
lemmas.statement: (s1 s2 : 'a list): uniq (s1 ++ s2) = uniq (s2 ++ s1)

lemmas.name: uniq_catCA
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 s3 : 'a list):
  uniq (s1 ++ s2 ++ s3) <=> uniq (s2 ++ s1 ++ s3)

lemmas.name: rcons_uniq
lemmas.statement: s (x : 'a): uniq (rcons s x) <=> (!mem s x) /\ uniq s

lemmas.name: filter_uniq
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) p: uniq s => uniq (filter p s)

lemmas.name: rot_uniq
lemmas.statement: n (s : 'a list): uniq (rot n s) = uniq s

lemmas.name: rev_uniq
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): uniq (rev s) <=> uniq s

lemmas.name: rem_filter
lemmas.statement:
x (s : 'a list): uniq s =>
  rem x s = filter (predC1 x) s

lemmas.name: index_uniq
lemmas.statement:
z0 i (s : 'a list):
  0 <= i < size s => uniq s => index (nth z0 s i) s = i

lemmas.name: nth_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) :
  (forall (i j : int), 0 <= i < size s => 0 <= j < size s => i <> j =>
    nth witness s i <> nth witness s j) =>
  uniq s

lemmas.name: rem_uniq
lemmas.statement: x s: uniq<:'a> s => uniq (rem x s)

lemmas.name: uniq_drop
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (n : int) :
  uniq s => uniq (drop n s)

lemmas.name: size_undup
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): size (undup s) <= size s

lemmas.name: mem_undup
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): forall x, mem (undup s) x = mem s x

lemmas.name: undup_uniq
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): uniq (undup s)

lemmas.name: undup_id
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): uniq s => undup s = s

lemmas.name: count_uniq_mem
lemmas.statement:
s (x : 'a):
  uniq s => count (pred1 x) s = b2i (mem s x)

lemmas.name: count_mem_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) :
  (forall x, count (pred1 x) s = b2i (mem s x)) => uniq s

lemmas.name: uniq_leq_size
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
  uniq s1 => (mem s1 <= mem s2) => size s1 <= size s2

lemmas.name: uniq_le_perm_eq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  uniq s1 => mem s1 <= mem s2 => size s2 <= size s1 => perm_eq s1 s2

lemmas.name: uniq_eq_perm_eq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  uniq s1 => mem s1 = mem s2 => size s2 = size s1 => perm_eq s1 s2

lemmas.name: perm_eq_uniq_impl
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  perm_eq s1 s2 => uniq s1 => uniq s2

lemmas.name: perm_eq_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  perm_eq s1 s2 => uniq s1 <=> uniq s2

lemmas.name: leq_size_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
  uniq s1 => (mem s1 <= mem s2) => size s2 <= size s1 => uniq s2

lemmas.name: uniq_size_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
     uniq s1 => (forall x, mem s1 x <=> mem s2 x)
  => uniq s2 <=> (size s2 = size s1)

lemmas.name: leq_size_perm
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
     uniq s1 => (mem s1 <= mem s2) => size s2 <= size s1
  => (forall x, mem s1 x <=> mem s2 x) /\ (size s1 = size s2)

lemmas.name: perm_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
     (forall x, mem s1 x <=> mem s2 x) => size s1 = size s2
  => uniq s1 <=> uniq s2

lemmas.name: uniq_perm_eq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
  uniq s1 => uniq s2 => (forall x, mem s1 x <=> mem s2 x) => perm_eq s1 s2

lemmas.name: uniq_perm_eq_size
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
     uniq s1
  => uniq s2
  => size s1 = size s2
  => (mem s1 <= mem s2)
  => perm_eq s1 s2

lemmas.name: perm_eq_undup
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
  perm_eq s1 s2 => perm_eq (undup s1) (undup s2)

lemmas.name: filter_swap
lemmas.statement:
['a] (xs ys : 'a list) :
  uniq xs => uniq ys =>
    perm_eq (filter (mem xs) ys) (filter (mem ys) xs)

lemmas.name: count_swap
lemmas.statement:
['a] (xs ys : 'a list) :
  uniq xs => uniq ys =>
    count (mem xs) ys = count (mem ys) xs

lemmas.name: undup_nilp
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : (undup s = []) <=> (s = [])

lemmas.name: map1
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f: 'a -> 'b) (x : 'a) :
  map f [x] = [f x]

lemmas.name: eq_map
lemmas.statement:
(f1 f2 : 'a -> 'b):
     (forall x, f1 x = f2 x)
  => forall s, map f1 s = map f2 s

lemmas.name: map_f
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b) s x: mem s x => mem (map f s) (f x)

lemmas.name: mapP
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) s y:
  mem (map f s) y <=> (exists x, mem s x /\ y = f x)

lemmas.name: mem_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) : injective f =>
  forall s x, (mem (map f s) (f x)) <=> (mem s x)

lemmas.name: uniq_map
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list):
  uniq (map f s) => uniq s

lemmas.name: map_cons
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b) x s: map f (x :: s) = f x :: map f s

lemmas.name: map_cat
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) s1 s2:
  map f (s1 ++ s2) = map f s1 ++ map f s2

lemmas.name: size_map
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b) s: size (map f s) = size s

lemmas.name: map_comp
lemmas.statement:
(f1 : 'b -> 'c) (f2 : 'a -> 'b) s:
  map (f1 \o f2) s = map f1 (map f2 s)

lemmas.name: map_id
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): map idfun s = s

lemmas.name: id_map
lemmas.statement: f (s : 'a list): (forall x, f x = x) => map f s = s

lemmas.name: nth_map
lemmas.statement:
x1 x2 (f : 'a -> 'b) n s:
  0 <= n < size s => nth x2 (map f s) n = f (nth x1 s n)

lemmas.name: onth_nth_map
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) n: onth s n = nth None (map Some s) n

lemmas.name: map_rcons
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) s x:
  map f (rcons s x) = rcons (map f s) (f x)

lemmas.name: last_map
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) s x:
  last (f x) (map f s) = f (last x s)

lemmas.name: filter_map
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) p s:
  filter p (map f s) = map f (filter (preim f p) s)

lemmas.name: has_map
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) p s:
  has p (map f s) = has (preim f p) s

lemmas.name: has_filter
lemmas.statement:
['a] (p q: 'a -> bool) s:
  has p (filter q s) = has (predI p q) s

lemmas.name: all_map
lemmas.statement:
(f :  'a -> 'b) p s:
  all p (map f s) = all (preim f p) s

lemmas.name: count_map
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) p s:
  count p (map f s) = count (preim f p) s

lemmas.name: map_take
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) n s:
  map f (take n s) = take n (map f s)

lemmas.name: map_drop
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) n s:
  map f (drop n s) = drop n (map f s)

lemmas.name: map_rev
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) s:
  map f (rev s) = rev (map f s)

lemmas.name: in_undup_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list) :
     (forall x y, x \in s => y \in s => f x = f y => x = y)
  => undup (map f s) = map f (undup s)

lemmas.name: undup_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) s : injective f =>
  undup (map f s) = map f (undup s)

lemmas.name: perm_eq_map
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (s1 s2 : 'a list):
  perm_eq s1 s2 => perm_eq (map f s1) (map f s2)

lemmas.name: map_inj_in_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) s:
     (forall x y, mem s x => mem s y => f x = f y => x = y)
  => uniq (map f s) <=> uniq s

lemmas.name: map_uniq_inj_in
lemmas.statement:
['b, 'a] (f : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list) :
     uniq (map f s)
  => forall x y, mem s x => mem s y => f x = f y => x = y

lemmas.name: mem_map_fst
lemmas.statement:
(xs : ('a * 'b) list) (x : 'a):
  mem (map fst xs) x <=> (exists y, mem xs (x,y))

lemmas.name: mem_map_snd
lemmas.statement:
(xs : ('a * 'b) list) (y : 'b):
  mem (map snd xs) y <=> (exists x, mem xs (x,y))

lemmas.name: nth_index_map
lemmas.statement:
(z0 : 'a) (f : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list) x:
     (forall x y, mem s x => mem s y => f x = f y => x = y)
  => mem s x => nth z0 s (index (f x) (map f s)) = x

lemmas.name: in_inj_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) p :
     (forall x y, p x => p y => f x = f y => x = y)
  => forall s1 s2, all p s1 => all p s2 => map f s1 = map f s2 => s1 = s2

lemmas.name: inj_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) :
  injective f => injective (map f)

lemmas.name: onth_map_some
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a->'b) (xs : 'a list) n v:
 onth (map f xs) n = Some v <=> exists y, onth xs n = Some y /\ v = f y

lemmas.name: index_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) x xs:
 injective f => index (f x) (map f xs) = index x xs

lemmas.name: map_pK
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b option) g :
  pcancel g f => cancel (map g) (pmap f)

lemmas.name: pmap_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b option) s:
  pmap f s = map oget (filter (predC1 None) (map f s))

lemmas.name: pmap_cat
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b option) s1 s2:
  pmap f (s1 ++ s2) = pmap f s1 ++ pmap f s2

lemmas.name: pmap_none
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] s : pmap (fun (i : 'a) => None<:'b>) s = []

lemmas.name: pmap_some
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) s:
  pmap (fun x => Some (f x)) s = map f s

lemmas.name: pmap_inj_in_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b option) (s : 'a list) :
      (forall (x y : 'a) v, x \in s => y \in s =>
         f x = Some v => f y = Some v => x = y)
   => uniq s => uniq (pmap f s)

lemmas.name: pmapP
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b option) s y :
  y \in pmap f s <=> exists (x : 'a), (x \in s) /\ Some y = f x

lemmas.name: mapiK
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a -> 'b) (g : int -> 'b -> 'a) :
    (forall i, cancel (g i) (f i)) => cancel (mapi g) (mapi f)

lemmas.name: in_mapiK
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a -> 'b) (g : int -> 'b -> 'a) (xs : 'a list) :
    (forall i x, x \in xs => 0 <= i && i < size xs => g i (f i x) = x) =>
    mapi g (mapi f xs) = xs

lemmas.name: size_mapi
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a -> 'b) (xs : 'a list) :
    size (mapi f xs) = size xs

lemmas.name: nth_mapi_rec
lemmas.statement:
x1 (s : 'a list) x2 (f : int -> 'a -> 'b) n m :
    0 <= n && n < size s =>
    nth x2 (mapi_rec f s m) n = f (m + n) (nth x1 s n)

lemmas.name: nth_mapi
lemmas.statement:
x1 (s : 'a list) x2 (f : int -> 'a -> 'b) n :
    0 <= n && n < size s => nth x2 (mapi f s) n = f n (nth x1 s n)

lemmas.name: mapi_recP
lemmas.statement:
x0 (f : int -> 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list) y m :
    y \in mapi_rec f s m <=>
    exists n, (0 <= n && n < size s) /\ y = f (n+m) (nth x0 s n)

lemmas.name: mapiP
lemmas.statement:
x0 (f : int -> 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list) y :
    y \in mapi f s <=>
    exists n, (0 <= n && n < size s) /\ y = f n (nth x0 s n)

lemmas.name: put_empty
lemmas.statement:
(n : int) (x : 'a) :
  put [] n x = []

lemmas.name: size_put
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (n : int) (x : 'a) :
  size (put s n x) = size s

lemmas.name: put_in
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (n : int) (x : 'a) :
  0 <= n < size s => put s n x = take n s ++ (x :: drop (n + 1) s)

lemmas.name: put_out
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (n : int) (x : 'a) :
  !(0 <= n < size s) => put s n x = s

lemmas.name: put_cons0
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (x y : 'a) :
  put (y :: s) 0 x = x :: s

lemmas.name: put_consS
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (n : int) (x y : 'a) :
  n <> 0 => put (y :: s) n x = y :: (put s (n - 1) x)

lemmas.name: put_cat
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list) (n : int) (x : 'a) :
  put (s1 ++ s2) n x =
    if n < size s1 then put s1 n x ++ s2 else s1 ++ put s2 (n - size s1) x

lemmas.name: put_rcons
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (n : int) (x y : 'a) :
  put (rcons s x) n y =
    if   n = size s
    then rcons s y
    else rcons (put s n y) x

lemmas.name: put_rcons_size
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (x y : 'a) :
  put (rcons s y) (size s) x = rcons s x

lemmas.name: put_rcons_in
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (n : int) (x y : 'a) :
  n <> size s => put (rcons s y) n x = rcons (put s n x) y

lemmas.name: nth_put
lemmas.statement:
(x0 : 'a) (s : 'a list) (n i : int) (x : 'a) :
  0 <= n < size s => nth x0 (put s n x) i = if n = i then x else nth x0 s i

lemmas.name: put_nth
lemmas.statement:
(x0 : 'a) (s1 s2 : 'a list) (n1 n2 : int) (x : 'a) :
  nth x0 s1 n1 = nth x0 s2 n2 => put s1 n1 (nth x0 s2 n2) = s1

lemmas.name: eq_from_put
lemmas.statement:
(x0 : 'a) (s1 s2 : 'a list) (n : int) :
     size s1 = size s2
  => (forall (i : int), i <> n => nth x0 s1 i = nth x0 s2 i)
  => s1 = put s2 n (nth x0 s1 n)

lemmas.name: mem_put
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (n : int) (x : 'a) :
  0 <= n < size s => x \in put s n x

lemmas.name: map_put
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list) (n : int) (x : 'a) :
  map f (put s n x) = put (map f s) n (f x)

lemmas.name: drop_put
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (i j : int) (x : 'a) : 0 <= i <= j =>
  drop i (put s j x) = put (drop i s) (j - i) x

lemmas.name: drop_put_out
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (i j : int) (x : 'a) :
  j < i => drop i (put s j x) = drop i s

lemmas.name: take_put
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (i j : int) (x : 'a) :
  take i (put s j x) = if i <= j then take i s else put (take i s) j x

lemmas.name: iota0
lemmas.statement: i n : n <= 0 => iota_ i n = []

lemmas.name: iotaS
lemmas.statement: i n : 0 <= n => iota_ i (n+1) = i :: iota_ (i+1) n

lemmas.name: iota1
lemmas.statement: i : iota_ i 1 = [i]

lemmas.name: size_iota
lemmas.statement: m n: size (iota_ m n) = max 0 n

lemmas.name: iota_add
lemmas.statement:
m n1 n2 : 0 <= n1 => 0 <= n2 =>
     iota_ m (n1 + n2) = iota_ m n1 ++ iota_ (m + n1) n2

lemmas.name: iotaSr
lemmas.statement:
i n : 0 <= n =>
    iota_ i (n+1) = rcons (iota_ i n) (i+n)

lemmas.name: nth_iota
lemmas.statement: m n i w: 0 <= i < n => nth w (iota_ m n) i = m + i

lemmas.name: iota_addl
lemmas.statement: (m1 m2:int) n: iota_ (m1 + m2) n = map ((+) m1) (iota_ m2 n)

lemmas.name: mem_iota
lemmas.statement: m n i : mem (iota_ m n) i <=> (m <= i /\ i < m + n)

lemmas.name: mema_iota
lemmas.statement: m n i : mem (iota_ m n) i <=> (m <= i < m + n)

lemmas.name: iota_uniq
lemmas.statement: m n : uniq (iota_ m n)

lemmas.name: last_iota
lemmas.statement:
k m n:
    last k (Iota.iota_ m n) = if n <= 0 then k else m + n - 1

lemmas.name: take_iota
lemmas.statement:
(k n m : int):
    take k (iota_ n m) = iota_ n (min m k)

lemmas.name: drop_iota
lemmas.statement:
(k n m : int): 0 <= k =>
    drop k (iota_ n m) = iota_ (n+k) (m-k)

lemmas.name: onth_iota_some
lemmas.statement:
start sz n x:
    onth (iota_ start sz) n = Some x <=> 0 <= n < sz /\ x = start + n

lemmas.name: range_geq
lemmas.statement: (m n : int): n <= m => range m n = []

lemmas.name: range_ltn
lemmas.statement:
(m n : int): m < n =>
    range m n = m :: range (m+1) n

lemmas.name: rangeS
lemmas.statement: (m : int): range m (m+1) = [m]

lemmas.name: range_add
lemmas.statement:
(m n a : int):
    range (m+a) (n+a) = map (Int.(+) a) (range m n)

lemmas.name: range_addl
lemmas.statement:
(m n a : int):
    range (m+a) n = map (Int.(+) a) (range m (n-a))

lemmas.name: range_addr
lemmas.statement:
(m n a : int):
    range m (n+a) = map (Int.(+) a) (range (m-a) n)

lemmas.name: range_cat
lemmas.statement:
(n m p : int): m <= n => n <= p =>
    range m p = range m n ++ range n p

lemmas.name: rangeSr
lemmas.statement:
(n m:int): n <= m =>
    range n (m+1) = rcons (range n m) m

lemmas.name: mem_range
lemmas.statement:
(m n i: int):
    (mem (range m n) i) <=> (m <= i < n)

lemmas.name: range_uniq
lemmas.statement: m n: uniq (range m n)

lemmas.name: size_range
lemmas.statement: m n: size (range m n) = max 0 (n - m)

lemmas.name: nth_range
lemmas.statement:
(i p k w : int):
    0 <= i < p - k => nth w (range k p) i = k + i

lemmas.name: le2_mem_range
lemmas.statement:
(m n i: int):
    (m <= i <= n) <=> (mem (range m (n+1)) i)

lemmas.name: mem_range_le
lemmas.statement:
(m n i j: int):
    j <= m =>
    mem (range m n) i =>
    j <= i

lemmas.name: mem_range_gt
lemmas.statement:
(m n i j: int):
    n <= j =>
    mem (range m n) i =>
    i < j

lemmas.name: mem_range_lt
lemmas.statement:
(m n i j: int):
    j < m =>
    mem (range m n) i =>
    j < i

lemmas.name: mem_range_ge
lemmas.statement:
(m n i j: int):
    n <= j + 1 =>
    mem (range m n) i =>
    i <= j

lemmas.name: mem_range_incl
lemmas.statement:
(m1 n1 m2 n2 i : int) :
    m2 <= m1 =>
    n1 <= n2 =>
    i \in range m1 n1 =>
    i \in range m2 n2

lemmas.name: mem_range_addl
lemmas.statement:
(m n x y : int) :
    x + y \in range m n <=> y \in range (m - x) (n - x)

lemmas.name: mem_range_addr
lemmas.statement:
(m n x y : int) :
    x + y \in range m n <=> x \in range (m - y) (n - y)

lemmas.name: mem_range_add2
lemmas.statement:
(m1 n1 m2 n2 x y : int) :
    x \in range m1 n1 =>
    y \in range m2 n2 =>
    x + y \in range (m1 + m2) (n1 + n2 - 1)

lemmas.name: mem_range_opp
lemmas.statement:
(m n x : int) :
    -x \in range m n <=> x \in range (- n + 1) (- m + 1)

lemmas.name: mem_range_subl
lemmas.statement:
(m n x y : int) :
    x - y \in range m n <=> y \in range (- n + x + 1) (- m + x + 1)

lemmas.name: mem_range_subr
lemmas.statement:
(m n x y : int) :
    x - y \in range m n <=> x \in range (m + y) (n + y)

lemmas.name: mem_range_mul
lemmas.statement:
(m1 n1 m2 n2 x y : int) :
    0 <= m1 =>
    0 <= m2 =>
    x \in range m1 n1 =>
    y \in range m2 n2 =>
    x * y \in range (m1 * m2) (n1 * n2 - n1 - n2 + 2)

lemmas.name: map_nth_range
lemmas.statement:
(x0 : 'a) s:
  map (fun i => nth x0 s i) (range 0 (size s)) = s

lemmas.name: assoc_nil
lemmas.statement: a: assoc [<:'a * 'b>] a = None

lemmas.name: assoc_cons
lemmas.statement:
x y s a:
    assoc<:'a, 'b> ((x, y) :: s) a
  = if a = x then Some y else assoc s a

lemmas.name: assoc_head
lemmas.statement: x y s: assoc<:'a, 'b> ((x, y) :: s) x = Some y

lemmas.name: assoc_cat
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : ('a * 'b) list) x:
    assoc (s1 ++ s2) x
  = if mem (map fst s1) x then assoc s1 x else assoc s2 x

lemmas.name: mem_assoc_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(s : ('a * 'b) list) (a : 'a) (b : 'b):
  uniq (map fst s) => mem s (a, b) <=> assoc s a = Some b

lemmas.name: assocP
lemmas.statement:
(s : ('a * 'b) list) (x : 'a):
     (  mem (map fst s) x /\ exists y, mem s (x, y) /\ assoc s x = Some y)
  \/ (! mem (map fst s) x /\ assoc s x = None)

lemmas.name: assocTP
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (xs : ('a * 'b) list) k :
  assoc xs k <> None <=> k \in map fst xs

lemmas.name: assoc_some
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b] (xs : ('a * 'b) list) k v:
 assoc xs k = Some v => (k, v) \in xs

lemmas.name: assoc_none
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b] (xs : ('a * 'b) list) (k : 'a) :
  assoc xs k <> None <=> exists (s:'b), (k,s) \in xs

lemmas.name: perm_eq_assoc
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : ('a * 'b) list) x:
     uniq (map fst s2)
  => perm_eq s1 s2 => assoc s1 x = assoc s2 x

lemmas.name: assoc_filter
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) (s : ('a * 'b) list) x:
  assoc (filter (p \o fst) s) x = if (p x) then assoc s x else None

lemmas.name: assoc_get_mem
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (xs : ('a * 'b) list) k:
  k \in map fst xs => (k, oget (assoc xs k)) \in xs

lemmas.name: assoc_some_onth_mem
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (xs : ('a * 'b) list) (k : 'a) (v : 'b):
 assoc xs k = Some v => (exists n, onth xs n = Some (k, v))

lemmas.name: size_mkseq
lemmas.statement: (f : int -> 'a) n: size (mkseq f n) = max 0 n

lemmas.name: eq_mkseq
lemmas.statement:
(f g : int -> 'a):
     (forall x, f x = g x)
  => forall n, mkseq f n = mkseq g n

lemmas.name: nth_mkseq
lemmas.statement:
x0 (f : int -> 'a) n i:
  0 <= i < n => nth x0 (mkseq f n) i = f i

lemmas.name: nth_mkseq_if
lemmas.statement:
x0 (f : int -> 'a) n i:
  nth x0 (mkseq f n) i = if 0 <= i < n then f i else x0

lemmas.name: mkseq_nth
lemmas.statement: (x0 : 'a) s: mkseq (nth x0 s) (size s) = s

lemmas.name: mkseq0
lemmas.statement: (f : int -> 'a) : mkseq f 0 = []

lemmas.name: mkseq0_le
lemmas.statement: f n : n <= 0 => mkseq<:'a> f n = []

lemmas.name: mkseq1
lemmas.statement: f : mkseq<:'a> f 1 = [f 0]

lemmas.name: mkseqS
lemmas.statement:
f n : 0 <= n =>
  mkseq<:'a> f (n + 1) = rcons (mkseq f n) (f n)

lemmas.name: mkseqSr
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : int -> 'a) n : 0 <= n =>
  mkseq f (n + 1) = f 0 :: mkseq (f \o ((+)%Int 1)) n

lemmas.name: mkseqSr_minus
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : int -> 'a) (n : int) :
  0 < n => mkseq f n = f 0 :: mkseq (f \o (+) 1) (n - 1)

lemmas.name: mkseq_add
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> 'a) n m : 0 <= n => 0 <= m =>
  mkseq f (n+m) = mkseq f n ++ mkseq (fun i => f (n+i)) m

lemmas.name: mkseq2
lemmas.statement: ['a] (f : int -> 'a) : mkseq f 2 = [f 0; f 1]

lemmas.name: mkseqP
lemmas.statement:
f n (x:'a) :
  mem (mkseq f n) x <=> exists i, 0 <= i < n /\ x = f i

lemmas.name: mkseq_nseq
lemmas.statement:
['a] n (x : 'a) :
  mkseq (fun _ => x) n = nseq n x

lemmas.name: drop_mkseq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : int -> 'a) k n :
  0 <= k <= n =>
  drop k (mkseq f n) = mkseq (f \o ((+) k)) (n - k)

lemmas.name: take_mkseq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : int -> 'a) k n :
  0 <= k <= n =>
  take k (mkseq f n) = mkseq f k

lemmas.name: map_mkseq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (g: int -> 'a) (n : int) :
  map f (mkseq g n) = mkseq (f \o g) n

lemmas.name: foldr_cat
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) z0 s1 s2:
  foldr f z0 (s1 ++ s2) = foldr f (foldr f z0 s2) s1

lemmas.name: foldr_rcons
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) z0 s z :
  foldr f z0 (rcons s z) = foldr f (f z z0) s

lemmas.name: foldr_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) (h : 'c -> 'a) z0 s:
  foldr f z0 (map h s) = foldr (fun x z, f (h x) z) z0 s

lemmas.name: foldl_rev
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'b -> 'a -> 'b) z0 s:
  foldl f z0 (rev s) = foldr (fun x z => f z x) z0 s

lemmas.name: foldl_cat
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'b -> 'a -> 'b) z0 s1 s2:
  foldl f z0 (s1 ++ s2) = foldl f (foldl f z0 s1) s2

lemmas.name: foldl_rcons
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'b -> 'a -> 'b) z0 s z :
  foldl f z0 (rcons s z) = f (foldl f z0 s) z

lemmas.name: foldl_map
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (f : 'b -> 'a -> 'b) (h : 'c -> 'a) z0 s:
  foldl f z0 (map h s) = foldl (fun z x, f z (h x)) z0 s

lemmas.name: foldr_perm
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) (z : 'b) (s1 s2 : 'a list):
     (forall a b v, f a (f b v) = f b (f a v))
  => perm_eq s1 s2
  => foldr f z s1 = foldr f z s2

lemmas.name: foldr_rem
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) (z : 'b) (s : 'a list):
     (forall a b X, f a (f b X) = f b (f a X))
  => mem s x
  => foldr f z s = f x (foldr f z (rem x s))

lemmas.name: foldr_comp
lemmas.statement: ['a, 'b, 'c] (f1 : 'b -> 'a -> 'a) (f2 : 'c -> 'b) z s : foldr (f1 \o f2) z s = foldr f1 z (map f2 s)

lemmas.name: eq_foldr
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b] (f1 f2 : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) z1 z2 s1 s2 :
  (forall x , f1 x = f2 x) =>
  z1 = z2 =>
  s1 = s2 =>
  foldr f1 z1 s1 = foldr f2 z2 s2

lemmas.name: eq_foldl
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b] (f1 f2 : 'a -> 'b -> 'a) z1 z2 s1 s2 :
  (forall x y , f1 x y = f2 x y) =>
  z1 = z2 =>
  s1 = s2 =>
  foldl f1 z1 s1 = foldl f2 z2 s2

lemmas.name: eq_in_map
lemmas.statement:
(f1 f2 : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list):
  (forall x, mem s x => f1 x = f2 x) <=> map f1 s = map f2 s

lemmas.name: eq_in_pmap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f1 f2 : 'a -> 'b option) s:
     (forall x, mem s x => f1 x = f2 x)
  => pmap f1 s = pmap f2 s

lemmas.name: eq_in_filter
lemmas.statement:
p1 p2 (s : 'a list):
     (forall x, mem s x => p1 x <=> p2 x)
  => filter p1 s = filter p2 s

lemmas.name: eq_in_filter_predT
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) s:
  (forall x, mem s x => P x) => filter P s = s

lemmas.name: eq_in_filter_pred0
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) s:
  (forall x, mem s x => !P x) => filter P s = []

lemmas.name: eq_in_has
lemmas.statement:
(p1 p2 : 'a -> bool) (s : 'a list):
  (forall x, mem s x => p1 x <=> p2 x) => has p1 s <=> has p2 s

lemmas.name: eq_in_all
lemmas.statement:
p1 p2 (s : 'a list):
  (forall x, mem s x => p1 x <=> p2 x) => all p1 s <=> all p2 s

lemmas.name: eq_in_mkseq
lemmas.statement:
(f1 f2 : int -> 'a) n:
     (forall i, 0 <= i < n => f1 i = f2 i)
  => mkseq f1 n = mkseq f2 n

lemmas.name: eq_in_foldr
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b] (f1 f2 : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) z1 z2 s1 s2 :
  (forall x,  x \in s1 => f1 x = f2 x) =>
  z1 = z2 =>
  s1 = s2 =>
  foldr f1 z1 s1 = foldr f2 z2 s2

lemmas.name: eq_in_foldl
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b] (f1 f2 : 'a -> 'b -> 'a) z1 z2 s1 s2 :
  (forall x y,  y \in s1 => f1 x y = f2 x y) =>
  z1 = z2 =>
  s1 = s2 =>
  foldl f1 z1 s1 = foldl f2 z2 s2

lemmas.name: foldr_perm_in
lemmas.statement:
['b 'a] o (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  (forall (z : 'b) , left_commutative_in o z s1) =>
  perm_eq s1 s2 =>
  (forall (z : 'b) , foldr o z s1 = foldr o z s2)

lemmas.name: foldl_perm_in
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] o (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  (forall (x : 'b) , right_commutative_in o x s1) =>
  perm_eq s1 s2 =>
  (forall (x : 'b) , foldl o x s1 = foldl o x s2)

lemmas.name: flatten_nil
lemmas.statement: : flatten [<:'a list>] = []

lemmas.name: flatten_cons
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a list) s :
  flatten (x :: s) = x ++ flatten s

lemmas.name: flatten_seq1
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : flatten [s] = s

lemmas.name: flatten_cat
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list list):
  flatten (s1 ++ s2) = flatten s1 ++ flatten s2

lemmas.name: flatten1
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x : 'a list) : flatten [x] = x

lemmas.name: flatten_rcons
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list list) (x : 'a list)  :
  flatten (rcons s x) = flatten s ++ x

lemmas.name: flattenP
lemmas.statement:
(A : 'a list list) x :
  (exists s, mem A s /\ mem s x) <=> (mem (flatten A) x)

lemmas.name: flatten_mapP
lemmas.statement:
(A : 'a -> 'b list) s y :
  (exists x, mem s x /\ mem (A x) y) <=> (mem (flatten (map A s)) y)

lemmas.name: map_flatten
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list list) :
  map f (flatten s) = flatten (map (map f) s)

lemmas.name: sumz_ge0
lemmas.statement:
(sz : int list) :
  all ((<=) 0) sz => 0 <= sumz sz

lemmas.name: size_flatten
lemmas.statement:
(ss : 'a list list) :
  size (flatten ss) = sumz (map size ss)

lemmas.name: count_flatten
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) (ss : 'a list list) :
  count p (flatten ss) = sumz (map (count p) ss)

lemmas.name: perm_undup_count
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) :
  perm_eq
    (flatten (map (fun x => nseq (count (pred1 x) s) x) (undup s)))
    s

lemmas.name: nth_flatten
lemmas.statement:
(x0 : 'a list) (x1 : 'a) (s : 'a list list) (i j : int) :
  0 <= i < size s =>
  0 <= j < size (nth x0 s i) =>
  nth x1 (flatten s) (sumz (map size (take i s)) + j)
  =
  nth x1 (nth x0 s i) j

lemmas.name: uniq_flatten
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list list) :
  all uniq s =>
  (forall x y, x \in s => y \in s => has (mem x) y => x = y) =>
  uniq s =>
  uniq (flatten s)

lemmas.name: uniq_flatten_map
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b list) s:
  (forall x, uniq (f x)) =>
  (forall x y, mem s x => mem s y => has (mem (f x)) (f y) => x = y) =>
  uniq s => uniq (flatten (map f s))

lemmas.name: count_flatten_nseq
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) k s :
  count p (flatten (nseq k s)) = (max 0 k) * (count p s)

lemmas.name: size_flatten_ctt
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (s : 'a list list) :
     (forall x, x \in s => size x = n)
  => size (flatten s) = n * (size s)

lemmas.name: drop_flatten_ctt
lemmas.statement:
['a] (m n : int) (s : 'a list list) :
     (forall x, x \in s => size x = m)
  => drop (m * n) (flatten s) = flatten (drop n s)

lemmas.name: take_flatten_ctt
lemmas.statement:
['a] (m n : int) (s : 'a list list) :
     (forall x, x \in s => size x = m)
  => take (m * n) (flatten s) = flatten (take n s)

lemmas.name: perm_eq_pair
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s : ('a * 'b) list) : uniq s => perm_eq s
  (flatten
     (map (fun a => filter (fun xy : _ * _ => xy.`1 = a) s)
          (undup (map fst s))))

lemmas.name: perm_eq_flatten
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s0 s1 : 'a list list) :
  perm_eq s0 s1 => perm_eq (flatten s0) (flatten s1)

lemmas.name: mask0
lemmas.statement: m : mask m [] = [<:'a>]

lemmas.name: mask_false
lemmas.statement: s n : mask (nseq n false) s = [<:'a>]

lemmas.name: mask_true
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) n :
  size s <= n => mask (nseq n true) s = s

lemmas.name: mask_cons
lemmas.statement:
b m x s :
  mask<:'a> (b :: m) (x :: s) = nseq (b2i b) x ++ mask m s

lemmas.name: size_mask
lemmas.statement:
m s :
  size m = size s => size (mask<:'a> m s) = count idfun m

lemmas.name: mask_cat
lemmas.statement:
m1 m2 s1 s2 : size m1 = size s1 =>
  mask<:'a> (m1 ++ m2) (s1 ++ s2) = mask m1 s1 ++ mask m2 s2

lemmas.name: all_mask
lemmas.statement: a m s : all a s => all a (mask<:'a> m s)

lemmas.name: has_mask
lemmas.statement: a m s : has a (mask<:'a> m s) => has a s

lemmas.name: mem_mask
lemmas.statement: x m s : x \in mask<:'a> m s => x \in s

lemmas.name: map_mask
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b) m s : map f (mask m s) = mask m (map f s)

lemmas.name: mask_uniq
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) m : uniq s => uniq (mask m s)

lemmas.name: sub0seq
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : subseq [] s

lemmas.name: subseq0
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : subseq s [] = (s = [])

lemmas.name: subseqP
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list) :
      (exists m, size m = size s2 /\ s1 = mask m s2)
  <=> (subseq s1 s2)

lemmas.name: cat_subseq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 s3 s4 : 'a list) :
  subseq s1 s3 => subseq s2 s4 => subseq (s1 ++ s2) (s3 ++ s4)

lemmas.name: subseq_catR
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  subseq s s1 => subseq s (s1 ++ s2)

lemmas.name: subseq_catL
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  subseq s s2 => subseq s (s1 ++ s2)

lemmas.name: subseq_refl
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : subseq s s

lemmas.name: subseq_trans
lemmas.statement:
(s2 s1 s3 : 'a list) :
  subseq s1 s2 => subseq s2 s3 => subseq s1 s3

lemmas.name: subseq_cons
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) x : subseq s (x :: s)

lemmas.name: subseq_consI
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x : 'a) (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  subseq (x :: s1) s2 => subseq s1 s2

lemmas.name: subseq_rcons
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) x : subseq s (rcons s x)

lemmas.name: subseq_take
lemmas.statement:
['a] (i : int) (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  subseq s1 s2 => subseq (take i s1) s2

lemmas.name: subseq_drop
lemmas.statement:
['a] (i : int) (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  subseq s1 s2 => subseq (drop i s1) s2

lemmas.name: subseq_drop_congr
lemmas.statement:
['a] (i : int) (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  subseq s1 s2 => subseq (drop i s1) (drop i s2)

lemmas.name: rem_subseq
lemmas.statement: x (s : 'a list) : subseq (rem x s) s

lemmas.name: filter_subseq
lemmas.statement: a (s : 'a list) : subseq (filter a s) s

lemmas.name: map_subseq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) s1 s2 :
  subseq s1 s2 => subseq (map f s1) (map f s2)

lemmas.name: count_subseq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (p : 'a -> bool) s1 s2 : subseq s1 s2 =>
  count p s1 <= count p s2

lemmas.name: subseq_mem
lemmas.statement:
['a] (xs ys : 'a list) x:
  subseq xs ys => x \in xs => x \in ys

lemmas.name: subseq_uniq
lemmas.statement: (s1 s2 : 'a list) : subseq s1 s2 => uniq s2 => uniq s1

lemmas.name: subseq_map_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list) (f : 'a -> 'b) :
  subseq s1 s2 => uniq (map f s2) => uniq (map f s1)

lemmas.name: zip0l
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] (s : 'b list): zip<:'a, 'b> [] s = []

lemmas.name: zip0r
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] (s : 'a list): zip<:'a, 'b> s [] = []

lemmas.name: zip_unzip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s : ('a * 'b) list) :
  zip (unzip1 s) (unzip2 s) = s

lemmas.name: unzip1_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s : 'a list) (t : 'b list) :
  size s <= size t => unzip1 (zip s t) = s

lemmas.name: unzip2_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s : 'a list) (t : 'b list) :
  size t <= size s => unzip2 (zip s t) = t

lemmas.name: size1_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s : 'a list) (t : 'b list) :
  size s <= size t => size (zip s t) = size s

lemmas.name: size2_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s : 'a list) (t : 'b list) :
  size t <= size s => size (zip s t) = size t

lemmas.name: size_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s : 'a list) (t : 'b list) :
  size (zip s t) = min (size s) (size t)

lemmas.name: zip_cat
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s1 s2 : 'a list) (t1 t2 : 'b list) :
  size s1 = size t1 => zip (s1 ++ s2) (t1 ++ t2) = zip s1 t1 ++ zip s2 t2

lemmas.name: nth_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (x : 'a) (y : 'b) s t i :
  size s = size t => nth (x, y) (zip s t) i = (nth x s i, nth y t i)

lemmas.name: nth_zip_cond
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] p (s : 'a list) (t : 'b list) i :
   nth p (zip s t) i
     = (if i < size (zip s t) then (nth p.`1 s i, nth p.`2 t i) else p)

lemmas.name: zip_rcons
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] s1 s2 (z1 : 'a) (z2 : 'b) :
  size s1 = size s2 =>
    zip (rcons s1 z1) (rcons s2 z2) = rcons (zip s1 s2) (z1, z2)

lemmas.name: rev_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s1 : 'a list) (s2 : 'b list) :
  size s1 = size s2 => rev (zip s1 s2) = zip (rev s1) (rev s2)

lemmas.name: mem_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] xs ys (x : 'a) (y : 'b):
  (x, y) \in zip xs ys => x \in xs /\ y \in ys

lemmas.name: mem_zip_fst
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (xs : 'a list) (ys : 'b list) xy:
  xy \in zip xs ys => fst xy \in xs

lemmas.name: mem_zip_snd
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (xs : 'a list) (ys : 'b list) xy:
  xy \in zip xs ys => snd xy \in ys

lemmas.name: mem_zip_nseqL
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] x y (ys : 'b list) :
  y \in ys => (x, y) \in zip<:'a, 'b> (nseq (size ys) x) ys

lemmas.name: zip_map
lemmas.statement:
['a1 'a2 'b1 'b2] (f : 'a1 -> 'a2) (g : 'b1 -> 'b2) xs ys :
    zip (map f xs) (map g ys)
  = map (fun xy => (f (fst xy), g (snd xy))) (zip xs ys)

lemmas.name: zip_mapl
lemmas.statement:
['a1 'a2 'b] (f : 'a1 -> 'a2) xs (ys : 'b list) :
  zip (map f xs) ys = map (fun xy => (f (fst xy), snd xy)) (zip xs ys)

lemmas.name: zip_mapr
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b1 'b2] (g : 'b1 -> 'b2) (xs : 'a list) ys :
  zip xs (map g ys) = map (fun xy => (fst xy, g (snd xy))) (zip xs ys)

lemmas.name: zipss
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a list) :
  zip s s = map (fun x => (x, x)) s

lemmas.name: mem_zip_mapr
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list) x y :
  (x, y) \in zip s (map f s) <=> (x \in s /\ y = f x)

lemmas.name: assoc_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b] (ks : 'a list) (vs : 'b list) k:
 size ks = size vs => assoc (zip ks vs) k = onth vs (index k ks)

lemmas.name: map_fst_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a1, 'a2, 'b] (f : 'a1 -> 'a2) xs (ys : 'b list) :
 size xs = size ys => map (f \o fst) (zip xs ys) = map f xs

lemmas.name: map_snd_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b1, 'b2] (g : 'b1 -> 'b2) (xs : 'a list) ys :
 size xs = size ys => map (g \o snd) (zip xs ys) = map g ys

lemmas.name: zip_map_proj
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b, 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b * 'c) xs:
  zip (map (fst \o f) xs) (map (snd \o f) xs) = map f xs

lemmas.name: onth_zip_some
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (xs : 'a list) (ys : 'b list) n xy:
      onth (zip xs ys) n = Some xy
  <=> (onth xs n = Some (fst xy)) /\ (onth ys n = Some (snd xy))

lemmas.name: take_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (k : int) (s1 : 'a list) (s2 : 'b list) :
  take k (zip s1 s2) = zip (take k s1) (take k s2)

lemmas.name: drop_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (k : int) (s1 : 'a list) (s2 : 'b list) :
  drop k (zip s1 s2) = zip (drop k s1) (drop k s2)

lemmas.name: eq_keys_amap
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b1, 'b2, 'c]
  (f : 'a -> 'b1 -> 'c) (g : 'a -> 'b2 -> 'c) xs ys
: amap f xs = amap g ys => unzip1 xs = unzip1 ys

lemmas.name: assoc_amap
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b, 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) xs k:
 assoc (amap f xs) k = omap (f k) (assoc xs k)

lemmas.name: map_zip_nth
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b, 'c] dk dv (f: 'a * 'b -> 'c) ks vs:
 size ks = size vs => map f (zip ks vs)
   = map (fun i => f (nth dk ks i, nth dv vs i)) (range 0 (size ks))

lemmas.name: amap_assoc_zip
lemmas.statement:
['a, 'b, 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) ks vs:
 size ks = size vs => uniq ks => amap f (zip ks vs) =
   amap (fun k _ => f k (nth witness vs (index k ks))) (zip ks vs)

lemmas.name: foldr_zip_nseq
lemmas.statement:
['a,'b,'c] (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c -> 'c) x z s :
  foldr (f x) z s = foldr (fun p => f (fst p) (snd p)) z (zip (nseq (size s) x) s)

lemmas.name: foldl_zip_nseq
lemmas.statement:
['a,'b,'c] (f : 'a -> 'c -> 'b -> 'c) x z s :
  foldl (f x) z s = foldl (fun y p => f (fst p) y (snd p)) z (zip (nseq (size s) x) s)

lemmas.name: allpairs0l
lemmas.statement: f t : allpairs<:'a, 'b, 'c> f [] t = []

lemmas.name: allpairs0r
lemmas.statement: f s : allpairs<:'a, 'b, 'c> f s [] = []

lemmas.name: allpairs_consl
lemmas.statement:
f x s t :
 allpairs<:'a, 'b, 'c> f (x :: s) t = map (f x) t ++ allpairs f s t

lemmas.name: allpairs_consr
lemmas.statement:
f x s t :
 perm_eq (allpairs<:'a, 'b, 'c> f s (x :: t)) (map (transpose f x) s ++ allpairs f s t)

lemmas.name: size_allpairs
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] f s t :
  size (allpairs<:'a, 'b, 'c> f s t) = size s * size t

lemmas.name: allpairsP
lemmas.statement:
f s t z :
      (mem (allpairs<:'a, 'b, 'c> f s t) z)
  <=> (exists (p : _ * _), mem s p.`1 /\  mem t p.`2 /\ z = f p.`1 p.`2)

lemmas.name: allpairs_uniq
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) s t :
     uniq s => uniq t
  => (forall x1 x2 y1 y2,
           mem s x1 => mem s x2 => mem t y1 => mem t y2
        => f x1 y1 = f x2 y2 => (x1 = x2 /\ y1 = y2))
  => uniq (allpairs f s t)

lemmas.name: perm_eq_allpairs
lemmas.statement:
f s1 s2 t1 t2 :
  perm_eq s1 s2 => perm_eq t1 t2 => perm_eq
    (allpairs<:'a, 'b, 'c> f s1 t1)
    (allpairs<:'a, 'b, 'c> f s2 t2)

lemmas.name: allpairs_swap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'c) s1 s2 :
  perm_eq
    (allpairs f s1 s2)
    (allpairs (transpose f) s2 s1)

lemmas.name: perm_insert
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) x s:
    perm_eq (x :: s) (insert e x s)

lemmas.name: perm_sort
lemmas.statement: (e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) s: perm_eq (sort e s) s

lemmas.name: sorted_insert
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) x s:
       (forall x y, e x y \/ e y x)
    => sorted e s => sorted e (insert e x s)

lemmas.name: sort_sorted
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) (s : 'a list):
     (forall x y, e x y \/ e y x) => sorted e (sort e s)

lemmas.name: sortE
lemmas.statement:
['a] (e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) s :
  sort e s = InsertSort.sort e s

lemmas.name: perm_sort
lemmas.statement: e (s : 'a list): perm_eq (sort e s) s

lemmas.name: sort_sorted
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) s:
  (forall (x y : 'a), e x y \/ e y x) => sorted e (sort e s)

lemmas.name: subseq_order_path
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) :
     (forall y x z, e x y => e y z => e x z)
  => forall (x : 'a) s1 s2,
       subseq s1 s2 => path e x s2 => path e x s1

lemmas.name: subseq_sorted
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) :
     (forall y x z, e x y => e y z => e x z)
  => forall s1 s2, subseq s1 s2 => sorted e s2 => sorted e s1

lemmas.name: sorted_filter
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) :
     (forall y x z, e x y => e y z => e x z)
  => forall a s, sorted e s => sorted e (filter a s)

lemmas.name: sorted_rem
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) :
     (forall y x z, e x y => e y z => e x z)
  => forall x s, sorted e s => sorted e (rem x s)

lemmas.name: mem_sort
lemmas.statement: e s (x : 'a) : mem (sort e s) x <=> mem s x

lemmas.name: size_sort
lemmas.statement: e (s : 'a list) : size (sort e s) = size s

lemmas.name: sort_uniq
lemmas.statement: e (s : 'a list) : uniq (sort e s) <=> uniq s

lemmas.name: perm_sortl
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) s :
  forall s', perm_eq (sort e s) s' <=> perm_eq s s'

lemmas.name: order_path_min
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) :
     (forall y x z, e x y => e y z => e x z)
  => forall x s, path e x s => all (e x) s

lemmas.name: path_sorted
lemmas.statement: e (x : 'a) s : path e x s => sorted e s

lemmas.name: eq_sorted
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) :
     (forall y x z, e x y => e y z => e x z)
  => (forall x y, e x y => e y x => x = y)
  => forall s1 s2, sorted e s1 => sorted e s2 =>
       perm_eq s1 s2 => s1 = s2

lemmas.name: perm_sortP
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool):
     (forall x y, e x y \/ e y x)
  => (forall y x z, e x y => e y z => e x z)
  => (forall x y, e x y => e y x => x = y)
  => forall s1 s2, (perm_eq s1 s2) <=> (sort e s1 = sort e s2)

lemmas.name: sortK
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) :
     (forall x y, e x y \/ e y x)
  => (forall y x z, e x y => e y z => e x z)
  => (forall x y, e x y => e y x => x = y)
  => forall s, sort e (sort e s) = sort e s

lemmas.name: sort_id
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) :
     (forall x y, e x y \/ e y x)
  => (forall y x z, e x y => e y z => e x z)
  => (forall x y, e x y => e y x => x = y)
  => forall s, sorted e s => sort e s = s

lemmas.name: sort_rem
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool) :
     (forall x y, e x y \/ e y x)
  => (forall y x z, e x y => e y z => e x z)
  => (forall x y, e x y => e y x => x = y)
  => forall x s,  mem s x =>
       exists s1 s2, sort e s = s1 ++ x :: s2
        /\ sort e (rem x s) = s1 ++ s2

lemmas.name: sorted_range
lemmas.statement: m n : sorted (<) (range m n)

lemmas.name: rel_refl
lemmas.statement: : reflexive rel by move => x; elim (rel_conn x x)

lemmas.name: listmax_gt_in
lemmas.statement: (dfl: t) (xs: t list): forall x, x \in xs => rel x (listmax dfl xs)

lemmas.name: listmax_in
lemmas.statement: (dfl: t) (xs: t list): size xs <> 0 => listmax dfl xs \in xs

lemmas.name: maxr_seq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> real) (s : 'a list) x0 :
  x0 \in s => exists x, x \in s /\ forall y, y \in s => f y <= f x

lemmas.name: maxz_seq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> int) (s : 'a list) x0 :
  x0 \in s => exists x, x \in s /\ forall y, y \in s => f y <= f x

lemmas.name: lex_total
lemmas.statement:
(e : 'a -> 'a -> bool):
     (forall x y, e x y \/ e y x)
  => (forall s1 s2, lex e s1 s2 \/ lex e s2 s1)

lemmas.name: inj_cons
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x : 'a) : injective ((::) x)

lemmas.name: subseqsP
lemmas.statement: ['a] (xs ys : 'a list) : subseq xs ys <=> xs \in subseqs ys

lemmas.name: subseqs_uniq
lemmas.statement: ['a] (xs : 'a list) : uniq xs => uniq (subseqs xs)

lemmas.name: uniq_subseq_eq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (xs xs1 xs2: 'a list) :
   uniq xs => subseq xs1 xs => subseq xs2 xs
     => (forall x, x \in xs1 = x \in xs2) => xs1 = xs2

lemmas.name: alltuples_le0
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (xs : 'a list) :
  n <= 0 => alltuples n xs = [[]]

lemmas.name: alltuplesS
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (xs : 'a list) : 0 <= n =>
  alltuples (n+1) xs = allpairs (::) xs (alltuples n xs)

lemmas.name: alltuplesP
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (xs ys : 'a list) :
  xs \in alltuples n ys <=> (size xs = max 0 n /\ all (mem ys) xs)

lemmas.name: alltuples_uniq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (xs : 'a list) :
  uniq xs => uniq (alltuples n xs)

lemmas.name: size_alltuples
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (xs : 'a list) :
  size (alltuples n xs) = (size xs)^(max 0 n)

lemmas.name: allsubtuplesP
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (xs ys : 'a list) :
  xs \in allsubtuples n ys <=> (size xs <= max 0 n /\ all (mem ys) xs)

lemmas.name: allsubtuples_uniq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (n : int) (xs : 'a list) :
  uniq xs => uniq (allsubtuples n xs)

lemmas.name: elemsK
lemmas.statement: : cancel elems<:'a> oflist

lemmas.name: oflistK
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list): perm_eq s (elems (oflist s))

lemmas.name: mset_eq
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a mset):
  (perm_eq (elems s1) (elems s2)) => (s1 = s2)

lemmas.name: perm_eq_oflistP
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  oflist s1 = oflist s2 <=> perm_eq s1 s2

lemmas.name: oflist_mult
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list):
  forall x, (oflist s).[x] = count (pred1 x) s

lemmas.name: mult_ge0
lemmas.statement: s (x: 'a): 0 <= s.[x] by rewrite/mult; apply count_ge0

lemmas.name: mset_eqP
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a mset):
  (forall x, s1.[x] = s2.[x]) => s1 = s2

lemmas.name: memE
lemmas.statement: (s : 's mset) x: mem s x = mem (elems s) x by rewrite /mem

lemmas.name: mult_in_ge1
lemmas.statement: s (x: 'a): x \in s <=> 1 <= mult x s

lemmas.name: mult0
lemmas.statement: s (x: 'a): x \notin s <=> mult x s = 0 by smt(mult_ge0 mult_in_ge1)

lemmas.name: mem_oflist
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list):
  forall x, x \in (oflist s) <=> x \in s

lemmas.name: mem_selems
lemmas.statement: s (e: 'a): e \in selems s <=> e \in s

lemmas.name: offset_mult
lemmas.statement: (s: 'a fset) x: (offset s).[x] = b2i (x \in s)

lemmas.name: tofmap_get
lemmas.statement: (s: 'a mset) e: (tofmap s).[e] = if e \in s then Some(s.[e]) else None

lemmas.name: mem_tofmap
lemmas.statement: (s: 'a mset) e: e \in tofmap s <=> e \in s

lemmas.name: offmap_mult
lemmas.statement:
(m: ('a, int) fmap) e: (offmap m).[e] =
  max 0 (odflt 0 m.[e])

lemmas.name: tofmapK
lemmas.statement: : cancel tofmap<:'a> offmap

lemmas.name: offmapK
lemmas.statement:
(x: ('a, int) fmap):
  (forall e, e \in x => 1 <= oget x.[e]) => tofmap (offmap x) = x

lemmas.name: mset1_mult
lemmas.statement: (x y: 'a): (mset1 x).[y] = b2i (x = y)

lemmas.name: union_mult
lemmas.statement: (s1 s2: 'a mset) e: (s1 `|` s2).[e] = max s1.[e] s2.[e]

lemmas.name: intersection_mult
lemmas.statement: (s1 s2: 'a mset) e: (s1 `&` s2).[e] = min s1.[e] s2.[e]

lemmas.name: rem_mult
lemmas.statement: s (x y: 'a): (rem s x).[y] = max 0 (s.[y] - b2i (x = y))

lemmas.name: insert_mult
lemmas.statement: s (x y: 'a): (insert x s).[y] = s.[y] + b2i (x = y)

lemmas.name: elems_mset0
lemmas.statement: ['a]: elems mset0 = [<:'a>]

lemmas.name: elems_eq_mset0
lemmas.statement: ['a] (A : 'a mset): elems A = [<:'a>] => A = mset0

lemmas.name: elems_mset1
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a) : elems (mset1 x) = [x]

lemmas.name: oflist_cons
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x : 'a) s : oflist (x::s) = insert x (oflist s)

lemmas.name: pick0
lemmas.statement: : pick<:'a> mset0 = witness

lemmas.name: mem_pick
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset): A <> mset0 => pick A \in A

lemmas.name: diff_mult_subset
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a mset): s2 \subset s1 =>
  forall x, (s1 `\` s2).[x] = s1.[x] - s2.[x]

lemmas.name: subset_trans
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 s3 : 'a mset):
  s1 \subset s2 => s2 \subset s3 => s1 \subset s3

lemmas.name: properP
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a mset) :
  s1 \proper s2 <=> s1 \subset s2 /\ exists x, s1.[x] < s2.[x]

lemmas.name: eqEsubset
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a mset) :
  (s1 = s2) <=> (s1 \subset s2) /\ (s2 \subset s1)

lemmas.name: subset_msetU_id
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) :
  A \subset B => A `|` B = B

lemmas.name: subset_msetI_id
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) :
  B \subset A => A `&` B = B

lemmas.name: subset_mset_add
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : A \subset A + B

lemmas.name: subset_msetDadd
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : A \subset B => (B `\` A) + A = B

lemmas.name: mset_ind
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a mset -> bool):
  p mset0 =>
  (forall x s, p s => p (insert x s)) =>
  (forall s, p s)

lemmas.name: addsC
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : A + B = B + A

lemmas.name: add0s
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : mset0 + A = A

lemmas.name: adds0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : A + mset0 = A

lemmas.name: addsA
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a mset) : A + (B + C) = A + B + C

lemmas.name: addsCA
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a mset) : A + (B + C) = B + (A + C)

lemmas.name: addsAC
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a mset) : A + B + C = A + C + B

lemmas.name: addsUACA
lemmas.statement: (A B C D : 'a mset) : (A + B) + (C + D) = (A + C) + (B + D)

lemmas.name: msetUC
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : A `|` B = B `|` A

lemmas.name: mset0U
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : mset0 `|` A = A

lemmas.name: msetU0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : A `|` mset0 = A

lemmas.name: msetUA
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a mset) : A `|` (B `|` C) = A `|` B `|` C

lemmas.name: msetUAC
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a mset) : A `|` B `|` C = A `|` C `|` B

lemmas.name: msetUid
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : A `|` A = A

lemmas.name: msetIC
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : A `&` B = B `&` A

lemmas.name: mset0I
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : mset0 `&` A = mset0

lemmas.name: msetI0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : A `&` mset0 = mset0

lemmas.name: mset1I
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) (D : 'a mset):
  mset1 x `&` D = if x \in D then mset1 x else mset0

lemmas.name: msetI1
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) (D : 'a mset):
  D `&` mset1 x = if x \in D then mset1 x else mset0

lemmas.name: msetIA
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a mset) : A `&` (B `&` C) = A `&` B `&` C

lemmas.name: msetIAC
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a mset) : A `&` B `&` C = A `&` C `&` B

lemmas.name: msetIid
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : A `&` A = A

lemmas.name: msetUK
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : (A `|` B) `&` A = A

lemmas.name: msetKU
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : A `&` (B `|` A) = A

lemmas.name: msetIK
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : (A `&` B) `|` A = A

lemmas.name: msetKI
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : A `|` (B `&` A) = A

lemmas.name: msetaddUI
lemmas.statement: (A B: 'a mset) : A + B = (A `|` B) + (A `&` B)

lemmas.name: msetD0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : A `\` mset0 = A

lemmas.name: mset0D
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : mset0 `\` A = mset0

lemmas.name: mset1D
lemmas.statement:
(x : 'a) (D : 'a mset):
  mset1 x `\` D = if mem D x then mset0 else mset1 x

lemmas.name: msetDv
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : A `\` A = mset0

lemmas.name: msetaddD
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : (A + B) `\` A = B

lemmas.name: msetID
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : (A `&` B) + (A `\` B) = A

lemmas.name: msetDDl
lemmas.statement: (A B C : 'a mset) : (A `\` B) `\` C = A `\` (B + C)

lemmas.name: msetDK
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : (A `|` B) `\` B = A `\` B

lemmas.name: msetDKv
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : (A `&` B) `\` B = mset0

lemmas.name: subsetIl
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : (A `&` B) \subset A

lemmas.name: subsetIr
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : (A `&` B) \subset B

lemmas.name: subsetDl
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset) : A `\` B \subset A

lemmas.name: sub0set
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : mset0 \subset A

lemmas.name: sub1set

lemmas.name: disjointC
lemmas.statement: (xs ys : 'a mset): disjoint xs ys => disjoint ys xs

lemmas.name: disjointP

lemmas.name: card_oflist
lemmas.statement: (l: 'a list): card (oflist l) = size l

lemmas.name: mcards0
lemmas.statement: : card mset0<:'a> = 0

lemmas.name: eq_mcards0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset): A = mset0 => card A = 0

lemmas.name: mcards0_eq
lemmas.statement: (A: 'a mset): card A = 0 => A = mset0

lemmas.name: mcard_ge0
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : 0 <= card A

lemmas.name: mcard1
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a) : card (mset1 x) = 1

lemmas.name: mcard_add
lemmas.statement: (A B : 'a mset): card (A + B) = card A + card B

lemmas.name: mcardUI_indep
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) : disjoint A B =>
  card (A `|` B) = card A + card B

lemmas.name: mcardUI
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) :
  card (A `|` B) + card (A `&` B) = card A + card B

lemmas.name: mcardU
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) :
  card (A `|` B) = card A + card B - card (A `&` B)

lemmas.name: mcardI
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) :
  card (A `&` B) = card A + card B - card (A `|` B)

lemmas.name: mcardID
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) :
  card (A `&` B) + card (A `\` B) = card A

lemmas.name: mcardD
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) :
  card (A `\` B) = card A - card (A `&` B)

lemmas.name: mcardI_D
lemmas.statement:
(A B: 'a mset) :
  card (A `&` B) = card A - card (A `\` B)

lemmas.name: mcardI1
lemmas.statement:
(A : 'a mset) x :
  card (A `&` mset1 x) = b2i (x \in A)

lemmas.name: mcardU1
lemmas.statement:
(A : 'a mset) x :
  card (A `|` mset1 x) = b2i (x \notin A) + card A

lemmas.name: mcardD1
lemmas.statement:
(A : 'a mset) (x : 'a) :
  card A = card (A `\` mset1 x) + (if mem A x then 1 else 0)

lemmas.name: card_iota
lemmas.statement: (n : int) : 0 <= n => card (oflist (iota_ 1 n)) = n

lemmas.name: subset_leq_mcard
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) :
  A \subset B => card A <= card B

lemmas.name: subset_cardP
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) :
  card A = card B => (A = B <=> A \subset B)

lemmas.name: eqEcard
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a mset) :
  (A = B) <=> (A \subset B) /\ (card B <= card A)

lemmas.name: mcard_eq1
lemmas.statement: (A : 'a mset) : (card A = 1) <=> (exists a, A = mset1 a)

lemmas.name: fold0
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) (z : 'b): fold f z mset0 = z

lemmas.name: fold1
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) (z : 'b) (a : 'a):
  fold f z (mset1 a) = f a z

lemmas.name: foldC
lemmas.statement:
(a : 'a) (f : 'a -> 'b -> 'b) (z : 'b) (A : 'a mset):
  (forall a a' b, f a (f a' b) = f a' (f a b)) =>
  mem A a =>
  fold f z A = f a (fold f z (rem A a))

lemmas.name: double_half

lemmas.statement: x : (floor x)%r <= x

lemmas.statement: x : (ceil x)%r < x + 1%r

lemmas.statement: n x : floor (n%r + x) = n + floor x

lemmas.name: upto2_notbad
lemmas.statement:
(ev1 ev2 bad1 bad2:bool) :
  ((bad1 <=> bad2) /\ (!bad2 => (ev1 <=> ev2))) =>
  ((ev1 /\ !bad1) <=> (ev2 /\ !bad2)) by smt()

lemmas.name: upto2_imp_bad
lemmas.statement:
(ev1 ev2 bad1 bad2:bool) :
  ((bad1 <=> bad2) /\ (!bad2 => (ev1 <=> ev2))) =>
  (ev1 /\ bad1) => bad2 by []

lemmas.name: upto_bad_false

  !((ev /\ !bad2) /\ bad2) by smt()

lemmas.name: upto_bad_or

lemmas.name: eq_upto
lemmas.statement:
(E1 E1b E1nb E2 E2b E2nb: real) :
  E1 = E1b + E1nb =>
  E2 = E2b + E2nb =>
  E1nb = E2nb =>
  E1 - E2 = E1b - E2b

lemmas.name: upto_abs
lemmas.statement:
(E1 E1b E1nb E2 E2b E2nb: real) :
  E1 = E1b + E1nb =>
  E2 = E2b + E2nb =>
  E1nb = E2nb =>
  `| E1 - E2 | <= `|E1b - E2b|

lemmas.name: upto_le
lemmas.statement:
(E1 E1b E1nb E2nb E2nb' E1b' : real) :
  E1 = E1b + E1nb =>
  E1nb = E2nb =>
  E1b <= E1b' =>
  E2nb <= E2nb' =>
  E1 <= E2nb' + E1b'

lemmas.name: is_real_le_md
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) (f g : 'a -> xreal) :
    (forall (x : 'a), x \in d => f x <= g x) =>
    is_real (d ** g) => is_real (d ** f)

lemmas.name: is_realZ
lemmas.statement: ['a] c (f : 'a -> xreal) : is_real (fun x => rp c * f x) <=> is_real f

lemmas.name: is_realD
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f1 f2 : 'a -> xreal) :
    is_real (f1 + f2) <=> (is_real f1 /\ is_real f2)

lemmas.name: is_realM
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f1 f2 : 'a -> xreal) :
    is_real (f1 * f2) <=> (is_real f1 /\ is_real f2)

lemmas.name: is_realMd
lemmas.statement:
(f2 f1 : 'a -> xreal) (d : 'a distr) :
    (forall x, x \in d => is_real (f1 x) = is_real (f2 x)) =>
    is_real (d ** f1) <=> is_real (d ** f2)

lemmas.name: is_real_rp
lemmas.statement: ['a] (f:'a -> realp) : is_real (fun x => rp (f x))

lemmas.name: is_real_sM
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a  distr) f :
    is_real (d ** f) <=> forall x, x \in d => is_real (f x)

lemmas.name: to_real_rp
lemmas.statement: ['a] (f:'a -> realp) : to_real (fun x => rp (f x)) = fun x => to_real (f x)

lemmas.name: to_realZ
lemmas.statement:
['a] c (f: 'a  -> xreal) :
    to_real (fun x => rp c * f x) = fun x => to_real c * to_real (f x)

lemmas.name: to_realD
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f g : 'a -> xreal) :
    is_real f => is_real g =>
    to_real (f + g) = fun x => to_real (f x) + to_real (g x)

lemmas.name: to_realM
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f g : 'a -> xreal) :
    to_real (f * g) = fun x => to_real (f x) * to_real (g x)

lemmas.name: is_real_bigRX
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : 'a -> xreal) l:
  is_real f =>
  (BRA.big predT (to_real f) l)%xr = big predT f l

lemmas.name: bigR_to_real
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : 'a -> real) (l : 'a list) :
  (forall a, a \in l => 0%r <= f a) =>
   BRA.big predT (to_real (fun a => (f a)%xr)) l = BRA.big predT f l

lemmas.name: bigXR
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : 'a -> real) (l : 'a list) :
  (forall a, a \in l => 0%r <= f a) =>
  big predT (fun x => (f x)%xr) l = (BRA.big predT f l)%xr

lemmas.name: bigXI
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : 'a -> int) (l : 'a list) :
  (forall a, a \in l => 0 <= f a) =>
  big predT (fun x => (f x)%xr) l = (BIA.big predT f l)%xr

lemmas.name: bigiXR
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> real) (m n : int) :
  (forall i, m <= i < n => 0%r <= f i) =>
  bigi predT (fun x => (f x)%xr) m n = (BRA.bigi predT f m n)%xr

lemmas.name: bigiXI
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> int) (m n : int) :
  (forall i, m <= i < n => 0 <= f i) =>
  bigi predT (fun x => (f x)%xr) m n = (BIA.bigi predT f m n)%xr

lemmas.name: big_oo
lemmas.statement:
['a] (J : 'a list) (f : 'a -> xreal) :
  (exists (x : 'a), (x \in J) /\ f x = oo) =>
  big predT f J = oo

lemmas.name: mulr_sumr
lemmas.statement:
['a] (P : 'a -> bool) (F : 'a -> xreal) (s : 'a list) (x : realp) :
  x ** (big P F s) = (big P (fun (i : 'a) => x ** F i) s)

lemmas.name: psuminfZ
lemmas.statement:
['a] (c:realp) (f: 'a -> xreal) :
  is_real f => c <> of_reald 0.0 =>
  psuminf (fun x => rp c * f x) = rp c * psuminf f

lemmas.name: psumifD
lemmas.statement:
(f1 f2 : 'a -> xreal) :
  is_real f1 => is_real f2 =>
  psuminf (fun x => f1 x + f2 x) = psuminf f1 + psuminf f2

lemmas.name: le_psuminf
lemmas.statement:
(f g : 'a -> xreal) :
  (forall (x : 'a), f x <= g x) =>
  is_real g =>
  psuminf f <= psuminf g

lemmas.name: eq_Ep
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (f g : 'a -> xreal) :
  (forall (x : 'a), x \in d => f x = g x) =>
  Ep d f = Ep d g

lemmas.name: le_Ep
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d: 'a distr) (f g : 'a -> xreal) :
   (forall (x : 'a), x \in d => f x <= g x) =>
  Ep d f <= Ep d g

lemmas.name: EpC
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (c : xreal):
   Ep d (fun (_ : 'a) => c) = (weight d) ** c

lemmas.name: EpZ
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d: 'a distr) (c:realp) (f: 'a -> xreal) :
  c <> of_reald 0.0 =>
  Ep d (fun x => rp c * f x) = rp c * Ep d f

lemmas.name: EpsZ
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d: 'a distr) (c:realp) (f: 'a -> xreal) :
  Ep d (fun x => c ** f x) = c ** Ep d f

lemmas.name: EpD
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (f1 f2 : 'a -> xreal) :
  Ep d (f1 + f2) = Ep d f1 + Ep d f2

lemmas.name: Ep_mu
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) (p:'a -> bool):
  Ep d (fun a => (p a)%xr) = (mu d p)%xr

lemmas.name: Ep_fin
lemmas.statement:
['a] J (d : 'a distr) f :
  uniq J =>
  (forall (x : 'a), mu1 d x <> 0%r => x \in J) =>
  Ep d f = big predT (d ** f) J

lemmas.name: Ep_dnull
lemmas.statement: ['a] f : Ep dnull<:'a> f = Rpbar.('0)

lemmas.name: Ep_dunit
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x : 'a) f : Ep (dunit x) f = f x

lemmas.name: EP_E
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> xreal) :
     is_real (d ** f)
  => summable (to_real (d ** f))
  => Ep d f = (E d (to_real f))%xr

lemmas.name: Ep_dlet
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (F : 'a -> 'b distr) f :
  Ep (dlet d F) f = Ep d (fun x => Ep (F x) f)

lemmas.name: Ep_dmap
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) (F: 'a -> 'b) (f: 'b -> xreal) :
  Ep (dmap d F) f = Ep d (fun x => f (F x))

lemmas.name: Ep_duniform
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a list) (f : 'a -> xreal) :
  Ep (duniform s) f =
    of_reald (1%r / (size ((undup s)))%r) ** big predT f (undup s)

lemmas.name: Ep_dbool
lemmas.statement:
(f : bool -> xreal) :
  Ep {0,1} f = of_reald 0.5 ** f true + of_reald 0.5 ** f false

lemmas.name: Ep_dbiased
lemmas.statement:
(p : real) (f : bool -> xreal) :
  0%r <= p <= 1%r => Ep (dbiased p) f = p ** f true + (1%r - p) ** f false

lemmas.name: Ep_dinterval
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> xreal) i j:
  Ep [i..j] f =
    (if i <= j then 1%r / (j - i + 1)%r else 0%r) **
       big predT f (range i (j + 1))

lemmas.name: Ep_dinterval_le
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> xreal) (i j : int) :
  i <= j =>
  Ep [i..j] f = (1%r / (j - i + 1)%r) ** big predT f (range i (j + 1))

lemmas.name: cxr_true
lemmas.statement:
(x:xreal) : true `|` x = x
by []

lemmas.name: Rp_to_real_eq
lemmas.statement: (x y : realp) : (x = y) <=> (to_real x = to_real y)

lemmas.name: Ep_cxr
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) (b:'a -> bool) (f:'a -> xreal) :
  Ep d (fun x => b x `|` f x) =
  (forall x, x \in d => b x) `|` Ep d f

lemmas.name: if_cxr
lemmas.statement:
(b b1 b2:bool) (f1 f2: xreal) :
  (if b then (b1 `|` f1) else (b2 `|` f2)) =
  (if b then b1 else b2) `|` if b then f1 else f2

lemmas.name: if_cxr_l
lemmas.statement:
(b b1:bool) (f1 f2: xreal) :
  (if b then (b1 `|` f1) else f2) =
  (b => b1) `|` if b then f1 else f2
by smt()

lemmas.name: if_cxr_r
lemmas.statement:
(b b2:bool) (f1 f2: xreal) :
  (if b then f1 else (b2 `|` f2) ) =
  (!b => b2) `|` if b then f1 else f2
by smt()

lemmas.name: cxrDl
lemmas.statement: b (f1 f2:xreal) : b `|` f1 + f2 = b `|` (f1 + f2)

lemmas.name: concave_cst
lemmas.statement: (c:xreal) : concave (fun x => c)

lemmas.name: concave_id
lemmas.statement: : concave (fun x => x)

lemmas.name: concaveD
lemmas.statement:
f1 f2 :
  concave f1 => concave f2 => concave (fun x => f1 x + f2 x)

lemmas.name: concaveMr
lemmas.statement:
f c :
  concave f => concave (fun x => f x * c)

lemmas.name: concaveMl
lemmas.statement:
f c :
  concave f => concave (fun x => c * f x)

lemmas.name: increasing_cst
lemmas.statement: (c:xreal) : increasing (fun x => c)

lemmas.name: increasing_id
lemmas.statement: : increasing (fun x => x)

lemmas.name: increasingD
lemmas.statement:
f1 f2 :
  increasing f1 => increasing f2 => increasing (fun x => f1 x + f2 x)

lemmas.name: increasingM
lemmas.statement:
f1 f2 :
  increasing f1 => increasing f2 => increasing (fun x => f1 x * f2 x)

lemmas.name: concave_incr_cst
lemmas.statement: (c:xreal) : concave_incr (fun x => c)

lemmas.name: concave_incr_id
lemmas.statement: : concave_incr (fun x => x)

lemmas.name: concave_incrD
lemmas.statement:
f1 f2 :
  concave_incr f1 => concave_incr f2 => concave_incr (fun x => f1 x + f2 x)

lemmas.name: concave_incrMr
lemmas.statement:
f c :
  concave_incr f => concave_incr (fun x => f x * c)

lemmas.name: concave_incrMl
lemmas.statement:
f c :
  concave_incr f => concave_incr (fun x => c * f x)

lemmas.name: concave_incr_cxr
lemmas.statement:
(b:bool) (f : xreal -> xreal) :
  concave_incr f => concave_incr (fun x => b `|` f x)

lemmas.name: concave_incr_if
lemmas.statement:
(b:bool) (f1 f2: xreal -> xreal) :
  concave_incr f1 => concave_incr f2 => concave_incr (fun x => if b then f1 x else f2 x)

lemmas.name: trans_help
lemmas.statement: P Q f : (P => Q) => (P `|` f) = oo \/ Q

lemmas.name: sumrD
lemmas.statement:
P F1 F2 (r : 'a list):
  (big P F1 r) + (big P F2 r) = big P (fun x => F1 x + F2 x) r

lemmas.name: sumrN
lemmas.statement:
P F (r : 'a list):
  - (big P F r) = (big P (fun x => -(F x)) r)

lemmas.name: sumrB
lemmas.statement:
P F1 F2 (r : 'a list):
  (big P F1 r) - (big P F2 r) = big P (fun x => F1 x - F2 x) r

lemmas.name: sumr_const
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) x s:
  big P (fun _ => x) s = intmul x (count P s)

lemmas.name: sumri_const
lemmas.statement: k (n m:int) : n <= m => bigi predT (fun _ => k) n m = intmul k (m - n)

lemmas.name: sumr_undup
lemmas.statement:
['a] (P : 'a -> bool) F s :
  big P F s = big P (fun a => intmul (F a) (count (pred1 a) s)) (undup s)

lemmas.name: telescoping_sum
lemmas.statement:
(F: int -> t) (m n:int) : m <= n =>
  F m - F n = bigi predT (fun i => F i - F (i+1)) m n

lemmas.name: telescoping_sum_down
lemmas.statement:
(F: int -> t) (m n:int) : m <= n =>
  F n - F m = bigi predT (fun i => F (i+1) - F i) m n

lemmas.name: sumr_1
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) s:
  big P (fun i => oner) s = CR.ofint (count P s)

lemmas.name: mulr_suml
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) F s x :
  (big P F s) * x = big P (fun i => F i * x) s

lemmas.name: mulr_sumr
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) F s x :
  x * (big P F s) = big P (fun i => x * F i) s

lemmas.name: divr_suml
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) F s x :
  (big P F s) / x = big P (fun i => F i / x) s

lemmas.name: sum_pair_dep
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] u v J : uniq J =>
    big predT (fun (ij : 'a * 'b) => (u ij.`1 * v ij.`1 ij.`2)%CR) J
  = big predT
      (fun i => u i * big predT
         (fun ij : _ * _ => v ij.`1 ij.`2)
         (filter (fun ij : _ * _ => ij.`1 = i) J))
      (undup (unzip1 J))

lemmas.name: sum_pair
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] u v J : uniq J =>
    big predT (fun (ij : 'a * 'b) => (u ij.`1 * v ij.`2)%CR) J
  = big predT
      (fun i => u i * big predT v (unzip2 (filter (fun ij : _ * _ => ij.`1 = i) J)))
      (undup (unzip1 J))

lemmas.name: mulr_big
lemmas.statement:
(P Q : 'a -> bool) (f g : 'a -> t) r s:
    BAdd.big P f r * BAdd.big Q g s
  = BAdd.big P (fun x => BAdd.big Q (fun y => f x * g y) s) r

lemmas.name: subrXX
lemmas.statement:
(x y : t) n : 0 <= n =>
  exp x n - exp y n = (x - y) * (BAdd.bigi predT (fun i => exp x (n - 1 - i) * exp y i) 0 n)

lemmas.name: mulr_const_cond
lemmas.statement:
p s c:
  BMul.big<:'a> p (fun _ => c) s = exp c (count p s)

lemmas.name: mulr_const
lemmas.statement:
s c:
  BMul.big<:'a> predT (fun _ => c) s = exp c (size s)

lemmas.name: ler_sum
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) (F1 F2 :'a -> t) s:
     (forall a, P a => F1 a <= F2 a)
  => (BAdd.big P F1 s <= BAdd.big P F2 s)

lemmas.name: sumr_ge0
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) (F : 'a -> t) s:
     (forall a, P a => zeror <= F a)
  => zeror <= BAdd.big P F s

lemmas.name: sub_ler_sum
lemmas.statement:
(P1 P2 : 'a -> bool) (F1 F2 : 'a -> t) s :
  (forall x, P1 x => P2 x) =>
  (forall x, P1 x => F1 x <= F2 x) =>
  (forall x, P2 x => !P1 x => zeror <= F2 x) =>
  BAdd.big P1 F1 s <= BAdd.big P2 F2 s

lemmas.name: sumr_norm
lemmas.statement:
P F s :
  (forall x, P x => zeror <= F x) =>
    BAdd.big<:'a> P (fun x => `|F x|) s = BAdd.big P F s

lemmas.name: prodr_ge0
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) F s:
     (forall a, P a => zeror <= F a)
  => zeror <= BMul.big P F s

lemmas.name: prodr_gt0
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) F s:
     (forall a, P a => zeror < F a)
  => zeror < BMul.big P F s

lemmas.name: ler_prod
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) (F1 F2 :'a -> t) s:
     (forall a, P a => zeror <= F1 a <= F2 a)
  => (BMul.big P F1 s <= BMul.big P F2 s)

lemmas.name: ler_sum_seq
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) (F1 F2 :'a -> t) s:
     (forall a, mem s a => P a => F1 a <= F2 a)
  => (BAdd.big P F1 s <= BAdd.big P F2 s)

lemmas.name: sumr_ge0_seq
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) (F : 'a -> t) s:
     (forall a, mem s a => P a => zeror <= F a)
  => zeror <= BAdd.big P F s

lemmas.name: prodr_ge0_seq
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) F s:
     (forall a, mem s a => P a => zeror <= F a)
  => zeror <= BMul.big P F s

lemmas.name: prodr_gt0_seq
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) F s:
     (forall a, mem s a => P a => zeror < F a)
  => zeror < BMul.big P F s

lemmas.name: gt0_prodr_seq
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) (F : 'a -> t) (s : 'a list) :
  (forall (a : 'a), a \in s => P a => zeror <= F a) =>
  zeror < BMul.big P F s =>
  (forall (a : 'a), a \in s => P a => zeror < F a)

lemmas.name: ler_prod_seq
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) (F1 F2 : 'a -> t) s:
     (forall a, mem s a => P a => zeror <= F1 a <= F2 a)
  => (BMul.big P F1 s <= BMul.big P F2 s)

lemmas.name: prodr_eq0
lemmas.statement:
P F s:
      (exists x, P x /\ x \in s /\ F x = zeror)
  <=> BMul.big<:'a> P F s = zeror

lemmas.name: ler_pexpn2r
lemmas.statement:
n x y :
  0 < n => zeror <= x => zeror <= y => (exp x n <= exp y n) <=> (x <= y)

lemmas.name: big_normr
lemmas.statement:
['a] P F s :
  `|BAdd.big<:'a> P F s| <= BAdd.big P (fun x => `|F x|) s

lemmas.name: sum_expr
lemmas.statement:
p n : 0 <= n =>
  (oner - p) * BAdd.bigi predT (fun i => exp p i) 0 n = oner - exp p n

lemmas.name: sum_expr_le
lemmas.statement:
p n :
     0 <= n
  => zeror <= p < oner
  => (oner - p) * BAdd.bigi predT (fun i => exp p i) 0 n <= oner

lemmas.name: sum_iexpr_le
lemmas.statement:
p n : zeror <= p < oner =>
  exp (oner - p) 2 * BAdd.bigi predT (fun i => ofint i * exp p i) 0 n <= oner

lemmas.name: fact0
lemmas.statement: (n : int) : n <= 0 => fact n = 1

lemmas.name: factS
lemmas.statement: (n : int) : 0 <= n => fact (n+1) = (n+1) * (fact n)

lemmas.name: fact1
lemmas.statement: (n : int) : fact 1 = 1

lemmas.name: size_bin1
lemmas.statement: (s : int list) : size (bin1 s) = 1 + size s

lemmas.name: size_bin
lemmas.statement:
(s : int list) n : 0 <= n =>
  size (iter n bin1 s) = n + size s

lemmas.name: binp
lemmas.statement:
(n k : int) :
  0 <= n => 0 <= k => bin n k = nth 0 (iter n bin1 [1]) k

lemmas.name: bin_lt0l
lemmas.statement: (n m : int) : n < 0 => bin n m = 0

lemmas.name: bin_lt0r
lemmas.statement: (n m : int) : m < 0 => bin n m = 0

lemmas.name: bin0
lemmas.statement: (n : int) : 0 <= n => bin n 0 = 1

lemmas.name: binn
lemmas.statement: (n : int) : 0 <= n => bin n n = 1

lemmas.name: bin0n
lemmas.statement: (m : int) : bin 0 m = b2i (m = 0)

lemmas.name: binSn
lemmas.statement:
n m : 0 <= n => 0 <= m =>
  bin (n + 1) (m + 1) = bin n (m + 1) + bin n m

lemmas.name: ge0_bin
lemmas.statement: (n k : int) : 0 <= bin n k

lemmas.name: bin_gt
lemmas.statement: (n k : int) : n < k => bin n k = 0

lemmas.name: binomial
lemmas.statement:
(x y : t) n : 0 <= n => exp (x + y) n =
  BAdd.bigi predT (fun i => intmul (exp x i * exp y (n - i)) (bin n i)) 0 (n + 1)

lemmas.name: binomial
lemmas.statement:
(x y : real) n : 0 <= n => (x + y) ^ n =
  Bigreal.BRA.bigi predT (fun i => (bin n i)%r * (x ^ i * y ^ (n - i))) 0 (n + 1)

lemmas.name: mul1c
lemmas.statement: : left_id e ( * )

lemmas.name: mulc1
lemmas.statement: : right_id e ( * )

lemmas.name: mulcA
lemmas.statement: : associative ( * )

lemmas.name: mulVc
lemmas.statement: : left_inverse e inv ( * )

lemmas.name: mulcV
lemmas.statement: : right_inverse e inv ( * )

lemmas.name: mulcI
lemmas.statement: : right_injective ( * )

lemmas.name: mulIc
lemmas.statement: : left_injective ( * )

lemmas.name: invM
lemmas.statement: x y : inv (x * y) = inv y * inv x

lemmas.name: invc1
lemmas.statement: : inv e = e

lemmas.name: invK
lemmas.statement: : involutive inv

lemmas.name: inv_inj
lemmas.statement: : injective inv

lemmas.name: com_refl
lemmas.statement: (x : group) : x \com x

lemmas.name: com_sym
lemmas.statement: : commutative (\com)

lemmas.name: com1
lemmas.statement: x : x \com e

lemmas.name: comMr
lemmas.statement: x y z : x \com y => x \com z => x \com (y * z)

lemmas.name: comVr
lemmas.statement: x y : x \com y => x \com inv y

lemmas.name: comXr
lemmas.statement: x y k : x \com y => x \com (y ^+ k)

lemmas.name: comXzr
lemmas.statement: x y k : x \com y => x \com (y ^ k)

lemmas.name: exppN
lemmas.statement: x (k : int) : x ^+ (-k) = x ^+ k

lemmas.name: expp_abs
lemmas.statement: x (k : int) : x ^+ `|k| = x ^+ k

lemmas.name: exppcM_com
lemmas.statement:
x y k : x \com y =>
  (x * y) ^+ k = (x ^+ k) * (y ^+ k)

lemmas.name: exppcV
lemmas.statement: x k : (inv x) ^+ k = inv (x ^+ k)

lemmas.name: exp0

lemmas.name: exp1

lemmas.name: dbfunE

(c : real) (pT pF : t -> bool) :
  0%r <= c <= 1%r => (forall x, !(pT x /\ pF x)) =>

  mu (dbfun c) (fun f =>
         (forall x, pT x =>  f x)
      /\ (forall x, pF x => !f x)) =

    (      c) ^ (count pT FinT.enum)
  * (1%r - c) ^ (count pF FinT.enum)

  mu (dbfun c) (fun f =>
         (forall x, x \in lT => f x)
      /\ (forall x, x \in lF => !f x)) =
    (      c) ^ (size lT)
  * (1%r - c) ^ (size lF)

    mu (dbfun c) (fun f =>
         (forall x, x \in lT => f x)
      /\ (forall x, x \in lF => !f x))
