lemmas.statement:
n (d:'a distr):
  0 <= n => weight (dlist d (n + 1)) = weight d * weight (dlist d n)

lemmas.name: weight_dlist
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) n :
 0 <= n => weight (dlist d n) = (weight d)^n

lemmas.name: dlist_fu
lemmas.statement:
(d: 'a distr) (xs:'a list):
  (forall x, x \in xs => x \in d) =>
  xs \in dlist d (size xs)

lemmas.name: dlist_uni
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) n :
  is_uniform d => is_uniform (dlist d n)

lemmas.name: dlist_dmap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) n :
  dlist (dmap d f) n = dmap (dlist d n) (map f)

lemmas.name: dlist_rev
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) n s:
  mu1 (dlist d n) (rev s) =  mu1 (dlist d n) s

lemmas.name: dlist_dlist
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (m n : int) :
  0 <= m => 0 <= n =>
    dmap (dlist (dlist d m) n) flatten = dlist d (m * n)

lemmas.name: dlist_insert
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x0 : 'a) (i n : int) (d : 'a distr) :
  0 <= n => 0 <= i <= n => dlist d (n+1) =
    dmap (d `*` dlist d n) (fun x_xs : 'a * 'a list => insert x_xs.`1 x_xs.`2 i)

lemmas.name: dlist_set2E
lemmas.statement:
x0 (d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) n (I J : int fset) :
  is_lossless d => 0 <= n =>
  (forall i, i \in I => 0 <= i && i < n) =>
  (forall j, j \in J => 0 <= j && j < n) =>
  (forall k, !(k \in I /\ k \in J)) =>
  mu (dlist d n)
     (fun xs => (forall i, i \in I => p (nth x0 xs i)) /\
                (forall j, j \in J => !p (nth x0 xs j)))
  = (mu d p)^(card I) * (mu d (predC p))^(card J)

lemmas.name: dlist_setE
lemmas.statement:
x0 (d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) n (I : int fset) :
  is_lossless d => 0 <= n => (forall i, i \in I => 0 <= i && i < n) =>
  mu (dlist d n) (fun xs => forall i, i \in I => p (nth x0 xs i)) = (mu d p)^(card I)

lemmas.name: dmap_dlist_partial_perm
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x0 : 'a) (d : 'a distr) (f : int -> int) (n k : int) :
     0 <= k
  => 0 <= n
  => is_lossless d
  => (forall i j, 0 <= i < k => 0 <= j < k => f i = f j => i = j)
  => (forall i, 0 <= i < k => 0 <= f i < n)
  =>   dmap (dlist d n) (fun xs => mkseq (fun i => nth x0 xs (f i)) k)
     = dlist d k

lemmas.name: pr_Sample
lemmas.statement: _n &m xs: Pr[Sample.sample(_n) @ &m: res = xs] = mu (dlist d _n) (pred1 xs)

lemmas.name: sample_r
lemmas.statement:
&m d0 f0 a :
  Pr[S.sample(d0, f0) @ &m : res = a] = mu1 (dmap d0 f0) a

lemmas.name: dletdepE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (da : 'a distr) (db : 'a -> 'b distr) :
  dlet da (fun a => dmap (db a) (fun b => (a, b))) =
  dlet da (fun a => dunit a `*` db a)

lemmas.name: supp_dexcepted
lemmas.statement:
(x:'a) d P :
  support (d \ P) x <=> (support d x /\ !P x)

lemmas.name: dexcepted1E
lemmas.statement:
d P (x : 'a) :
  mu1 (d \ P) x
  = if   P x
    then 0%r
    else (mu1 d x / (weight d - mu d (P)))

lemmas.name: dexcepted1E_notin
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) P x:
  !P x => mu1 (d \ P) x = (mu1 d x / (weight d - mu d (P)))

lemmas.name: dexcepted1E_in
lemmas.statement:
d P (x:'a):
  P x => mu1 (d \ P) x = 0%r

lemmas.name: dexceptedE
lemmas.statement:
d P (E : 'a -> bool) :
  mu (d \ P) E
  = mu d (predI E (predC P)) / (weight d - mu d P)

lemmas.name: weight_dexcepted
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) P :
  weight (d \ P) = b2r (weight d <> mu d P)

lemmas.name: dexcepted_ll
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) P:
  is_lossless d => mu d P < 1%r =>
  is_lossless (d \ P)

lemmas.name: dexcepted_uni
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) P:
  is_uniform d => is_uniform (d \ P)

lemmas.name: dexcepted_dscale
lemmas.statement: (dt : 'a distr) X: dt \ X = (dscale dt) \ X

lemmas.name: pr_direct
lemmas.statement:
&m x' X' P:
  Pr[S.direct(x',X') @ &m: P res] = mu (dt x' \ X' x') P

lemmas.name: pr_indirect
lemmas.statement:
&m x' X' P:
  Pr[S.indirect(x',X') @ &m: P res] = weight (dt x') * mu (dt x' \ X' x') P

lemmas.name: ll_pr_indirect
lemmas.statement:
&m x' X' P:
     is_lossless (dt x')
  => Pr[S.indirect(x',X') @ &m: P res] = mu (dt x' \ X' x') P

lemmas.name: indirect_direct
lemmas.statement:
&m x X P:
    Pr[S.indirect(x,X) @ &m: P res]
  = weight (dt x) * Pr[S.direct(x,X) @ &m: P res]

lemmas.name: ll_direct_indirect
lemmas.statement:
&m x X P:
     is_lossless (dt x)
  => Pr[S.direct(x,X) @ &m: P res] = Pr[S.indirect(x,X) @ &m: P res]

lemmas.name: pr_sampleE
lemmas.statement:
&m x X P :
  Pr[SampleE.sample(x, X) @ &m : P res] = mu (dt x \ X x) P

lemmas.name: phoare_sampleE
lemmas.statement:
P :
  phoare [SampleE.sample : true ==> P res ] = (mu (dt i \ test i) P)

lemmas.name: pr_sampleI
lemmas.statement:
&m x' X' P :
  is_lossless (dt x') =>
  Pr[SampleI.sample(x',X') @ &m : P res] = mu (dt x' \ X' x') P

lemmas.name: pr_sampleWi
lemmas.statement:
&m x y X P :
  is_lossless (dt x) =>
    Pr[SampleWi.sample(x,y,X) @ &m : P res]
  = if X x y then mu (dt x \ X x) P else b2r (P y)

lemmas.name: phoare_sampleWi
lemmas.statement:
P :
    phoare [SampleWi.sample : is_lossless (dt i) ==> P res]
  = (if test i r then mu (dt i \ test i) P else b2r (P r))

lemmas.name: pr_sampleW
lemmas.statement:
&m x X P :
  is_lossless (dt x) =>
  Pr[SampleW.sample(x, X) @ &m : P res] = mu (dt x \ X x) P

lemmas.name: sampleE_sampleI_pr
lemmas.statement:
&m x X P :
     is_lossless (dt x)
  => Pr[SampleE.sample(x,X) @ &m: P res] = Pr[SampleI.sample(x,X) @ &m: P res]

lemmas.name: sampleE_sampleWi_pr
lemmas.statement:
&m x y X P:
     is_lossless (dt x)
  => X x y
  => Pr[SampleE.sample(x,X) @ &m: P res] = Pr[SampleWi.sample(x,y,X) @ &m: P res]

lemmas.name: sampleE_sampleW_pr
lemmas.statement:
&m x X P:
     is_lossless (dt x)
  => Pr[SampleE.sample(x,X) @ &m: P res] = Pr[SampleW.sample(x,X) @ &m: P res]

lemmas.name: sampleE_fixed
lemmas.statement:
&m x P :
    Pr[SampleE.sample(x) @ &m : P res]
  = Pr[WS.SampleE.sample(x,test) @ &m : P res]

lemmas.name: pr_sampleE
lemmas.statement:
&m x P :
  Pr[SampleE.sample(x) @ &m : P res] = mu (dt x \ test x) P

lemmas.name: sampleI_fixed
lemmas.statement:
&m x P :
    Pr[SampleI.sample(x) @ &m : P res]
  = Pr[WS.SampleI.sample(x,test) @ &m : P res]

lemmas.name: pr_sampleI
lemmas.statement:
&m x P :
  is_lossless (dt x)
  => Pr[SampleI.sample(x) @ &m : P res] = mu (dt x \ test x) P

lemmas.name: sampleWi_fixed
lemmas.statement:
&m x y P :
    Pr[SampleWi.sample(x,y) @ &m : P res]
  = Pr[WS.SampleWi.sample(x,y,test) @ &m : P res]

lemmas.name: pr_sampleWi
lemmas.statement:
&m x y P :
  is_lossless (dt x)
  =>   Pr[SampleWi.sample(x,y) @ &m : P res]
     = if test x y then mu (dt x \ test x) P else b2r (P y)

lemmas.name: sampleW_fixed
lemmas.statement:
&m x P :
    Pr[SampleW.sample(x) @ &m : P res]
  = Pr[WS.SampleW.sample(x,test) @ &m : P res]

lemmas.name: pr_sampleW
lemmas.statement:
&m x P :
  is_lossless (dt x)
  => Pr[SampleW.sample(x) @ &m : P res] = mu (dt x \ test x) P

lemmas.name: sampleE_sampleI_pr
lemmas.statement:
&m x P:
  is_lossless (dt x)
  => Pr[SampleE.sample(x) @ &m: P res] = Pr[SampleI.sample(x) @ &m: P res]

lemmas.name: sampleE_sampleWi_pr
lemmas.statement:
&m x y P:
     is_lossless (dt x)
  => test x y
  => Pr[SampleE.sample(x) @ &m: P res] = Pr[SampleWi.sample(x,y) @ &m: P res]

lemmas.name: sampleE_sampleW_pr
lemmas.statement:
&m x P:
     is_lossless (dt x)
  => Pr[SampleE.sample(x) @ &m: P res] = Pr[SampleW.sample(x) @ &m: P res]

lemmas.name: isdistr_mfilter
lemmas.statement:
(m : 'a -> real) (P : 'a -> bool) :
  isdistr m =>
  isdistr (mfilter m P)

lemmas.name: dfilter1E
lemmas.statement:
d (P:'a -> bool) (x:'a):
  mu1 (dfilter d P) x = if P x then 0%r else mu1 d x

lemmas.name: dfilter1E_notin
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) P x:
  !P x => mu1 (dfilter d P) x = mu1 d x

lemmas.name: dfilter1E_in
lemmas.statement:
d P (x:'a):
  P x => mu1 (dfilter d P) x = 0%r

lemmas.name: dfilterE
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) P E:
  mu (dfilter d P) E = mu d (predI E (predC (P)))

lemmas.name: dfilterE_subset
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) P E:
  (forall x, E x => P x) =>
  mu (dfilter d P) E = 0%r

lemmas.name: dfilterE_indep
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) P E:
  (forall x, !(E x /\ P x)) =>
  mu (dfilter d P) E = mu d E

lemmas.name: supp_dfilter
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) P x:
  x \in (dfilter d P) <=> (x \in d /\ !P x)

lemmas.name: weight_dfilter
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) P:
  weight (dfilter d P) = weight d - mu d P

lemmas.name: mu_mass
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (E : 'a -> bool):
  mu d E = sum (fun x => if E x then mass d x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: massE
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d : 'a distr) x : mass d x = mu1 d x

lemmas.name: muE
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (E : 'a -> bool):
  mu d E = sum (fun x => if E x then mu1 d x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: eq_isdistr
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a -> real) :
  d1 == d2 => isdistr d1 = isdistr d2

lemmas.name: ge0_isdistr
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a -> real) x : isdistr d => 0%r <= d x

lemmas.name: le1_isdistr
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a -> real) x : isdistr d => d x <= 1%r

lemmas.name: le1_sum_isdistr
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a -> real) s :
  isdistr d => uniq s => big predT d s <= 1%r

lemmas.name: distrW
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a distr -> bool):
  (forall m, isdistr m => P (mk m)) => forall d, P d

lemmas.name: massK
lemmas.statement: (m : 'a -> real): isdistr m => mass (mk m) = m

lemmas.name: muK
lemmas.statement: (m : 'a -> real) x : isdistr m => mu1 (mk m) x = m x

lemmas.name: muK'
lemmas.statement: (m : 'a -> real) : isdistr m => mu1 (mk m) = m

lemmas.name: mkK
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr): mk (mu1 d) = d

lemmas.name: ge0_mu1
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d : 'a distr) (x : 'a) : 0%r <= mu1 d x

lemmas.name: le1_mu1_fin
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (s : 'a list) :
  uniq s => big predT (mu1 d) s <= 1%r

lemmas.name: le1_mu1
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d : 'a distr) x : mu1 d x <= 1%r

lemmas.name: isdistr_mu1
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) : isdistr (mu1 d)

lemmas.name: isdistr_comp
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] f (g : 'a -> 'b) :
  injective g => isdistr f => isdistr (f \o g)

lemmas.name: ge0_mu
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) p : 0%r <= mu d p

lemmas.name: summable_mu1
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d : 'a distr) : summable (mu1 d)

lemmas.name: summable_mu1_cond
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) :
  summable (fun x => if p x then mu1 d x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: summable_mu1_wght
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (F : 'a -> real) :
     (forall x, 0%r <= F x <= 1%r)
  => summable (fun x => mu1 d x * F x)

lemmas.name: le1_mu
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) p : mu d p <= 1%r

lemmas.name: mu_bounded
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) : 0%r <= mu d p <= 1%r

lemmas.name: countable_mu1
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr):
  countable (fun x => mu1 d x <> 0%r)

lemmas.name: eq_distr
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a distr):
  (d1 = d2) <=> (forall x, mu1 d1 x = mu1 d2 x)

lemmas.name: isdistr_finP
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) (m : 'a -> real) :
     uniq s
  => (forall x, m x <> 0%r => mem s x)
  => (forall x, 0%r <= m x)
  => (isdistr m <=> (big predT m s <= 1%r))

lemmas.name: ge0_weight
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d : 'a distr) : 0%r <= weight d

lemmas.name: weightE
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) : weight d = sum (mu1 d)

lemmas.name: weight_eq0
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) :
  weight d = 0%r => (forall x, mu1 d x = 0%r)

lemmas.name: supportP
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) x : (x \in d) <=> (mu1 d x <> 0%r)

lemmas.name: supportPn
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) x : (x \notin d) <=> (mu1 d x = 0%r)

lemmas.name: is_losslessP
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) : is_lossless d => weight d = 1%r

lemmas.name: is_fullP
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) x : is_full d => x \in d

lemmas.name: is_full_funiform
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) :
  is_full d => is_uniform d => is_funiform d

lemmas.name: funi_uni
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) : is_funiform d => is_uniform d

lemmas.name: funi_neq0_full
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) :
  is_funiform d => 0%r < weight d => is_full d

lemmas.name: funi_ll_full
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) :
  is_funiform d => is_lossless d => is_full d

lemmas.name: rnd_funi
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) :
  is_funiform d => forall x y, mu1 d x = mu1 d y

lemmas.name: mu_le
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p q : 'a -> bool):
     (forall x, x \in d => p x => q x)
  => mu d p <= mu d q

lemmas.name: mu_sub
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) (p q:('a -> bool)):
  p <= q => mu d p <= mu d q

lemmas.name: mu_eq
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) (p q:'a -> bool):
  p == q => mu d p = mu d q

lemmas.name: eq0_mu
lemmas.statement: ['a] d p : mu<:'a> d p = 0%r => forall x, x \in d => !p x

lemmas.name: mu_eq_support
lemmas.statement:
: forall (d : 'a distr) (p q : 'a -> bool),
  (forall (x : 'a), x \in d => p x = q x) => mu d p = mu d q

lemmas.name: eq1_mu
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) p :
  is_lossless d => (forall x, x \in d => p x) => mu d p = 1%r

lemmas.name: mu0
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) : mu d pred0 = 0%r

lemmas.name: mu0_false
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) :
  (forall x, x \in d => !p x) => mu d p = 0%r

lemmas.name: neq0_mu
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) p :
  mu d p <> 0%r => exists x, x \in d /\ p x

lemmas.name: mu_or
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p q : 'a -> bool):
  mu d (predU p q) = mu d p + mu d q - mu d (predI p q)

lemmas.name: mu_and
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p q : 'a -> bool) :
  mu d (predI p q) = mu d p + mu d q - mu d (predU p q)

lemmas.name: mu_disjoint
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p q : 'a -> bool):
  (predI p q) <= pred0 => mu d (predU p q) = mu d p + mu d q

lemmas.name: mu_disjointL
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p q : 'a -> bool) :
  (forall x, p x => !q x) => mu d (predU p q) = mu d p + mu d q

lemmas.name: mu_split
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p q : 'a -> bool) :
  mu d p = mu d (predI p q) + mu d (predI p (predC q))

lemmas.name: mu_not
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool):
  mu d (predC p) = weight d - mu d p

lemmas.name: witness_support
lemmas.statement:
P (d : 'a distr) :
  0%r < mu d P <=> (exists x, P x /\ x \in d)

lemmas.name: mu_and_weight
lemmas.statement:
['a] P Q (d : 'a distr) : (* FIXME: name *)
  mu d P = weight d => mu d (predI P Q) = mu d Q

lemmas.name: mu_in_weight
lemmas.statement:
['a] P (d : 'a distr) x :
  mu d P = weight d => x \in d => P x

lemmas.name: weightE_support
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d : 'a distr) : weight d = mu d (support d)

lemmas.name: mu_le_weight
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d : 'a distr) p : mu d p <= weight d

lemmas.name: mu_le_eq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d1 d2 : 'a distr) :
  is_lossless d1 =>
  (forall p, mu d1 p <= mu d2 p) =>
  d1 = d2

lemmas.name: mu1_le_eq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d1 d2 : 'a distr) :
  is_lossless d1 =>
  (forall x, mu1 d1 x <= mu1 d2 x) =>
  d1 = d2

lemmas.name: mu1_le_eq_mu1
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d1 d2 : 'a distr) :
  is_lossless d1 =>
  (forall x, mu1 d1 x <= mu1 d2 x) =>
  forall x, mu1 d1 x = mu1 d2 x

lemmas.name: mu_has_le
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (P : 'a -> 'b -> bool) (d : 'a distr) (s : 'b list) :
   mu d (fun a => has (P a) s) <= BRA.big predT (fun b => mu d (fun a => P a b)) s

lemmas.name: mu_has_leM
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (P : 'a -> 'b -> bool) (d : 'a distr) (s : 'b list) r :
  (forall b, b \in s => mu d (fun a => P a b) <= r) =>
  mu d (fun a => has (P a) s) <= (size s)%r * r

lemmas.name: mu_mem_uniq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (s : 'a list) :
  uniq s => mu d (mem s) = BRA.big predT (mu1 d) s

lemmas.name: mu_mem
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (s : 'a list) :
  mu d (mem s) = BRA.big predT (mu1 d) (undup s)

lemmas.name: mu_mem_le
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (s : 'a list) :
  mu d (mem s) <= BRA.big predT (mu1 d) s

lemmas.name: mu_mem_le_mu1
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (s : 'a list) r :
  (forall x, mu1 d x <= r) => mu d (mem s) <= (size s)%r * r

lemmas.name: fin_muE
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (E : 'a -> bool) : is_finite (support d) =>
  mu d E = big E (mu1 d) (to_seq (support d))

lemmas.name: mu_pos_fin
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) eps :
  0%r < eps => is_finite (fun x => eps <= mu1 d x)

lemmas.name: uniform_finite
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) :
  is_uniform d => is_finite (support d)

lemmas.name: mu1_uni
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) x : is_uniform d => mu1 d x =
  if x \in d then weight d / (size (to_seq (support d)))%r else 0%r

lemmas.name: mu1_uni_ll
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) x :
  is_uniform d => is_lossless d => mu1 d x =
    if x \in d then 1%r / (size (to_seq (support d)))%r else 0%r

lemmas.name: eq_funi
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d1 d2 : 'a distr) :
  is_funiform d1 => is_funiform d2 => weight d1 = weight d2 => d1 = d2

lemmas.name: eq_funi_ll
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d1 d2 : 'a distr) :
     is_funiform d1 => is_lossless d1
  => is_funiform d2 => is_lossless d2
  => d1 = d2

lemmas.name: has_fub_mu1
lemmas.statement: (d: 'a distr) : has_fub (mu1 d)

lemmas.name: pmax_ge0
lemmas.statement:
(p: 'a distr) :
  0%r <= p_max p

lemmas.name: pmax_gt0
lemmas.statement:
(p: 'a distr) x :
  x \in p => 0%r < p_max p

lemmas.name: pmax_le1
lemmas.statement:
(p: 'a distr) :
  p_max p <= 1%r

lemmas.name: pmax_upper_bound
lemmas.statement:
(d: 'a distr) (x: 'a) :
  mu1 d x <= p_max d

lemmas.name: uniform_pmaxE
lemmas.statement:
(d: 'a distr) :
  is_uniform d =>
  p_max d = weight d / (size (to_seq (support d)))%r

lemmas.name: isdistr_mnull
lemmas.statement: ['a] : isdistr mnull<:'a>

lemmas.name: dnull1E
lemmas.statement: ['a] : forall x, mu1 dnull<:'a> x = 0%r

lemmas.name: dnullE
lemmas.statement: ['a] (E : 'a -> bool) : mu dnull<:'a> E = 0%r

lemmas.name: weight_dnull
lemmas.statement: ['a] : weight dnull<:'a> = 0%r

lemmas.name: supp_dnull
lemmas.statement: (x:'a) : x \notin dnull

lemmas.name: dnull_uni
lemmas.statement: ['a]: is_uniform dnull<:'a>

lemmas.name: dnull_fu
lemmas.statement: ['a]: is_funiform dnull<:'a>

lemmas.name: support_eq0
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d : 'a distr) : (forall x, x \notin d) => d = dnull

lemmas.name: weight_eq0_dnull
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d : 'a distr) : weight d = 0%r => d = dnull

lemmas.name: distr_0Vmem
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) : d = dnull \/ exists x, x \in d

lemmas.name: pmax_dnull
lemmas.statement: ['a] : p_max dnull<:'a> = 0%r

lemmas.name: perm_eq_ratl
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list):
  perm_eq s1 s2 => eq_ratl s1 s2

lemmas.name: ratl_mem
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  eq_ratl s1 s2 => forall x, mem s1 x <=> mem s2 x

lemmas.name: isdistr_drat
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : isdistr (mrat s)

lemmas.name: dratE
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a list) (x : 'a):
  mu1 (drat s) x = (count (pred1 x) s)%r / (size s)%r

lemmas.name: prratE
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a list) (E : 'a -> bool) :
  mu (drat s) E = (count E s)%r / (size s)%r

lemmas.name: supp_drat
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) x : x \in (drat s) <=> x \in s

lemmas.name: eq_dratP
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  eq_ratl s1 s2 <=> (drat s1 = drat s2)

lemmas.name: perm_eq_drat
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
  perm_eq s1 s2 => drat s1 = drat s2

lemmas.name: eq_sz_dratP
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) : size s1 = size s2 =>
  perm_eq s1 s2 <=> (drat s1 = drat s2)

lemmas.name: drat_ll
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a list) :
  s <> [] => mu (drat s) predT = 1%r

lemmas.name: dunit1E
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x y : 'a):
  mu1 (dunit x) y = b2r (x = y)

lemmas.name: dunit1xx
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x : 'a): mu1 (dunit x) x = 1%r

lemmas.name: dunitE
lemmas.statement:
['a] (E : 'a -> bool) (x : 'a):
  mu (dunit x) E = b2r (E x)

lemmas.name: dunit_ll
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x : 'a): mu (dunit x) predT = 1%r

lemmas.name: supp_dunit
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x x': 'a): x' \in (dunit x) <=> (x' = x)

lemmas.name: dunit_uni
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x : 'a) : is_uniform (dunit x)

lemmas.name: finite_dunit
lemmas.statement: ['a] (x : 'a) : is_finite (support (dunit x))

lemmas.name: pmax_dunit
lemmas.statement:
(x: 'a) :
  p_max (dunit x) = 1%r

lemmas.name: duniform1E
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a list) x :
  mu1 (duniform s) x = if mem s x then 1%r / (size (undup s))%r else 0%r

lemmas.name: duniform1E_uniq
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a list) x : uniq s =>
  mu1 (duniform s) x = if x \in s then 1%r / (size s)%r else 0%r

lemmas.name: eq_duniformP
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a list) :
     (forall x, mem s1 x <=> mem s2 x)
 <=> (duniform s1 = duniform s2)

lemmas.name: duniformE
lemmas.statement:
['a] (E : 'a -> bool) (s : 'a list) :
  mu (duniform s) E = (count E (undup s))%r / (size (undup s))%r

lemmas.name: supp_duniform
lemmas.statement: ['a] (s : 'a list) x: x \in (duniform s) <=> x \in s

lemmas.name: duniform_ll
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a list) :
  s <> [] => is_lossless (duniform s)

lemmas.name: duniform_uni
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : is_uniform (duniform s)

lemmas.name: duniform_fu
lemmas.statement:
(s: 'a list) :
  (forall x, x \in s) =>
  is_full (duniform s)

lemmas.name: finite_duniform
lemmas.statement: ['a] (s : 'a list) : is_finite (support (duniform s))

lemmas.name: dunifin1E
lemmas.statement: (x : t) : mu1 dunifin x = 1%r / card%r

lemmas.name: dunifinE
lemmas.statement:
(E : t -> bool) :
  mu dunifin E = (count E enum)%r / card%r

lemmas.name: supp_dunifin
lemmas.statement: x: x \in dunifin

lemmas.name: dunifin_ll
lemmas.statement: : is_lossless dunifin

lemmas.name: dunifin_uni
lemmas.statement: : is_uniform dunifin

lemmas.name: dunifin_fu
lemmas.statement: : is_full dunifin

lemmas.name: dunifin_funi
lemmas.statement: : is_funiform dunifin

lemmas.name: drange1E
lemmas.statement:
(m n x : int):
  mu1 (drange m n) x = if m <= x < n then 1%r / (n - m)%r else 0%r

lemmas.name: drangeE
lemmas.statement:
(E : int -> bool) (m n : int) :
  mu (drange m n) E = (count E (range m n))%r / (n - m)%r

lemmas.name: supp_drange
lemmas.statement: (m n i : int): i \in drange m n <=> m <= i < n

lemmas.name: drange_ll
lemmas.statement: (m n : int) : m < n => is_lossless (drange m n)

lemmas.name: drange_uni
lemmas.statement: (m n : int) : is_uniform (drange m n)

lemmas.name: pmaxE
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) : exists x, p_max d = mu1 d x

lemmas.name: mode_ge
lemmas.statement: (d: 'a distr) x: mu1 d x <= mu1 d (mode d)

lemmas.name: isdistr_mlet
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b distr) :
  isdistr (mlet d f)

lemmas.name: dlet1E
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b distr) (b : 'b):
  mu1 (dlet d f) b = sum<:'a> (fun a => mu1 d a * mu1 (f a) b)

lemmas.name: dlet_muE
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b distr) (P : 'b -> bool):
  mu (dlet d f) P
  = sum<:'b> (fun b =>
      sum<:'a> (fun a =>
        if P b then mu1 d a * mu1 (f a) b else 0%r))

lemmas.name: summable_dlet
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] d f:
  summable (fun (ab : 'a * 'b) => mu1 d ab.`1 * mu1 (f ab.`1) ab.`2)

lemmas.name: dlet_muE_swap
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b distr) (P : 'b -> bool):
  mu (dlet d f) P
  = sum<:'a> (fun a =>
      sum<:'b> (fun b =>
        if P b then mu1 d a * mu1 (f a) b else 0%r))

lemmas.name: dletE
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (F : 'a -> 'b distr) (E : 'b -> bool) :
  mu (dlet d F) E = sum (fun x => mu1 d x * mu (F x) E)

lemmas.name: dletE_bool
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : bool distr) (F : bool -> 'u distr) E :
  mu (dlet d F) E = mu1 d true * mu (F true) E + mu1 d false * mu (F false) E

lemmas.name: const_weight_dlet
lemmas.statement:
r (d : 'a distr) (F : 'a -> 'b distr) :
  (forall x, weight (F x) = r) => weight (dlet d F) = r * weight d

lemmas.name: weight_dlet
lemmas.statement:
(d:'a distr) (F:'a -> 'b distr) :
  weight (dlet d F) <= weight d

lemmas.name: supp_dlet
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (F : 'a -> 'b distr) (b : 'b) :
  b \in (dlet d F) <=> exists a, a \in d /\ b \in (F a)

lemmas.name: dlet_d_unit
lemmas.statement: (d:'a distr) : dlet d MUnit.dunit = d

lemmas.name: dlet_unit
lemmas.statement: (F:'a -> 'b distr) a : dlet (MUnit.dunit a) F = F a

lemmas.name: dlet_dlet
lemmas.statement:
(d1:'a distr) (F1:'a -> 'b distr) (F2: 'b -> 'c distr):
  dlet (dlet d1 F1) F2 = dlet d1 (fun x1 => dlet (F1 x1) F2)

lemmas.name: dlet_dnull
lemmas.statement: (F:'a -> 'b distr): dlet dnull F = dnull

lemmas.name: dlet_d_dnull
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr): dlet d (fun a => dnull<:'b>) = dnull

lemmas.name: eq_dlet
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (F1 F2 : 'a -> 'b distr) d1 d2 :
  d1 = d2 => F1 == F2 => dlet d1 F1 = dlet d2 F2

lemmas.name: in_eq_dlet
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (F1 F2 : 'a -> 'b distr) (d : _ distr) :
  (forall x, x \in d => F1 x = F2 x) => dlet d F1 = dlet d F2

lemmas.name: mu_dlet_le
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c]
  (d : 'a distr) (F1 : 'a -> 'b distr) (F2 : 'a -> 'c distr) P1 P2 :
  (forall x, x \in d => mu (F1 x) P1 <= mu (F2 x) P2) =>
  mu (dlet d F1) P1 <= mu (dlet d F2) P2

lemmas.name: dlet_ll
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] d f :
     is_lossless d => (forall x, x \in d => is_lossless (f x))
  => is_lossless (dlet<:'a, 'b> d f)

lemmas.name: finite_dlet
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b distr) :
     is_finite (support d)
  => (forall x, x \in d => is_finite (support (f x)))
  => is_finite (support (dlet<:'a, 'b> d f))

lemmas.name: dlet_cst
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d1 : 'a distr) (d2 : 'b distr) :
  is_lossless d1 => dlet d1 (fun _ => d2) = d2

lemmas.name: dfold0
lemmas.statement: ['a] f x : dfold<:'a> f x 0 = dunit x

lemmas.name: dfoldS
lemmas.statement:
['a] f x i : 0 <= i =>
  dfold<:'a> f x (i + 1) = dlet (dfold f x i) (f i)

lemmas.name: dlet_dunit
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] d (f : 'a -> 'b) : dlet d (dunit \o f) = dmap d f

lemmas.name: dmap1E
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) (b : 'b):
  mu1 (dmap d f) b = mu d ((pred1 b) \o f)

lemmas.name: dmap1E_can
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) (g : 'b -> 'a) (b : 'b) :
     cancel g f
  => (forall a, a \in d => g (f a) = a)
  => mu1 (dmap d f) b = mu1 d (g b)

lemmas.name: in_dmap1E_can
lemmas.statement:
(d: 'a distr) (f: 'a -> 'b) (g: 'b -> 'a) (x: 'b):
  f (g x) = x =>
  (forall (y: 'a), y \in d => f y = x => y = g x) =>
  mu1 (dmap d f) x = mu1 d (g x)

lemmas.name: dmapE
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) (P : 'b -> bool):
  mu (dmap d f) P = mu d (P \o f)

lemmas.name: supp_dmap
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) (b : 'b):
  b \in (dmap d f) <=> exists a, a \in d /\ b = f a

lemmas.name: dmap_supp
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d : _ distr) f x :
  x \in d => f x \in dmap<:'a, 'b> d f

lemmas.name: weight_dmap
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) :
  weight (dmap d f) = weight d

lemmas.name: dmap_ll
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) :
  is_lossless d => is_lossless (dmap d f)

lemmas.name: dmap_uni_in_inj
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) :
     (forall (x, y : 'a), x \in d => y \in d => f x = f y => x = y)
  => is_uniform d => is_uniform (dmap d f)

lemmas.name: dmap_duniform
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list) :
     (forall x y, x \in s => y \in s => f x = f y => x = y)
  => dmap (duniform s) f = duniform (map f s)

lemmas.name: dmap_duniform_uniq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'a list) :
  uniq (map f s) => dmap (duniform s) f = duniform (map f s)

lemmas.name: dmap_uni
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) :
  injective f => is_uniform d => is_uniform (dmap d f)

lemmas.name: dmap_funi
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) :
  bijective f => is_funiform d => is_funiform (dmap d f)

lemmas.name: dmap_fu
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) :
  surjective f => is_full d => is_full (dmap d f)

lemmas.name: dmap_fu_in
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) :
     (forall b, exists a, a \in d /\ b = f a)
  => is_full (dmap d f)

lemmas.name: dmap_dunit
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) (x : 'a) :
  dmap (dunit x) f = dunit (f x)

lemmas.name: dmap_id
lemmas.statement: (d: 'a distr) : dmap d (fun x=>x) = d

lemmas.name: dmap_comp
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (f : 'a -> 'b) (g : 'b -> 'c) d :
 dmap (dmap d f) g = dmap d (g \o f)

lemmas.name: dmap_dlet
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] d f g :
  dmap<:'b, 'c> (dlet<:'a, 'b> d f) g = dlet d (fun a => dmap (f a) g)

lemmas.name: dlet_dmap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] d f g :
  dlet<:'b, 'c> (dmap<:'a, 'b> d f) g = dlet d (fun a => g (f a))

lemmas.name: eq_dmap
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] d f g : f == g => dmap<:'a, 'b> d f = dmap d g

lemmas.name: dmap_cst
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d : 'a distr) (b : 'b) :
  is_lossless d => dmap d (fun _ => b) = dunit b

lemmas.name: eq_dmap_in
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d : 'a distr) (f g : 'a -> 'b) :
  (forall x, x \in d => f x = g x) => dmap d f = dmap d g

lemmas.name: dmap_id_eq_in
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) f :
  (forall x, x \in d => f x = x) => dmap d f = d

lemmas.name: iscpl_sym
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] da db d :
  iscoupling<:'a, 'b> da db d => iscoupling db da (dmap d pswap)

lemmas.name: iscpl_weightL
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] da db d :
  iscoupling<:'a, 'b> da db d => weight da = weight d

lemmas.name: iscpl_weightR
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] da db d :
  iscoupling<:'a, 'b> da db d => weight db = weight d

lemmas.name: iscpl_weight
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] da db d :
  iscoupling<:'a, 'b> da db d => weight da = weight db

lemmas.name: iscpl_muL
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] da db d E :
  iscoupling<:'a, 'b> da db d => mu da E = mu d (E \o fst)

lemmas.name: iscpl_muR
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] da db d E :
  iscoupling<:'a, 'b> da db d => mu db E = mu d (E \o snd)

lemmas.name: iscpl_dunit
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] x y :
  iscoupling<:'a, 'b> (dunit x) (dunit y) (dunit (x, y))

lemmas.name: iscpl_dlet
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c 'd] da db d f g fg :
     iscoupling<:'a, 'b> da db d
  => (forall x y, (x, y) \in d => iscoupling (f x) (g y) (fg (x, y)))
  => iscoupling<: 'c, 'd> (dlet da f) (dlet db g) (dlet d fg)

lemmas.name: iscpl_dfold
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (o : int -> 'a -> 'b -> 'a) d1 d2 d x1 x2 k :
  (forall i, 0 <= i < k => iscoupling (d1 i) (d2 i) (d i)) =>

  iscoupling
    (dfold (fun i x => dlet (d1 i) (fun a => dunit (o i x a))) x1 k)
    (dfold (fun i x => dlet (d2 i) (fun a => dunit (o i x a))) x2 k)
    (dfold (fun i (x : _ * _) =>
       (dlet (d i) (fun a : _ * _ => dunit (o i x.`1 a.`1, o i x.`2 a.`2)))) (x1, x2) k)

lemmas.name: isdistr_mscalar
lemmas.statement:
k (m : 'a -> real):
  isdistr m => 0%r <= k <= inv (weight (mk m)) => isdistr (mscalar k m)

lemmas.name: dscalar1E
lemmas.statement:
(k : real) (d : 'a distr) (x : 'a):
  0%r <= k <= inv (weight d) => mu1 (k \cdot d) x = k * mu1 d x

lemmas.name: dscalarE
lemmas.statement:
(k : real) (d : 'a distr) (E : 'a -> bool):
  0%r <= k => k <= inv (weight d) =>
  mu (k \cdot d) E = k * mu d E

lemmas.name: dscalar0r
lemmas.statement: ['a] k : k \cdot dnull<:'a> = dnull

lemmas.name: dscalar1
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d : 'a distr) : 1%r \cdot d = d

lemmas.name: weight_dscalar
lemmas.statement:
(k : real) (d : 'a distr):
  0%r <= k => k <= inv (weight d) =>
  weight (k \cdot d) = k * weight d

lemmas.name: supp_dscalar
lemmas.statement:
(k : real) (d : 'a distr) x:
  0%r < k => k <= inv (weight d) =>
  x \in (k \cdot d) <=> x \in d

lemmas.name: dscalar_fu
lemmas.statement:
(k : real) (d : 'a distr):
  0%r < k => k <= inv (weight d) =>
  is_full d => is_full (k \cdot d)

lemmas.name: dscalar_ll
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr):
  0%r < weight d =>
  is_lossless (inv (weight d) \cdot d)

lemmas.name: dscalar_uni
lemmas.statement:
(k : real) (d : 'a distr):
  0%r < k <= inv (weight d) => is_uniform d => is_uniform (k \cdot d)

lemmas.name: dlet_cst_weight
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] da db :
  dlet<:'a, 'b> da (fun _ => db) = weight da \cdot db

lemmas.name: dscale1E
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (x : 'a) :
  mu1 (dscale d) x = mu1 d x / weight d

lemmas.name: dscaleE
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (E : 'a -> bool) :
  mu (dscale d) E = mu d E / weight d

lemmas.name: weight_dscale
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) :
  weight (dscale d) = if weight d = 0%r then 0%r else 1%r

lemmas.name: supp_dscale
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) x:
  x \in (dscale d) <=> x \in d

lemmas.name: dscale_ll
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) :
  0%r < weight d => is_lossless (dscale d)

lemmas.name: dscale_uni
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) :
  is_uniform d => is_uniform (dscale d)

lemmas.name: isdistr_mopt
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) : isdistr (mopt d)

lemmas.name: dopt1E
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) x : mu1 (dopt d) x = oapp (mu1 d) (1%r - weight d) x

lemmas.name: doptE
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) E :
  mu (dopt d) E =
  mu d (E \o Some) + (if E None then 1%r - weight d else 0%r)

lemmas.name: dopt_ll
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) : is_lossless (dopt d)

lemmas.name: isdistr_mrestrict
lemmas.statement: ['a] d p : isdistr (mrestrict<:'a> d p)

lemmas.name: drestrict1E
lemmas.statement:
['a] d p x :
  mu1 (drestrict<:'a> d p) x = if p x then mu1 d x else 0%r

lemmas.name: drestrictE
lemmas.statement: ['a] d p q : mu (drestrict<:'a> d p) q = mu d (predI p q)

lemmas.name: supp_drestrict
lemmas.statement:
['a] d p x :
  x \in drestrict<:'a> d p <=> (x \in d) /\ p x

lemmas.name: drestrictE_le
lemmas.statement:
['a] d (p q : _ -> bool) :
  q <= p => mu (drestrict<:'a> d p) q = mu d q

lemmas.name: weight_drestrict
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d:'a distr) P:
  weight (drestrict d P) = mu d P

lemmas.name: dcond_supp
lemmas.statement:
(d: 'a distr) (p: 'a -> bool) (x: 'a):
  x \in dcond d p <=> x \in d /\ p x

lemmas.name: dcond_ll
lemmas.statement:
(d: 'a distr) (p: 'a -> bool):
  mu d p > 0%r => is_lossless (dcond d p)

lemmas.name: dcondE
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) (p' : 'a -> bool) :
  mu (dcond d p) p' = mu d (predI p p') / mu d p

lemmas.name: dcond1E
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) (x : 'a):
  mu1 (dcond d p) x = if p x then mu1 d x / mu d p else 0%r

lemmas.name: dcond_uni
lemmas.statement:
(d: 'a distr) P :
  is_uniform d => is_uniform (dcond d P)

lemmas.name: eq_dcond
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p q : 'a -> bool) :
  (forall x, x \in d => p x = q x) => dcond d p = dcond d q

lemmas.name: mu_dcond_ge
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) x :
  p x => mu1 d x <= mu1 (dcond d p) x

lemmas.name: finite_dcond
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) :
  is_finite (support d) => is_finite (support (dcond d p))

lemmas.name: dcondZ
lemmas.statement:
(d: 'a distr) (P: 'a -> bool) :
  mu d P = 0%r <=> dcond d P = dnull

lemmas.name: dcond_dnull
lemmas.statement:
(P: 'a -> bool) :
  dcond dnull P = dnull

lemmas.name: marginal_sampling
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) :
  d = dlet (dmap d f) (fun b => dcond d (fun a => f a = b))

lemmas.name: dcond_dmap
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) (p : 'b -> bool) :
  dcond (dmap d f) p = dmap (dcond d (p \o f)) f

lemmas.name: isdistr_mprod
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] ma mb :
  isdistr<:'a> ma => isdistr<:'b> mb => isdistr (mprod ma mb)

lemmas.name: dprod_def
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr):
  da `*` db = mk (mprod (mu1 da) (mu1 db)) by rewrite/(`*`)

lemmas.name: dprod1E
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr) a b:
  mu1 (da `*` db) (a,b) = mu1 da a * mu1 db b

lemmas.name: dprodE
lemmas.statement:
Pa Pb (da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr):
    mu (da `*` db) (fun (ab : 'a * 'b) => Pa ab.`1 /\ Pb ab.`2)
  = mu da Pa * mu db Pb

lemmas.name: dprodEl
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr) Pa :
  mu (da `*` db) (fun (ab : 'a * 'b) => Pa ab.`1) = mu da Pa * weight db

lemmas.name: dprodEr
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr) Pb :
  mu (da `*` db) (fun (ab : 'a * 'b) => Pb ab.`2) = mu db Pb * weight da

lemmas.name: dprod_dunit
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (x : 'a) (y : 'b) :
  dunit x `*` dunit y = dunit (x, y)

lemmas.name: le_dprod_or
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr) Pa Pb :
   mu (da `*` db) (fun (ab : 'a * 'b) => Pa ab.`1 \/ Pb ab.`2) <=
   mu da Pa * weight db + mu db Pb * weight da

lemmas.name: supp_dprod
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr) ab:
  ab \in da `*` db <=> ab.`1 \in da /\ ab.`2 \in db

lemmas.name: weight_dprod
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr):
  weight (da `*` db) = weight da * weight db

lemmas.name: dprod_ll
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr):
  is_lossless (da `*` db) <=> is_lossless da /\ is_lossless db

lemmas.name: dprod_ll_auto
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr):
  is_lossless da => is_lossless db => is_lossless (da `*` db)

lemmas.name: dprod_uni
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr):
  is_uniform da => is_uniform db => is_uniform (da `*` db)

lemmas.name: dprod_funi
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr):
  is_funiform da => is_funiform db => is_funiform (da `*` db)

lemmas.name: dprod_fu
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr):
  is_full (da `*` db) <=> (is_full da /\ is_full db)

lemmas.name: dprod_fu_auto
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr):
  is_full da => is_full db => is_full (da `*` db)

lemmas.name: dprod_dlet
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr):
  da `*` db = dlet da (fun a => dlet db (fun b => dunit (a, b)))

lemmas.name: finite_dprod
lemmas.statement:
(da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr) :
     is_finite (support da)
  => is_finite (support db)
  => is_finite (support (da `*` db))

lemmas.name: dmap_dprod
lemmas.statement:
['a1 'a2 'b1 'b2]
  (d1 : 'a1 distr ) (d2 : 'a2 distr )
  (f1 : 'a1 -> 'b1) (f2 : 'a2 -> 'b2)
:
    dmap d1 f1 `*` dmap d2 f2
  = dmap (d1 `*` d2) (fun xy : _ * _ => (f1 xy.`1, f2 xy.`2))

lemmas.name: dprod_partition
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (E : 'a * 'b -> bool) (da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr)
: mu (da `*` db) E = sum (fun a => mu db (fun b => E (a, b)) * mu1 da a)

lemmas.name: dmap_dprod_comp
lemmas.statement:
['a1 'a2 'b1 'b2 'c]
  (d1 : 'a1 distr) (d2 : 'a2 distr) (f1 : 'a1 -> 'b1) (f2 : 'a2 -> 'b2) h :
    dmap (d1 `*` d2) (fun xy : _ * _ => h (f1 xy.`1) (f2 xy.`2))
  = dmap<:_, 'c> (dmap d1 f1 `*` dmap d2 f2) (fun xy : _ * _ => h xy.`1 xy.`2)

lemmas.name: dmap_dprodL
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (d1 : 'a distr) (d2 : 'b distr) (f : 'a -> 'c) :
  dmap d1 f `*` d2 = dmap (d1 `*` d2) (fun xy : _ * _ => (f xy.`1, xy.`2))

lemmas.name: dmap_dprodR
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (d1 : 'a distr) (d2 : 'b distr) (f : 'b -> 'c) :
  d1 `*` dmap d2 f = dmap (d1 `*` d2) (fun xy : _ * _ => (xy.`1, f xy.`2))

lemmas.name: dmap_bij
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d1 : 'a distr) (d2: 'b distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) (g : 'b -> 'a) :
     (forall x, x \in d1 => f x \in d2)
  => (forall x, x \in d2 => mu1 d2 x = mu1 d1 (g x))
  => (forall a, a \in d1 => g (f a) = a)
  => (forall b, b \in d2 => f (g b) = b)
  => dmap d1 f = d2

lemmas.name: dlet_swap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (d1 : 'a distr) (d2 : 'b distr) (F : 'a -> 'b -> 'c distr):
    dlet d1 (fun x1 => dlet d2 (F x1))
  = dlet d2 (fun x2 => (dlet d1 (fun x1 => F x1 x2)))

lemmas.name: dprodC
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d1 : 'a distr) (d2 : 'b distr) :
  d1 `*` d2 = dmap (d2 `*` d1) (fun (p : 'b * 'a) => (p.`2, p.`1))

lemmas.name: dmap_dprodE
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] d1 d2 f :
  dmap<:'a * 'b, 'c> (d1 `*` d2) f = dlet d1 (fun x => dmap d2 (fun y => f (x, y)))

lemmas.name: dmap_dprodE_swap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] d1 d2 f :
  dmap<:'a * 'b, 'c> (d1 `*` d2) f = dlet d2 (fun y => dmap d1 (fun x => f (x, y)))

lemmas.name: dprod_marginalL
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr) (f : 'a -> 'c) :
    dmap (da `*` db) (fun ab : 'a * 'b => f ab.`1)
  = weight db \cdot dmap da f

lemmas.name: dprod_marginalR
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr) (f : 'b -> 'c) :
    dmap (da `*` db) (fun ab : 'a * 'b => f ab.`2)
  = weight da \cdot dmap db f

lemmas.name: dprod_dmap_cross
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'ab 'ac 'bd 'cd]
  (da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr) (dc : 'c distr) (dd : 'd distr)
  (Fab : 'a * 'b -> 'ab)
  (Fcd : 'c * 'd -> 'cd)
  (F   : 'ab -> 'cd -> 'e)
  (Fac : 'a * 'c -> 'ac)
  (Fbd : 'b * 'd -> 'bd)
  (G   : 'ac -> 'bd -> 'e)
:
  (forall a b c d, F (Fab (a, b)) (Fcd (c, d)) = G (Fac (a, c)) (Fbd (b, d))) =>

  dlet
    (dmap (da `*` db) Fab)
    (fun ab =>
      dmap
        (dmap (dc `*` dd) Fcd)
        (fun cd => F ab cd))
  = dlet
      (dmap (da `*` dc) Fac)
      (fun ac =>
        dmap
          (dmap (db `*` dd) Fbd)
          (fun bd => G ac bd))

lemmas.name: dprod_cross
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c 'd 'e]
  (da : 'a distr) (db : 'b distr) (dc : 'c distr) (dd : 'd distr)
  (F  : 'a -> 'b -> 'c -> 'd -> 'e)
:
  dlet
    (da `*` db)
    (fun ab : 'a * 'b =>
      dmap
        (dc `*` dd)
        (fun cd : 'c * 'd => F ab.`1 ab.`2 cd.`1 cd.`2))
  = dlet
      (da `*` dc)
      (fun ac : 'a * 'c =>
        dmap
          (db `*` dd)
          (fun bd : 'b * 'd => F ac.`1 bd.`1 ac.`2 bd.`2))

lemmas.name: djoin_axE
lemmas.statement:
(ds : 'a distr list): djoin ds = foldr
   (fun d1 dl => dapply (fun xy : _ * _ => xy.`1 :: xy.`2) (d1 `*` dl))
   (dunit []) ds by rewrite/djoin

lemmas.name: djoin_nil
lemmas.statement: ['a]: djoin<:'a> [] = dunit []

lemmas.name: djoin_cons
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (ds : 'a distr list):
 djoin (d :: ds) = dapply (fun xy : _ * _ => xy.`1 :: xy.`2) (d `*` djoin ds)

lemmas.name: djoin1E
lemmas.statement:
(ds : 'a distr list) xs: mu1 (djoin ds) xs =
  if   size ds = size xs
  then BRM.big predT (fun xy : _ * _ => mu1 xy.`1 xy.`2) (zip ds xs)
  else 0%r

lemmas.name: djoin_nil1E
lemmas.statement:
(ds : 'a list):
  mu1 (djoin []) ds = b2r (ds = [])

lemmas.name: djoin_cons1E
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (ds : 'a distr list) x xs :
  mu1 (djoin (d :: ds)) (x :: xs) = mu1 d x * mu1 (djoin ds) xs

lemmas.name: djoin_cons1nilE
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (ds: ('a distr) list):
  mu1 (djoin (d::ds)) [] = 0%r

lemmas.name: supp_djoin
lemmas.statement:
(ds : 'a distr list) xs : xs \in djoin ds <=>
  size ds = size xs /\ all (fun (xy : _ * _) => support xy.`1 xy.`2) (zip ds xs)

lemmas.name: supp_djoin_cons
lemmas.statement:
['a] us d ds :
  us \in djoin<:'a> (d :: ds) =>
    exists v vs, v \in d /\ vs \in djoin ds

lemmas.name: supp_djoin_size
lemmas.statement:
(ds : 'a distr list) xs :
  xs \in djoin ds => size xs = size ds

lemmas.name: djoin_cat
lemmas.statement:
['a] ds1 ds2 : djoin<:'a> (ds1 ++ ds2) =
  dmap (djoin ds1 `*` djoin ds2) (fun xs : _ * _ => xs.`1 ++ xs.`2)

lemmas.name: djoin_perm_s1s
lemmas.statement:
['a] ds1 d ds2 :
  djoin<:'a> (ds1 ++ d :: ds2) =
    dlet (djoin ds1 `*` djoin ds2)
      (fun ds : _ * _ => dmap d (fun x => ds.`1 ++ x :: ds.`2))

lemmas.name: djoin_seq1
lemmas.statement: ['a] d : djoin<:'a> [d] = dmap d (fun x => [x])

lemmas.name: djoin_rcons
lemmas.statement:
['a] ds d : djoin<:'a> (rcons ds d) =
  dmap (djoin ds `*` d) (fun xsx : _ * _ => rcons xsx.`1 xsx.`2)

lemmas.name: weight_djoin
lemmas.statement:
(ds : 'a distr list) :
  weight (djoin ds) = BRM.big predT weight ds

lemmas.name: djoin_ll
lemmas.statement:
(ds : 'a distr list):
  (forall d, d \in ds => is_lossless d) => is_lossless (djoin ds)

lemmas.name: weight_djoin_nil
lemmas.statement: : weight (djoin<:'a> []) = 1%r

lemmas.name: weight_djoin_cons
lemmas.statement:
d (ds:'a distr list):
  weight (djoin (d :: ds)) = weight d * weight (djoin ds)

lemmas.name: djoin_nilE
lemmas.statement: P : mu (djoin<:'a> []) P = b2r (P [])

lemmas.name: djoin_consE
lemmas.statement:
(dflt:'a) (d: 'a distr) ds P Q :
    mu
      (djoin (d :: ds))
      (fun xs => P (head dflt xs) /\ Q (behead xs))
  = mu d P * mu (djoin ds) Q

lemmas.name: djoin_fu
lemmas.statement:
(ds : 'a distr list) (xs : 'a list):
     size ds = size xs
  => (forall d x, d \in ds => x \in d)
  => xs \in djoin ds

lemmas.name: djoin_uni
lemmas.statement:
(ds:'a distr list):
  (forall d, d \in ds => is_uniform d) => is_uniform (djoin ds)

lemmas.name: djoin_dmap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] (d : 'a -> 'b distr) (xs : 'a list) (f : 'b -> 'c):
  dmap (djoin (map d xs)) (map f) = djoin (map (fun x => dmap (d x) f) xs)

lemmas.name: djoin_dmap_nseq
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] n (d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> 'b) :
  dmap (djoin (nseq n d)) (map f) = djoin (nseq n (dmap d f))

lemmas.name: supp_djoinmap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d : 'a -> 'b distr) xs ys:
  ys \in djoinmap d xs <=> size xs = size ys /\
    all (fun xy => support (d (fst xy)) (snd xy)) (zip xs ys)

lemmas.name: le_djoin_size
lemmas.statement:
(ds : 'a distr list) (x : 'a) r:
  (forall d y, d \in ds => mu1 d y <= r) =>
  mu (djoin ds) (fun s : 'a list => x \in s) <= (size ds)%r * r

lemmas.name: djoinmap_dlet
lemmas.statement:
(d1 : 'a -> 'b distr) (d2: 'a -> 'b -> 'c distr) xs :
djoinmap (fun x => dlet (d1 x) (d2 x)) xs =
dlet (djoinmap d1 xs) (fun x1s => djoinmap (fun (p:_*_) => d2 p.`1 p.`2) (zip xs x1s))

lemmas.name: isdistr_madd
lemmas.statement:
(df dg : 'a distr) :
  weight df + weight dg <= 1%r => isdistr (madd df dg)

lemmas.name: dadd1E
lemmas.statement:
['a] (df dg : 'a distr) x :
  weight df + weight dg <= 1%r => mu1 (df + dg) x = mu1 df x + mu1 dg x

lemmas.name: daddE
lemmas.statement:
['a] (df dg : 'a distr) x :
  weight df + weight dg <= 1%r => mu (df + dg) x = mu df x + mu dg x

lemmas.name: mfunE
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) (f : t -> 'u) :
  mfun d f = mu1 (djoin (map d FinT.enum)) (map f FinT.enum)

lemmas.name: isdistr_dfun
lemmas.statement: ['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) : isdistr (mfun d)

lemmas.name: dfun1E
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) f :
  mu1 (dfun d) f = BRM.big predT (fun x => mu1 (d x) (f x)) FinT.enum

lemmas.name: dfun1E_djoin
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) f :
  mu1 (dfun d) f = mu1 (djoinmap d FinT.enum) (map f FinT.enum)

lemmas.name: offunK
lemmas.statement: ['u] : cancel offun<:'u> tofun

lemmas.name: tofunK
lemmas.statement:
['u] us :
  size us = FinT.card => offun<:'u> (tofun us) = us

lemmas.name: dfun_dmap
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) :
  dfun d = dmap (djoinmap d FinT.enum) tofun

lemmas.name: dfun_supp
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) (f : t -> 'u) :
  f \in dfun d <=> (forall x, f x \in d x)

lemmas.name: dfun_fu
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) :
  (forall x, is_full (d x)) => is_full (dfun d)

lemmas.name: dfun_uni
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) :
  (forall x, is_uniform (d x)) => is_uniform (dfun d)

lemmas.name: dfun_funi
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) :
     (forall x, is_uniform (d x))
  => (forall x, is_full (d x))
  => is_funiform (dfun d)

lemmas.name: dfunE_djoin
lemmas.statement:
['u] du (E : (t -> 'u) -> bool) : mu (dfun du) E =
  mu (djoinmap du FinT.enum) (E \o tofun)

lemmas.name: dfunE
lemmas.statement:
['u] du (p : t -> 'u -> bool) :
    mu (dfun du) (fun (f : t -> 'u) => forall x, p x (f x))
  = BRM.big predT (fun x => mu (du x) (p x)) FinT.enum

lemmas.name: weight_dfun
lemmas.statement:
['u] (df : t -> 'u distr) :
  weight (dfun df) = BRM.big predT (fun x => weight (df x)) FinT.enum

lemmas.name: dfun_ll
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) :
  (forall x, is_lossless (d x)) => is_lossless (dfun d)

lemmas.name: dlet_dfun
lemmas.statement:
(d1 : t -> 'u distr) (d2 : t -> 'u -> 'v distr) :
  dlet (dfun d1) (fun f1 => dfun (fun (x:t) => d2 x (f1 x))) =
  dfun (fun x => dlet (d1 x) (fun x1 => d2 x x1))

lemmas.name: dfun_unit
lemmas.statement: (f : t -> 'u) : dfun (fun x => dunit (f x)) = dunit f

lemmas.name: dmap_dfun
lemmas.statement:
(d : t -> 'u distr) (F: t -> 'u -> 'v) :
  dmap (dfun d) (fun f x => F x (f x)) =
  dfun (fun x => dmap (d x) (fun fx => F x fx))

lemmas.name: dfun1E_fix1
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) x0 f :
  mu1 (dfun d) f = mu1 (d x0) (f x0) * mu1 (dfun d.[x0 <- dunit (f x0)]) f

lemmas.name: dlet_dfun_fupdate_ll
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) x0 v :
  dlet
    (dfun d.[x0 <- dunit v])
    (fun f => dmap (d x0) (fun y => f.[x0 <- y]))
  = dfun d

lemmas.name: dfunE_dlet_fix1
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) x0 :
  dfun d = dlet (d x0) (fun v => dfun d.[x0 <- dunit v])

lemmas.name: dlet_dfun_update
lemmas.statement:
['u] (d : t -> 'u distr) x0 :
  dlet
    (dfun d)
    (fun f => dmap (d x0) (fun y => f.[x0 <- y]))
  = weight (d x0) \cdot dfun d

lemmas.name: dfun_projE
lemmas.statement:
['u] (df : t -> 'u distr)  x :
    dmap (dfun df) (fun f => f x)
  = (weight (dfun df) / weight (df x)) \cdot df x

lemmas.name: eq_from_dfun_proj_eq
lemmas.statement:
['u] (df1 df2 : t -> 'u distr) :
     (forall x, is_lossless (df1 x))
  => (forall x, is_lossless (df2 x))
  => (forall x,
         dmap (dfun df1) (fun f => f x)
       = dmap (dfun df2) (fun f => f x))
  => df1 == df2

lemmas.name: dfun_prod1E
lemmas.statement:
['u 'v] (df : t -> 'u distr) (dg : t -> 'v distr) f g :
    mu1 (dfun (fun x => df x `*` dg x)) (fun x => (f x, g x))
  = mu1 (dfun df) f * mu1 (dfun dg) g

lemmas.name: dprod_funE
lemmas.statement:
['u 'v] (df : t -> 'u distr) (dg : t -> 'v distr) :
  dfun df `*` dfun dg =
    dmap
      (dfun (fun x => df x `*` dg x))
      (fun fg => (fst \o fg, snd \o fg))

lemmas.name: dfun_prodE
lemmas.statement:
['u 'v] (df : t -> 'u distr) (dg : t -> 'v distr):
    dfun (fun x => df x `*` dg x)
  = dmap
      (dfun df `*` dfun dg)
      (fun fg : _ * _ => fun x => (fg.`1 x, fg.`2 x))

lemmas.name: dfun_condE
lemmas.statement:
['u] (X : t -> bool) (dt df : t -> 'u distr) :
     (forall x, is_lossless (dt x))
  => (forall x, is_lossless (df x))
  =>
       dmap
         (dfun dt `*` dfun df)
         (fun tf : _ * _ => fun x => if X x then tf.`1 x else tf.`2 x)
     = dfun (fun x => if X x then dt x else df x)

lemmas.name: dlet_dfun_cond
lemmas.statement:
['u] (dX : t -> bool distr) (dt df : t -> 'u distr) :
     (forall x, is_lossless (dX x))
  => (forall x, is_lossless (dt x))
  => (forall x, is_lossless (df x))
  =>   dlet (dfun dX) (fun X => dfun (fun x => if X x then dt x else df x))
     = dfun (fun x => dlet (dX x) (fun b => if b then dt x else df x))

lemmas.name: dfun_dcondE
lemmas.statement:
['u] (dX : t -> bool distr) (dt df : t -> 'u distr) :
     (forall x, is_lossless (dX x))
  => (forall x, is_lossless (dt x))
  => (forall x, is_lossless (df x))
  =>
       dlet (dfun dX) (fun X : t -> bool =>
         dmap
           (dfun dt `*` dfun df)
           (fun tf : _ * _ => (fun x => if X x then tf.`1 x else tf.`2 x)))
     = dfun (fun x => (mu1 (dX x) true \cdot dt x) + (mu1 (dX x) false \cdot df x))

lemmas.name: dfun_extend
lemmas.statement:
:
  (forall a, !p a => is_lossless (dA a)) =>
  MC.dfun (fun c => dA (gI c)) = dmap (MA.dfun dA) (fun (f:A -> B) (c:C) => f (gI c))

lemmas.name: dfun_extend_if
lemmas.statement:
:
 (forall a, is_lossless (dA a)) =>
  MA.dfun dA =
   dmap (MA.dfun dA `*` MC.dfun (fun c => dA (gI c)))
     (fun (f : _ * _) (x : A) => if p x then f.`2 (g x) else f.`1 x)

lemmas.name: mbin_support
lemmas.statement: p n k : mbin p n k <> 0%r => 0 <= k <= n

lemmas.name: isdistr_mbin
lemmas.statement: p n : 0%r <= p <= 1%r => isdistr (mbin p n)

lemmas.name: dbin1E
lemmas.statement:
(p : real) (n k : int) : 0%r <= p <= 1%r =>
  mu1 (dbin p n) k = (bin n k)%r * (p ^ k * (1%r - p) ^ (n - k))

lemmas.name: ll_dbin
lemmas.statement: p n : 0 <= n => 0%r <= p <= 1%r => is_lossless (dbin p n)

lemmas.name: supp_dbin
lemmas.statement: p n k : 0%r <= p <= 1%r => k \in dbin p n => 0 <= k <= n

lemmas.name: isdistr_dlim
lemmas.statement: (df : int -> 'a distr) : isdistr (mdlim df)

lemmas.name: hasE_finite
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) f :
  is_finite (support d) => hasE d f

lemmas.name: hasE_uniform
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) f :
  is_uniform d => hasE d f

lemmas.name: eq_hasE
lemmas.statement: ['a] d f g: f == g => hasE<:'a> d f <=> hasE<:'a> d g

lemmas.name: hasE_cond
lemmas.statement:
['a] d f p :
  hasE<:'a> d f => hasE d (fun x => if p x then f x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: hasE_dcond
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) (f : 'a -> real) :
  hasE d f => hasE (dcond d p) f

lemmas.name: eq_expL
lemmas.statement: ['a] (d1 d2 : 'a distr) f : d1 = d2 => E d1 f = E d2 f

lemmas.name: eq_exp
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f g : 'a -> real) :
     (forall x, x \in d => f x = g x)
  => E d f = E d g

lemmas.name: hasE_le
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f g : 'a -> real) :
     hasE d g
  => (forall x, `|f x| <= `|g x|)
  => hasE d f

lemmas.name: hasE_pos
lemmas.statement: ['a] d f : hasE<:'a> d f => hasE<:'a> d (pos f)

lemmas.name: hasE_neg
lemmas.statement: ['a] d f : hasE<:'a> d f => hasE<:'a> d (neg f)

lemmas.name: hasEC
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) (c : real) : hasE d (fun _ => c)

lemmas.name: hasEN
lemmas.statement: ['a] d f : hasE<:'a> d (fun x => -f x)%Real <=> hasE d f

lemmas.name: hasEZ
lemmas.statement: ['a] d f c : hasE<:'a> d f => hasE d (fun x => c * f x)

lemmas.name: hasEZr
lemmas.statement: ['a] d f c : hasE<:'a> d f => hasE d (fun x => f x * c)

lemmas.name: summable_hasE
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> real) :
  summable f => hasE d f

lemmas.name: exp_eq0
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) f :
  (forall x, x \in d => f x = 0%r) => E d f = 0%r

lemmas.name: exp_cond_eq0
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) f p :
  (forall x, x \in d => p x => f x = 0%r) => Ec d f p = 0%r

lemmas.name: exp_ge0
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) f :
  (forall x, x \in d => 0%r <= f x) => 0%r <= E d f

lemmas.name: exp_cond_ge0
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) f p :
  (forall x, x \in d => p x => 0%r <= f x) => 0%r <= Ec d f p

lemmas.name: expC_cond
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (c : real) (P : 'a -> bool) :
  E d (fun x => if P x then c else 0%r) = c * mu d P

lemmas.name: expC
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (c : real) :
  E d (fun _ => c) = c * weight d

lemmas.name: expC_prod
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d1 : 'a distr) (d2 : 'b distr) c :
  E d1 (fun _ => E d2 (fun _ => c)) = E (d1 `*` d2) (fun _ => c)

lemmas.name: expD
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) f1 f2 :
     hasE d f1 => hasE d f2
  => E d (fun x => f1 x + f2 x) = E d f1 + E d f2

lemmas.name: expD_cond
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (f g : 'a -> real) p :
     hasE d (fun x => if p x then f x else 0%r)
  => hasE d (fun x => if p x then g x else 0%r)
  => Ec d (fun x => f x + g x) p = Ec d f p + Ec d g p

lemmas.name: expN
lemmas.statement: ['a] d f : E<:'a> d (fun x => -(f x))%Real = - E d f

lemmas.name: expB
lemmas.statement:
['a] d f g : hasE d f => hasE d g =>
  E<:'a> d (fun x => f x - g x) = E d f - E d g

lemmas.name: expZ
lemmas.statement: ['a] d (c : real) f : E<:'a> d (fun x => c * f x) = c * E d f

lemmas.name: exp_norm
lemmas.statement: ['a] d f : hasE<:'a> d f => `|E d f| <= E d (fun x => `|f x|)

lemmas.name: exp_dnull
lemmas.statement: ['a] f : E dnull<:'a> f = 0%r

lemmas.name: exp_dunit
lemmas.statement: ['a] x f : E<:'a> (dunit x) f = f x

lemmas.name: hasE_drestrict
lemmas.statement: ['a] d p f : hasE d f => hasE (drestrict<:'a> d p) f

lemmas.name: exp_cond_drestrict_le
lemmas.statement:
['a] d (p q : _ -> bool) f :
  q <= p => Ec (drestrict<:'a> d p) f q = Ec d f q

lemmas.name: exp_cond_dunit
lemmas.statement:
['a] (x : 'a) f p :
  Ec (dunit x) f p = if p x then f x else 0%r

lemmas.name: exp_drestrict
lemmas.statement:
['a] d p f :
  E (drestrict<:'a> d p) f = mu d p * Ec d f p

lemmas.name: exp_duniform
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a list) f :
  E (duniform s) f = (1%r / (size (undup s))%r) * BRA.big predT f (undup s)

lemmas.name: exp_dlet
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (d : _ distr) (df : 'a -> 'b distr) f :
  hasE (dlet d df) f => E (dlet d df) f = E d (fun x => E (df x) f)

lemmas.name: exp_cond_dlet
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] d df f p: hasE (dlet d df) f =>
    Ec (dlet<:'a, 'b> d df) f p
  = E d (fun x => (mu (df x) p / mu (dlet d df) p * Ec (df x) f p))

lemmas.name: exp_dmap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] d (f : 'a -> 'b) (g : 'b -> real) : hasE (dmap d f) g =>
  E (dmap d f) g = E d (g \o f)

lemmas.name: exp_dcond
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (p : 'a -> bool) (f : 'a -> real) :
  E (dcond d p) f = Ec d f p

lemmas.name: in_ler_exp
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (f g : 'a -> real) :
     hasE d f => hasE d g
  => (forall (x : 'a), x \in d => f x <= g x)
  => E d f <= E d g

lemmas.name: in_ler_exp_cond
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) (f g : 'a -> real) p :
     hasE d f => hasE d g
  => (forall (x : 'a), x \in d => p x =>f x <= g x)
  => Ec d f p <= Ec d g p

lemmas.name: ler_exp
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f g : 'a -> real) :
     hasE d f => hasE d g
  => (forall x, f x <= g x)
  => E d f <= E d g

lemmas.name: ler_exp_pos
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f g : 'a -> real) :
     hasE d g
  => (forall x, 0%r <= f x <= g x)
  => E d f <= E d g

lemmas.name: iscpl_hasEL
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] da db d f :
  iscoupling<:'a, 'b> da db d => hasE da f => hasE d (f \o fst)

lemmas.name: iscpl_hasER
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] da db d f :
  iscoupling<:'a, 'b> da db d => hasE db f => hasE d (f \o snd)

lemmas.name: iscpl_E_split
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] da db f g d :
     iscoupling<:'a, 'b> da db d => hasE da f => hasE db g =>
  E da f + E db g = E d (fun xy : 'a * 'b => f xy.`1 + g xy.`2)

lemmas.name: E_split
lemmas.statement:
['a] p f d : hasE<:'a> d f => E d f =
    E d (fun x => if  p x then f x else 0%r)
  + E d (fun x => if !p x then f x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: Ec_split
lemmas.statement:
['a] p f d : hasE<:'a> d f =>
  E d f = mu d p * Ec d f p + mu d (predC p) * Ec d f (predC p)

lemmas.name: ptt_in_pred
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) p k :
  partition d p k => forall a, a \in d => exists i, 0 <= i < k /\ p i a

lemmas.name: ppt_disjoint
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) p k :
  partition d p k => forall i j x, i <> j => !(p i x /\ p j x)

lemmas.name: partition_drestrict
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) p k : 0 <= k =>
  partition d p (k+1) => partition (drestrict d (predC (p k))) p k

lemmas.name: E_splits
lemmas.statement:
['a] p f d k :
     hasE d f
  => partition d p k
  => E<:'a> d f = BRA.bigi predT (fun i => mu d (p i) * Ec d f (p i)) 0 k

lemmas.name: exp_cond_dlet_ilvt
lemmas.statement:
['a] d df f p:
     hasE (dlet d df) f
  => hasE d (fun (x : 'a) => E (drestrict (df x) p) f)
  => (forall x, x \in d => !p x => mu (df x) p = 0%r)
  => (forall x, x \in d =>  p x => mu (df x) p = 1%r)
  =>   Ec (dlet<:'a, 'a> d df) f p
     = Ec d (fun x => E (df x) f) p

lemmas.name: fin_expE
lemmas.statement:
(d : 'a distr) (f : 'a -> real) : is_finite (support d) =>
  E d f = big predT (fun x => f x * mu1 d x) (to_seq (support d))

lemmas.name: Jensen_fin
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) f g :
     is_finite (support d)
  => is_lossless d
  => (forall a b, convex g a b)
  => g (E d f) <= E d (g \o f)

lemmas.name: Jensen_fin_concave
lemmas.statement:
['a] (d : 'a distr) f (g : real -> real) :
     is_finite (support d)
  => is_lossless d
  => (forall a b, convex (fun x => - g x) a b)
  => E d (g \o f) <= g (E d f)

lemmas.name: mu_mem_le_gen
lemmas.statement:
(s:'a fset) (d:'b distr) p (bd:real) :
  (forall (x : 'a), mem s x => mu d (p x) <= bd) =>
  mu d (fun r => exists x, x \in s /\ p x r) <= (card s)%r * bd

lemmas.name: mu_mem_le
lemmas.statement:
(s:'a fset): forall (d:'a distr) (bd:real),
  (forall (x : 'a), mem s x => mu d (pred1 x) <= bd) =>
  mu d (mem s) <= (card s)%r * bd

lemmas.name: mu_mem_ge
lemmas.statement:
(s:'a fset): forall (d:'a distr) (bd:real),
  (forall (x : 'a), mem s x => mu d (pred1 x) >= bd) =>
  mu d (mem s) >= (card s)%r * bd

lemmas.name: mu_mem
lemmas.statement:
(s:'a fset): forall (d:'a distr) (bd:real),
  (forall (x : 'a), mem s x => mu d (pred1 x) = bd) =>
  mu d (mem s) = (card s)%r * bd

lemmas.name: mu_mem_card
lemmas.statement:
(l:'a list) (d:'a distr) (bd:real):
  (forall (x : 'a), mem l x => mu d (pred1 x) = bd) =>
  mu d (mem l) = (card (oflist l))%r * bd

lemmas.name: mu_mem_le_card
lemmas.statement:
(l:'a list) (d:'a distr) (bd:real):
  (forall (x : 'a), mem l x => mu d (pred1 x) <= bd) =>
  mu d (mem l) <= (card (oflist l))%r * bd

lemmas.name: mu_mem_ge_card
lemmas.statement:
(l:'a list) (d:'a distr) (bd:real):
  (forall (x : 'a), mem l x => mu d (pred1 x) >= bd) =>
  mu d (mem l) >= (card (oflist l))%r * bd

lemmas.name: mu_mem_le_size
lemmas.statement:
(l:'a list) (d:'a distr) (bd:real):
  (forall (x : 'a), mem l x => mu d (pred1 x) <= bd) =>
  mu d (mem l) <= (size l)%r * bd

lemmas.name: mu_mem_le_fsize
lemmas.statement:
(m : ('a, 'b) fmap) (d : 'c distr) p bd :
  (forall u, u \in m => mu d (p u) <= bd) =>
  mu d (fun r => exists u, u \in m /\ p u r) <= (fsize m)%r * bd

lemmas.name: sdist_upper_bound
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a distr) E :
  `|mu d1 E - mu d2 E| <= sdist d1 d2

lemmas.name: sdist_le_ub
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a distr) r :
  (forall E, `|mu d1 E - mu d2 E| <= r) => sdist d1 d2 <= r

lemmas.name: sdist_ge0
lemmas.statement: (d1 d2 : 'a distr) : 0%r <= sdist d1 d2

lemmas.name: sdistdd
lemmas.statement: (d : 'a distr) : sdist d d = 0%r

lemmas.name: sdist_triangle
lemmas.statement:
(d2 d1 d3 : 'a distr) :
  sdist d1 d3 <= sdist d1 d2 + sdist d2 d3

lemmas.name: sdist0_eq
lemmas.statement: (d1 d2 : 'a distr) : sdist d1 d2 = 0%r => d1 = d2

lemmas.name: sdistC
lemmas.statement: (d1 d2 : 'a distr) : sdist d1 d2 = sdist d2 d1

lemmas.name: sdist_dmap
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a distr) (F : 'a -> 'b) :
  sdist (dmap d1 F) (dmap d2 F) <= sdist d1 d2

lemmas.name: summable_sdist
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a distr) :
  summable (fun x => `| mu1 d1 x - mu1 d2 x |)

lemmas.name: sdist_tvd
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a distr) :
  sdist d1 d2 =
  1%r/2%r * (sum (fun x => `| mu1 d1 x - mu1 d2 x |) + `|weight d1 - weight d2|)

lemmas.name: sdist_dlet
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a distr) (F : 'a -> 'b distr) :
   sdist (dlet d1 F) (dlet d2 F) <= sdist d1 d2

lemmas.name: sdist_dprod2r
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a distr) (d : 'b distr) :
  sdist (d1 `*` d) (d2 `*` d) = sdist d1 d2 * weight d

lemmas.name: sdist_dprodC_aux
lemmas.statement:
(dl1 dl2 : 'a distr) (dr1 dr2 : 'b distr) :
  sdist (dl1 `*` dr1) (dl2 `*` dr2) <= sdist (dr1 `*` dl1) (dr2 `*` dl2)

lemmas.name: sdist_dprodC
lemmas.statement:
(dl1 dl2 : 'a distr) (dr1 dr2 : 'b distr) :
  sdist (dl1 `*` dr1) (dl2 `*` dr2) = sdist (dr1 `*` dl1) (dr2 `*` dl2)

lemmas.name: sdist_dprod
lemmas.statement:
(dl1 dl2 : 'a distr) (dr1 dr2 : 'b distr) :
  sdist (dl1 `*` dr1) (dl2 `*` dr2) <= sdist dl1 dl2 + sdist dr1 dr2

lemmas.name: sdist_dlist
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a distr) n :
  0 <= n => sdist (dlist d1 n) (dlist d2 n) <= n%r * sdist d1 d2

lemmas.name: sdist_dopt
lemmas.statement:
(d1 d2 : 'a distr) :
  sdist (dopt d1) (dopt d2) = sdist d1 d2

lemmas.name: uniq_big_res
lemmas.statement:
(A <: Distinguisher) &m x' (bs : out_t list) :
  uniq bs =>
  big predT (fun b => Pr[A.guess(x') @ &m : res = b]) bs =
  Pr[A.guess(x') @ &m : res \in bs]

lemmas.name: adv_isdistr
lemmas.statement:
(A <: Distinguisher) &m x' :
    isdistr (fun b => Pr[A.guess(x') @ &m : res = b])

lemmas.name: adv_mu1
lemmas.statement:
(A <: Distinguisher) &m z x' :
  Pr[A.guess(x') @ &m : res = z] =
  mu1 (mk (fun b => Pr[A.guess(x') @ &m : res = b])) z

lemmas.name: sampleE
lemmas.statement:
d' &m a :
    Pr[S.sample(d') @ &m : res = a] = mu1 d' a

lemmas.name: Sample_dlet
lemmas.statement:
(A <: Distinguisher) &m d' :
    Pr [Sample(A).main(d') @ &m : res] =
    mu1 (dlet d' (fun x => (mk (fun z => Pr [A.guess(x) @ &m : res=z])))) true

lemmas.name: distinguisher_ll
lemmas.statement:
(A <: Distinguisher) &m x :
  islossless A.guess =>
  is_lossless (mk (fun (z : bool) => Pr[A.guess(x) @ &m : res = z]))

lemmas.name: adv_sdist
lemmas.statement:
(A <: Distinguisher) &m d1 d2 :
  `| Pr[Sample(A).main(d1) @ &m : res] - Pr[Sample(A).main(d2) @ &m : res] |
  <=  sdist d1 d2

lemmas.name: sdist_oracle1
lemmas.statement:
&m (d1 d2 : a distr) :
   is_lossless d1 => is_lossless d2 =>
  (forall (O <: Oracle_i{-Count,-A}),
     hoare[ A(Count(O)).main : Count.n = 0 ==> Count.n <= 1]) =>
  `| Pr[Game(A,Os).main(d1) @ &m : res] - Pr[Game(A,Os).main(d2) @ &m : res] |
  <= sdist d1 d2

lemmas.name: Osd1_Hyb
lemmas.statement:
&m :
   Pr[Game(A, Os).main(d1) @ &m : res] = Pr[ Hyb.Ln(Ob, B).main() @ &m : res ]

lemmas.name: Osd2_Hyb
lemmas.statement:
&m :
   Pr[Game(A, Os).main(d2) @ &m : res] = Pr[ Hyb.Rn(Ob, B).main() @ &m : res ]

lemmas.name: sdist_oracleN
lemmas.statement:
&m :
  `| Pr[Game(A,Os).main(d1) @ &m : res] - Pr[Game(A,Os).main(d2) @ &m : res] |
  <= N%r * sdist d1 d2

lemmas.name: sdist_ROM
lemmas.statement:
&m :
 (forall (O <: R1.RO{-Wrap,-D}),
   hoare [ D(Wrap(O)).distinguish : Wrap.dom = fset0 ==> card Wrap.dom <= N]) =>
  `| Pr [R1.MainD(D,O1).distinguish() @ &m : res] -
     Pr [R1.MainD(D,O2).distinguish() @ &m : res] |
  <= N%r * sdist d1 d2

lemmas.name: eq_enumerate
lemmas.statement:
['a] E1 E2 (C : int -> 'a option) :
  (forall x, E1 x = E2 x) => enumerate C E1 => enumerate C E2

lemmas.name: enumerate_pmap_range
lemmas.statement:
(J : int -> 'a option) (s : 'a list) (p : 'a -> bool)
  :
     enumerate J p
  => exists n, forall x, p x => x \in s => x \in pmap J (range 0 n)

lemmas.name: enum_uniq_pmap_range
lemmas.statement:
(J : int -> 'a option) p n:
  enumerate J p => uniq (pmap J (range 0 n))

lemmas.name: inj_int2nat
lemmas.statement: : injective int2nat

lemmas.name: ge0_int2nat
lemmas.statement: x : 0 <= int2nat x by smt()

lemmas.name: cnt_int
lemmas.statement: : countableT<:int>

lemmas.name: countableP
lemmas.statement:
['a] (E : 'a -> bool) :
  (exists f, enumerate f E) <=> countable E

lemmas.name: countable_inj
lemmas.statement:
['a] (p : 'a -> bool) :
  countable p => exists (f : 'a -> int), (* FIXME: (...) should not be mandatory *)
    forall x y, p x => p y => f x = f y => x = y

lemmas.name: inj_cond_countable
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) pb pa :
     countable<:'b> pb
  => (forall x y, pa x => pa y => f x = f y => x = y)
  => (forall x, pa x => pb (f x))
  => countable<:'a> pa

lemmas.name: inj_condL_countable
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) p :
     countableT<:'b>
  => (forall x y, p x => p y => f x = f y => x = y)
  => countable<:'a> p

lemmas.name: inj_countable
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : 'a -> int) (p : 'a -> bool) :
     (forall x y, p x => p y => f x = f y => x = y)
  => countable p

lemmas.name: inj_encode

lemmas.name: countable
lemmas.statement: : countableT<:int * int>

lemmas.name: inj_encode
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2 :

lemmas.name: countable

lemmas.name: inj_encode
lemmas.statement: : injective encode

lemmas.name: countable
lemmas.statement: : countableT<:int list>

lemmas.name: countable0

lemmas.name: cnt_unit

lemmas.name: cnt_bool
lemmas.statement: p : countable<:bool> p

lemmas.name: cnt_prod_cond
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] pa pb :
     countable<:'a> pa
  => countable <:'b> pb
  => countable (fun (xy : _ * _) => pa xy.`1 /\ pb xy.`2)

lemmas.name: cnt_prod
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] :
  countableT<:'a> => countableT<:'b> => countableT<:'a * 'b>

lemmas.name: cnt_list_cond

['a] (p : 'a -> bool) :

lemmas.name: cnt_list

lemmas.name: cnt_option
lemmas.statement: ['a] : countableT<:'a> => countableT<:'a option>

lemmas.name: countable_le
