(E1 E2 : 'a -> bool) :
  countable E1 => E2 <= E1 => countable E2

lemmas.name: countableIL
lemmas.statement:
(E1 E2 : 'a -> bool) :
  countable E1 => countable (predI E1 E2)

lemmas.name: countableIR
lemmas.statement:
(E1 E2 : 'a -> bool) :
  countable E2 => countable (predI E1 E2)

lemmas.name: countableU
lemmas.statement:
(E1 E2 : 'a -> bool) :
  countable E1 => countable E2 => countable (predU E1 E2)

lemmas.name: cnt_Uw
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f : int -> 'a -> bool) :
     (forall i, countable (f i))
  => countable (fun x => exists i, f i x)

lemmas.name: enum_cenum
lemmas.statement: E : countable<:'a> E => enumerate (cenum E) E

lemmas.name: enum_spec
lemmas.statement: : forall x, count (pred1 x) enum = 1

lemmas.name: enumP
lemmas.statement: : forall x, mem enum x

lemmas.name: enum_uniq
lemmas.statement: : uniq enum

lemmas.name: card_gt0
lemmas.statement: : 0 < card

lemmas.name: count_mem
lemmas.statement:
xs :
  uniq xs => count (mem xs) enum = size xs

lemmas.name: is_finite_for
lemmas.statement: : is_finite_for predT enum

lemmas.name: is_finite
lemmas.statement: : finite_type<:t>

lemmas.name: perm_eq_enum_to_seq
lemmas.statement: : perm_eq enum (Finite.to_seq predT)

lemmas.name: card_size_to_seq
lemmas.statement: : card = size (Finite.to_seq<:t> predT)

lemmas.name: is_finiteE
lemmas.statement:
(p : 'a -> bool) :
  is_finite p <=> (exists s, uniq s /\ (forall x, x \in s <=> p x))

lemmas.name: finite_for_finite
lemmas.statement:
['a] p s:
  is_finite_for<:'a> p s => is_finite p

lemmas.name: to_seq_finite
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool):
  is_finite P => uniq (to_seq P) /\ (forall x, x \in to_seq P <=> P x)

lemmas.name: mkfinite
lemmas.statement:
['a] (p : 'a -> bool) :
  (exists (s : 'a list), forall x, p x => x \in s) => is_finite p

lemmas.name: uniq_to_seq
lemmas.statement: (P : 'a -> bool): uniq (to_seq P)

lemmas.name: mem_to_seq
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool) x:
  is_finite P => mem (to_seq P) x <=> P x

lemmas.name: finiteP
lemmas.statement:
['a] (p : 'a -> bool) :
  (exists s, forall x, p x => x \in s) <=> is_finite p

lemmas.name: NfiniteP
lemmas.statement:
['a] n (p : 'a -> bool) : 0 <= n =>
  !is_finite p => exists s, (n <= size s /\ uniq s) /\ (mem s) <= p

lemmas.name: finite0
lemmas.statement: : is_finite pred0<:'a>

lemmas.name: finite1
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a): is_finite (pred1 x)

lemmas.name: finite_leq
lemmas.statement:
(B A : 'a -> bool):
  A <= B => is_finite B => is_finite A

lemmas.name: finiteU
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a -> bool):
  is_finite A => is_finite B => is_finite (predU A B)

lemmas.name: finiteIl
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a -> bool):
  is_finite A => is_finite (predI A B)

lemmas.name: finiteIr
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a -> bool):
  is_finite B => is_finite (predI A B)

lemmas.name: finiteD
lemmas.statement:
(A B : 'a -> bool):
  is_finite A => is_finite (predD A B)

lemmas.name: sub_size_to_seq
lemmas.statement:
(p q : 'a -> bool) :
  p <= q => is_finite q =>
  size (to_seq p) <= size (to_seq q)

lemmas.name: eq_is_finite_for
lemmas.statement:
['a] (p q : 'a -> bool) s :
  (forall x, p x <=> q x) => is_finite_for p s => is_finite_for q s

lemmas.name: is_finite_for_bij
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) p s :
     is_finite_for p s
  => (forall x y, p x => p y => f x = f y => x = y)
  => (forall y, exists x, p x /\ y = f x)
  => is_finite_for predT (map f s)

lemmas.name: is_finite_surj
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) pa pb :
      (forall b, pb b => exists a, pa a /\ b = f a)
   => is_finite pa
   => is_finite pb

lemmas.name: finite_for_mem
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : is_finite_for (mem s) (undup s)

lemmas.name: finite_mem
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a list) : is_finite (mem s)

lemmas.name: finite_for_unit
lemmas.statement:
(p : unit -> bool):
  is_finite_for p (filter p [tt])

lemmas.name: finite_unit
lemmas.statement: (p : unit -> bool): is_finite p

lemmas.name: finite_for_bool
lemmas.statement:
(p : bool -> bool):
  is_finite_for p (filter p [true; false])

lemmas.name: finite_bool
lemmas.statement: (p : bool -> bool): is_finite p

lemmas.name: finite_for_pair
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] pa pb sa sb:
  is_finite_for<:'a> pa sa => is_finite_for<:'b> pb sb =>
  is_finite_for
    (fun x : _ * _ => pa x.`1 /\ pb x.`2)
    (allpairs (fun x y => (x, y)) sa sb)

lemmas.name: finite_pair
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] pa pb :
  is_finite<:'a> pa => is_finite<:'b> pb
    => is_finite (fun x : _ * _ => pa x.`1 /\ pb x.`2)

lemmas.name: finite_for_list
lemmas.statement:
['a] n p s : is_finite_for<:'a> p s =>
  is_finite_for (fun r => size r = max 0 n /\ all p r) (alltuples n s)

lemmas.name: finite_list
lemmas.statement:
['a] n p :
  is_finite<:'a> p => is_finite (fun r => size r = max 0 n /\ all p r)

lemmas.name: fingraph_nil
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] (sb : 'b list) : fingraph<:'a, 'b> [] sb = [[]]

lemmas.name: fingraph_cons
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (a : 'a) (sa : 'a list) (sb : 'b list) :
  fingraph<:'a, 'b> (a :: sa) sb =
    flatten (map (fun g1 => map (fun b => (a, b) :: g1) sb) (fingraph sa sb))

lemmas.name: mem_fingraph
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (sa : 'a list) (sb : 'b list) gr :
  (gr \in fingraph sa sb) <=>
    (unzip1 gr = sa /\ (forall x , x \in (unzip2 gr) => x \in sb))

lemmas.name: finite_fixfinfun
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] dom codom :
     is_finite<:'a> dom
  => is_finite<:'b> codom
  => is_finite<: 'a -> 'b> (fixfinfun dom codom)

lemmas.name: finite_fun
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] :
     is_finite<:'a> predT
  => is_finite<:'b> predT
  => is_finite<: 'a -> 'b> predT

lemmas.name: finite_typeP
lemmas.statement:
['a] :
  (exists (s:'a list), forall x, x \in s) <=> finite_type <:'a>

lemmas.name: finite_type_surj
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b):
  surjective f => finite_type <:'a> => finite_type <:'b>

lemmas.name: finite_type_unit
lemmas.statement: : finite_type <:unit>

lemmas.name: finite_type_bool
lemmas.statement: : finite_type <:bool>

lemmas.name: finite_type_pair
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] :
  finite_type <:'a> => finite_type <:'b> => finite_type <:'a * 'b>

lemmas.name: finite_type_tuple3
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c] :
     finite_type <:'a>
  => finite_type <:'b>
  => finite_type <:'c>
  => finite_type <:'a * 'b * 'c>

lemmas.name: finite_type_tuple4
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c 'd] :
     finite_type <:'a>
  => finite_type <:'b>
  => finite_type <:'c>
  => finite_type <:'d>
  => finite_type <:'a * 'b * 'c * 'd>

lemmas.name: finite_type_tuple5
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b 'c 'd 'e] :
     finite_type <:'a>
  => finite_type <:'b>
  => finite_type <:'c>
  => finite_type <:'d>
  => finite_type <:'e>
  => finite_type <:'a * 'b * 'c * 'd * 'e>

lemmas.name: finite_type_fun
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] :
     finite_type <:'a>
  => finite_type <:'b>
  => finite_type <: 'a -> 'b>

lemmas.name: reprK
lemmas.statement: : cancel repr pi

lemmas.name: piP
lemmas.statement: (x : T): x == repr (pi x)

lemmas.name: quotW
lemmas.statement: P: (forall y, P (pi y)) => forall x, P x

lemmas.name: quotP
lemmas.statement: P: (forall y, repr (pi y) = y => P (pi y)) => forall x, P x

lemmas.name: eqv_refl
lemmas.statement: : reflexive  eqv

lemmas.name: eqv_sym
lemmas.statement: : symmetric  eqv

lemmas.name: eqv_trans
lemmas.statement: : transitive eqv

lemmas.name: eqv_choose
lemmas.statement: (x : T): exists y, eqv x y

lemmas.name: eqv_canon
lemmas.statement: (x : T) : eqv x (canon x)

lemmas.name: eqv_canon_eq
lemmas.statement: (x y : T): eqv x y => canon x = canon y

lemmas.name: canonK
lemmas.statement: x : canon (canon x) = canon x

lemmas.name: canon_iscanon
lemmas.statement: x : iscanon x => canon x = x

lemmas.name: iscanon_canon
lemmas.statement: x : iscanon (canon x)

lemmas.name: eqvP
lemmas.statement: x y : (eqv x y) <=> (canon x = canon y)

lemmas.name: eqv_pi
lemmas.statement: : forall x y , eqv x y <=> pi x = pi y

lemmas.name: eqv_repr
lemmas.statement: : forall x, eqv (repr (pi x)) x

lemmas.name: is_nonempty
lemmas.statement:
(xs : 'a predi) :
  is_nonempty xs <=> exists (y : 'a), xs y

lemmas.name: sub_trans
lemmas.statement:
(zs xs ys : 'a predi) :
  sub xs zs => sub zs ys => sub xs ys

lemmas.name: wf_ind
lemmas.statement:
(rel : 'a rel, P : 'a -> bool) :
  wf rel =>
  (forall (x : 'a),
   (forall (y : 'a), rel y x => P y) =>
   P x) =>
  (forall (x : 'a), P x)

lemmas.name: wf_lt_nat
lemmas.statement: : wf lt_nat

lemmas.name: wf_lex
lemmas.statement:
(wfr1 : 'a rel, wfr2 : 'b rel) :
  wf wfr1 => wf wfr2 => wf (wf_lex wfr1 wfr2)

lemmas.name: wf_restr
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, rel : 'a rel) :
  wf wfr => wf (wf_restr wfr rel)

lemmas.name: wf_pre
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b, wfr : 'b rel) :
  wf wfr => wf (wf_pre f wfr)

lemmas.name: grel_sub_trans
lemmas.statement:
(grel' grel1 grel2 : ('a, 'b) grel) :
  grel_sub grel1 grel' => grel_sub grel' grel2 => grel_sub grel1 grel2

lemmas.name: grel_eq_same_dom
lemmas.statement:
(grel1 grel2 : ('a, 'b) grel, xs : 'a predi) :
  grel_dom grel1 = xs => grel_dom grel2 = xs =>
  (forall (x : 'a), xs x => grel1 x = grel2 x) =>
  grel1 = grel2

lemmas.name: grel_funs_eq_on_first
lemmas.statement:
(grel1 grel2 : ('a, 'b) grel, x : 'a, y : 'b) :
  grel_is_fun grel1 => grel_is_fun grel2 =>
  grel1 x y => grel2 x y => grel1 x = grel2 x

lemmas.name: grel_restr
lemmas.statement:
(grel : ('a, 'b) grel, xs : 'a predi) :
  sub xs (grel_dom grel) =>
  grel_dom (grel_restr grel xs) = xs /\
  (forall (x : 'a, y : 'b),
   grel_restr grel xs x y <=>
   grel x y /\ xs x)

lemmas.name: grel_restr_grel_sub
lemmas.statement:
(grel : ('a, 'b) grel, xs : 'a predi) :
  grel_sub (grel_restr grel xs) grel

lemmas.name: grel_restr_dom
lemmas.statement:
(grel : ('a, 'b) grel, xs : 'a predi) :
  sub xs (grel_dom grel) =>
  grel_dom (grel_restr grel xs) = xs

lemmas.name: grel_restr_is_fun
lemmas.statement:
(grel : ('a, 'b) grel, xs : 'a predi) :
  sub xs (grel_dom grel) => grel_is_fun grel =>
  grel_is_fun (grel_restr grel xs)

lemmas.name: choiceb_grel_fun
lemmas.statement:
(grel : ('a, 'b) grel, x : 'a, y, def : 'b) :
  grel_is_fun grel => grel x y => grel_to_fun def grel x = y

lemmas.name: grel_choose_sub_fun
lemmas.statement:
(grel : ('a, 'b) grel) :
  let grel' = grel_choose_sub_fun grel in
  grel_is_fun grel' /\ grel_sub grel' grel /\
  grel_dom grel' = grel_dom grel

lemmas.name: grel_exists_sub_fun
lemmas.statement:
(grel : ('a, 'b) grel, xs : 'a predi) :
  sub xs (grel_dom grel) =>
  exists (grel' : ('a, 'b) grel),
  grel_sub grel' grel /\ grel_is_fun grel' /\ grel_dom grel' = xs

lemmas.name: grels_inter_sub
lemmas.statement:
(grels : ('a, 'b) grels, grel : ('a, 'b) grel) :
  grels grel => grel_sub (grels_inter grels) grel

lemmas.name: wfc_total
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, def : 'b, wfrd : ('a, 'b) wf_rec_def,
       grel : ('a, 'b) grel, x : 'a) :
  wf wfr => wf_closed wfr def wfrd grel => grel_dom grel x

lemmas.name: wfc_inter
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, def : 'b, wfrd : ('a, 'b) wf_rec_def,
       grels : ('a, 'b) grels) :
  (forall (grel : ('a, 'b) grel),
   grels grel => wf_closed wfr def wfrd grel) =>
  wf_closed wfr def wfrd (grels_inter grels)

lemmas.name: wfc_least_closed
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, def : 'b, wfrd : ('a, 'b) wf_rec_def) :
  wf_closed wfr def wfrd (wfc_least wfr def wfrd)

lemmas.name: wfc_least_total
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, def : 'b, wfrd : ('a, 'b) wf_rec_def, x : 'a) :
  wf wfr => grel_dom (wfc_least wfr def wfrd) x

lemmas.name: wfc_least_dom_predT
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, def : 'b, wfrd : ('a, 'b) wf_rec_def) :
  wf wfr => grel_dom (wfc_least wfr def wfrd) = predT

lemmas.name: wfc_least_least
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, def : 'b, wfrd : ('a, 'b) wf_rec_def,
       grel : ('a, 'b) grel) :
  wf_closed wfr def wfrd grel =>
  grel_sub (wfc_least wfr def wfrd) grel

lemmas.name: wfc_least_inversion
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, def : 'b, wfrd : ('a, 'b) wf_rec_def,
       x : 'a, y : 'b) :
  wfc_least wfr def wfrd x y =>
  exists (grel' : ('a, 'b) grel),
  grel_sub grel' (wfc_least wfr def wfrd) /\ grel_is_fun grel' /\
  grel_dom grel' = predecs wfr x /\ y = wfrd x (grel_to_fun def grel')

lemmas.name: wfc_least_is_fun
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, def : 'b, wfrd : ('a, 'b) wf_rec_def) :
  grel_is_fun (wfc_least wfr def wfrd)

lemmas.name: wfc_least_result
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, def : 'b, wfrd : ('a, 'b) wf_rec_def, x : 'a) :
  wf wfr =>
  wfc_least wfr def wfrd x
  (wfrd x
        (grel_to_fun def
         (grel_restr (wfc_least wfr def wfrd) (predecs wfr x))))

lemmas.name: wf_recur
lemmas.statement:
(wfr : 'a rel, def : 'b, wfrd : ('a, 'b) wf_rec_def, x : 'a) :
  wf wfr =>
  wf_recur wfr def wfrd x =
  wfrd x
       (fun y =>
          if wfr y x
          then wf_recur wfr def wfrd y
          else def)

lemmas.name: xor_false
lemmas.statement:
b: b ^^ false = b
by case: b

lemmas.name: xor_true
lemmas.statement:
b: b ^^ true = !b
by case: b

lemmas.name: xorC
lemmas.statement:
b1 b2: b1 ^^ b2 = b2 ^^ b1
by case: b1 b2=> - []

lemmas.name: xorK
lemmas.statement:
b: b ^^ b = false
by case: b

lemmas.name: pairS
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a * 'b): x = (fst x, snd x)

lemmas.name: fst_pair
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] (x : 'a) (y : 'b) : fst (x, y) = x by done

lemmas.name: snd_pair
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] (x : 'a) (y : 'b) : snd (x, y) = y by done

lemmas.name: oget_none
lemmas.statement: : oget None<:'a> = witness

lemmas.name: oget_some
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a): oget (Some x) = x

lemmas.name: some_oget
lemmas.statement: (x : 'a option): x <> None => x = Some (oget x)

lemmas.name: someI
lemmas.statement: (x y:'a): Some x = Some y => x = y

lemmas.name: none_omap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) ox :
  omap f ox = None <=> ox = None

lemmas.name: oget_omap_some
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) ox :
  ox <> None => oget (omap f ox) = f (oget ox)

lemmas.name: econgr1
lemmas.statement: ['a 'b] (f g : 'a -> 'b) x y: f == g => x = y => f x = g y

lemmas.name: etaP
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b): eta_ f = f

lemmas.name: fixfinfun0
lemmas.statement:
['t 'u] (codom : 'u -> bool) (f : 't -> 'u) :
  fixfinfun pred0 codom f => forall x, f x = witness

lemmas.name: eqL_fixfinfun
lemmas.statement:
['t 'u] r1 r2 s (f : 't -> 'u) :
  r1 == r2 => fixfinfun r2 s f <=> fixfinfun r1 s f

lemmas.name: eqR_fixfinfun
lemmas.statement:
['t 'u] r s1 s2 (f : 't -> 'u) :
  s1 == s2 => fixfinfun r s1 f <=> fixfinfun r s2 f

lemmas.name: swap_codom_neq
lemmas.statement:
['t 'u] x y1 y2 (f : 't -> 'u) z :
  x <> z => swap_codom x y1 y2 f z = f z

lemmas.name: bij_swap_codom
lemmas.statement:
['t 'u] x y1 y2 :
  bijective (swap_codom<:'t, 'u> x y1 y2)

lemmas.name: can_pcan
lemmas.statement: (f:'a -> 'b) g: cancel f g => pcancel f (Some \o g)

lemmas.name: pcan_inj
lemmas.statement: (f:'a -> 'b) g: pcancel f g => injective f

lemmas.name: can_inj
lemmas.statement: (f : 'a -> 'b) g: cancel f g => injective f

lemmas.name: canLR
lemmas.statement: (f:'a -> 'b) g x y: cancel f g => x = f y => g x = y

lemmas.name: canRL
lemmas.statement: (f:'a -> 'b) g x y: cancel f g => f x = y => x = g y

lemmas.name: inj_eq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b):
  injective f => forall x y, (f x = f y) <=> (x = y)

lemmas.name: can_eq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) g:
  cancel f g => forall x y, (f x = f y) <=> (x = y)

lemmas.name: can2_eq
lemmas.statement:
(f : 'a -> 'b) g:
  cancel f g => cancel g f => forall x y, (f x = y) <=> (x = g y)

lemmas.name: inj_idfun
lemmas.statement: : injective (idfun<:'a>)

lemmas.name: inj_can_sym
lemmas.statement:
(f:'a -> 'b) f':
  cancel f f' => injective f' => cancel f' f

lemmas.name: inj_comp
lemmas.statement:
(f:'b -> 'a) (h:'c -> 'b):
  injective f => injective h => injective (f \o h)

lemmas.name: can_comp
lemmas.statement:
(f:'b -> 'a) (h:'c -> 'b) f' h':
  cancel f f' => cancel h h' => cancel (f \o h) (h' \o f')

lemmas.name: pcan_pcomp
lemmas.statement:
(f:'b -> 'a) (h:'c -> 'b) f' h':
  pcancel f f' => pcancel h h' => pcancel (f \o h) (h' \c f')

lemmas.name: eq_inj
lemmas.statement:
(f g:'a -> 'b):
  injective f => f == g => injective g

lemmas.name: eq_can
lemmas.statement:
(f g:'a -> 'b) f' g':
  cancel f f' => f == g => f' == g' => cancel g g'

lemmas.name: inj_can_eq
lemmas.statement:
(f g:'a -> 'b) f':
  cancel f f' => injective f' => cancel g f' => f == g

lemmas.name: bij_inj
lemmas.statement: (f:'b -> 'a): bijective f => injective f

lemmas.name: bij_can_sym
lemmas.statement:
(f:'b -> 'a) f':
  bijective f => (cancel f' f <=> cancel f f')

lemmas.name: bij_can_eq
lemmas.statement:
(f:'b -> 'a) f' f'':
  bijective f => cancel f f' => cancel f f'' => f' == f''

lemmas.name: eq_bij
lemmas.statement:
(f:'b -> 'a):
  bijective f => forall g, f == g => bijective g

lemmas.name: bij_comp
lemmas.statement:
(f:'b -> 'a) (h:'c -> 'b):
  bijective f => bijective h => bijective (f \o h)

lemmas.name: bij_can_bij
lemmas.statement:
(f:'b -> 'a):
  bijective f => forall f', cancel f f' => bijective f'

lemmas.name: inv_inj
lemmas.statement: (f:'a -> 'a): involutive f => injective f

lemmas.name: inv_bij
lemmas.statement: (f:'a -> 'a): involutive f => bijective f

lemmas.name: inv_eq
lemmas.statement:

lemmas.name: ext_rewrite
lemmas.statement:

   (forall x y, ext x y => x = y) => ext a1 a2 => P a1 <=> P a2

lemmas.name: pred_ext
lemmas.statement:

lemmas.name: subpred_eqP

(X : 'a -> bool): X <= X
by []

lemmas.name: subpred_trans
lemmas.statement:

lemmas.statement: l s: convergeto s l => converge s

lemmas.name: bounded_cnvto
lemmas.statement:
l (s : int -> real) :
  convergeto s l => bounded s

lemmas.name: monotoneP
lemmas.statement:
(s : int -> real):
  monotone s <=> (forall m n, 0 <= m <= n => s m <= s n)

lemmas.name: uniq_cnvto
lemmas.statement: s x y: convergeto s x => convergeto s y => x = y

lemmas.name: eq_cnvto_from
lemmas.statement:
N s1 s2 l:
     (forall n, (N <= n)%Int => s1 n = s2 n)
  => convergeto s1 l => convergeto s2 l

lemmas.name: eq_cnvto
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2 l:
  (forall n, s1 n = s2 n) => convergeto s1 l => convergeto s2 l

lemmas.name: eq_cnvto_fromP
lemmas.statement:
N s1 s2 l:
     (forall n, (N <= n)%Int => s1 n = s2 n)
  => convergeto s1 l <=> convergeto s2 l

lemmas.name: eq_cnv_fromP
lemmas.statement:
N s1 s2:
     (forall n, (N <= n)%Int => s1 n = s2 n)
  => converge s1 <=> converge s2

lemmas.name: nz_cnvto
lemmas.statement:
l (s : int -> real) :
  l <> 0%r => convergeto s l => exists N, forall n, (N <= n)%Int => s n <> 0%r

lemmas.name: cnvtoC
lemmas.statement: c: convergeto (fun x => c) c

lemmas.name: cnvtoD
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2 l1 l2: convergeto s1 l1 => convergeto s2 l2 =>
  convergeto (fun x => s1 x + s2 x) (l1 + l2)

lemmas.name: cnvtoDr0
lemmas.statement:
s2 s1 l: convergeto s2 0%r => convergeto s1 l =>
  convergeto (fun x => s1 x + s2 x) l

lemmas.name: cnvtoD0r
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2 l: convergeto s1 0%r => convergeto s2 l =>
  convergeto (fun x => s1 x + s2 x) l

lemmas.name: cnvtoN
lemmas.statement: s l: convergeto s l => convergeto (fun x => -(s x)) (-l)

lemmas.name: cnvtoB
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2 l1 l2:
  convergeto s1 l1 => convergeto s2 l2 =>
  convergeto (fun x => s1 x - s2 x) (l1 - l2)

lemmas.name: cnvtoBlim
lemmas.statement:
s l: convergeto s l =>
  convergeto (fun x => s x - l) 0%r

lemmas.name: cnvtoZ
lemmas.statement: c s l: convergeto s l => convergeto (fun x => c * s x) (c * l)

lemmas.name: cnvtoM_boundedr
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2: convergeto s1 0%r => bounded s2 =>
  convergeto (fun x => s1 x * s2 x) 0%r

lemmas.name: cnvtoM_boundedl
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2: convergeto s2 0%r => bounded s1 =>
  convergeto (fun x => s1 x * s2 x) 0%r

lemmas.name: cnvtoM
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2 l1 l2:
  convergeto s1 l1 => convergeto s2 l2 =>
  convergeto (fun x => s1 x * s2 x) (l1 * l2)

lemmas.name: cnvto_pow
lemmas.statement: p : -1%r < p < 1%r => convergeto (fun (n : int) => p ^ n) 0%r

lemmas.name: cnvtoV0
lemmas.statement:
(f : int -> real):
  (forall x, exists (N:int), forall n, N <= n => x < `|f n|) =>
  convergeto (fun n => inv (f n)) 0%r

lemmas.name: cnvtoVn
lemmas.statement:
:
  convergeto (fun (n:int) => inv n%r) 0%r

lemmas.name: cnvtoVn2
lemmas.statement:
:
  convergeto (fun (n:int) => inv (n%r^2)) 0%r

lemmas.name: squeeze_cnvto
lemmas.statement:
(F1 F2 : int -> real) N (G : int -> real) l :
  (forall (x:int), N <= x => F1 x <= G x <= F2 x) =>
  convergeto F1 l =>
  convergeto F2 l =>
  convergeto G l

lemmas.name: cnvtoV_nz
lemmas.statement:
l (s : int -> real) :
     l <> 0%r
  => convergeto s l
  => convergeto (fun (n : int) => inv (s n)) (inv l)

lemmas.name: le_cnvto_from
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2 l1 l2:
     (exists N, forall n, (N <= n)%Int => (s1 n <= s2 n)%Real)
  => convergeto s1 l1 => convergeto s2 l2 => l1 <= l2

lemmas.name: cnvto_lub_bmono_from
lemmas.statement:
(s : int -> real) M N :
     (forall n p, (N <= n <= p)%Int => s n <= s p)
  => (forall n, N <= n => s n <= M)
  => convergeto s (lub (fun x => exists n, N <= n /\ s n = x))

lemmas.name: cnv_bmono_from
lemmas.statement:
(s : int -> real) M N :
     (forall n p, (N <= n <= p)%Int => s n <= s p)
  => (forall n, N <= n => s n <= M)
  => converge s

lemmas.name: cnvC
lemmas.statement: (x:real) : converge (fun _ => x)

lemmas.name: cnvD
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : int -> real) :
  converge s1 => converge s2 => converge (fun x => s1 x + s2 x)

lemmas.name: cnvZ
lemmas.statement:
c (s : int -> real) :
  converge s => converge (fun x => c * s x)

lemmas.name: cnvZ_iff
lemmas.statement:
c (s : int -> real) : c <> 0%r =>
  converge (fun x => c * s x) <=> converge s

lemmas.name: cnvN
lemmas.statement: s : converge s => converge (fun x => -s x)

lemmas.name: cnvB
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2 :
  converge s1 => converge s2 => converge (fun x => s1 x - s2 x)

lemmas.name: cnv_pow
lemmas.statement: p : -1%r < p < 1%r => converge (fun (n : int) => p ^ n)

lemmas.name: limP
lemmas.statement:
(s : int -> real):
  converge s <=> convergeto s (lim s)

lemmas.name: lim_cnvto
lemmas.statement:
(s : int -> real) l:
  convergeto s l => lim s = l

lemmas.name: lim_Ncnv
lemmas.statement:
(s : int -> real):
  !converge s => lim s = 0%r

lemmas.name: lim_eq
lemmas.statement:
(N : int) (s1 s2 : int -> real):
     (forall n, N <= n => s1 n = s2 n)
  => lim s1 = lim s2

lemmas.name: geC_lim_from
lemmas.statement:
(N : int) (s : int -> real) (c : real) :
     (forall n, N <= n => c <= s n)
  => converge s
  => c <= lim s

lemmas.name: leC_lim_from
lemmas.statement:
(N : int) (s : int -> real) (c : real) :
     (forall n, N <= n => s n <= c)
  => converge s
  => lim s <= c

lemmas.name: limC_eq_from
lemmas.statement:
(N : int) c (s : int -> real) :
   (forall n, N <= n => s n = c) => lim s = c

lemmas.name: limC_eq
lemmas.statement:
c (s : int -> real) :
 (forall n, 0 <= n => s n = c) => lim s = c

lemmas.name: limC
lemmas.statement: c : lim (fun x => c) = c

lemmas.name: limZ
lemmas.statement:
c (s : int -> real) :
  lim (fun x => c * s x) = c * lim s

lemmas.name: limD
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : int -> real) :
  converge s1 => converge s2 =>
    lim (fun x => s1 x + s2 x) = lim s1 + lim s2

lemmas.name: limN
lemmas.statement: (s : int -> real) : lim (fun x => - s x) = - lim s

lemmas.name: limB
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : int -> real) :
  converge s1 => converge s2 =>
    lim (fun x => s1 x - s2 x) = lim s1 - lim s2

lemmas.name: limM
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : int -> real) :
  converge s1 => converge s2 =>
    lim (fun x => s1 x * s2 x) = lim s1 * lim s2

lemmas.name: lim_pow
lemmas.statement: p : -1%r < p < 1%r => lim (fun (n:int) => p ^ n) = 0%r

lemmas.name: convergeto_sum
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool)
  (F : 'a -> int -> real)
  (l : 'a -> real)
  (s : 'a list)
:
     (forall x, P x => convergeto (F x) (l x))
  => convergeto
       (fun n => big P (fun x => (F x n)) s)
       (big P (fun x => l x) s)

lemmas.name: converge_sum
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool)
  (F : 'a -> int -> real)
  (s : 'a list)
:
     (forall x, P x => converge (F x))
  => converge (fun n => big P (fun x => (F x n)) s)

lemmas.name: lim_sum
lemmas.statement:
(P : 'a -> bool)
  (F : 'a -> int -> real)
  (s : 'a list)
:
     (forall x, P x => converge (F x))
  => big P (fun x => lim (F x)) s
     = lim (fun n => big P (fun x => F x n) s)

lemmas.name: sbl_countable
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  summable s => countable (fun i => s i <> 0%r)

lemmas.name: summable0
lemmas.statement: : summable (fun (x:'a) => 0%r)

lemmas.name: summable_fin
lemmas.statement:
['a] s (J : 'a list) :
  (forall x, s x <> 0%r => x \in J) => summable s

lemmas.name: summable_from_bounded
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  forall (J : int -> 'a option),
       enumerate J (support s)
    => (exists M, forall n, big predT (fun a => `|s a|) (pmap J (range 0 n)) <= M)
    => summable s

lemmas.name: eq_summable
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real):
  (forall x, s1 x = s2 x) => summable s1 <=> summable s2

lemmas.name: eqL_summable
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real):
  summable s1 => (forall x, s1 x = s2 x) => summable s2

lemmas.name: eqL_notin_summable
lemmas.statement:
(I : 'a list) (s1 s2 : 'a -> real)  :
  (forall x, !x \in I => s1 x = s2 x) => summable s1 => summable s2

lemmas.name: summable_le
lemmas.statement:
(s2 s1 : 'a -> real) :
     summable s2
  => (forall x, `|s1 x| <= `|s2 x|)
  => summable s1

lemmas.name: summable_norm
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real):
  summable s => summable (fun x => `|s x|)

lemmas.name: norm_summable
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  summable (fun x => `|s x|) => summable s

lemmas.name: summableD
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real):
  summable s1 => summable s2 => summable (fun x => s1 x + s2 x)

lemmas.name: summable_big
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (F : 'a -> 'b -> real) (s : 'b list) :
     (forall y, y \in s => summable (fun x => F x y))
  => summable (fun x => big predT (F x) s)

lemmas.name: summableZ
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) (c : real) :
  summable s => summable (fun x => c * s x)

lemmas.name: summableN
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  summable s => summable (fun x => - s x)

lemmas.name: summableZ_iff
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) (c : real) : c <> 0%r =>
  summable s <=> summable (fun x => c * s x)

lemmas.name: summableM_prod_dep
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] f g:
     summable<:'a> f
  => (exists Mg, forall a J, uniq J => big predT ("`|_|"%Real \o g a) J <= Mg)
  => summable (fun (ab : 'a * 'b) => f ab.`1 * g ab.`1 ab.`2)

lemmas.name: summableM_prod
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] f g:
     summable<:'a> f
  => summable<:'b> g
  => summable (fun (ab : 'a * 'b) => f ab.`1 * g ab.`2)

lemmas.name: pos_neg_id
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) x: s x = pos s x - neg s x

lemmas.name: pos_neg_abs
lemmas.statement: ['a] f (x : 'a) : pos f x + neg f x = `|f x|

lemmas.name: posN
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) x: pos (fun x => -s x) x = neg s x

lemmas.name: negN
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) x: neg (fun x => -s x) x = pos s x

lemmas.name: pos_ge0
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) x: 0%r <= pos s x

lemmas.name: neg_ge0
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) x: 0%r <= neg s x

lemmas.name: pos_id
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) : (forall x, 0%r <= s x) => pos s = s

lemmas.name: pos_ger
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) x: s x <= pos s x

lemmas.name: neg_ler
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) x: -neg s x <= s x

lemmas.name: abs_pos_ler
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) x: `|pos s x| <= `|s x|

lemmas.name: abs_neg_ler
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) x: `|neg s x| <= `|s x|

lemmas.name: ler_pos
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real):
  (forall x, s1 x <= s2 x) => forall x, pos s1 x <= pos s2 x

lemmas.name: ler_neg
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real):
  (forall x, s1 x <= s2 x) => forall x, neg s2 x <= neg s1 x

lemmas.name: summable_pos
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) : summable s => summable (pos s)

lemmas.name: summable_neg
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) : summable s => summable (neg s)

lemmas.name: summable_has_lub
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  summable s => has_lub (fun M =>
    exists J, uniq J /\ M = big predT (fun x => `|s x|) J)

lemmas.name: nz_psum_pred
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) : nonempty (psum_pred s)

lemmas.name: sum_sbl
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) : summable s =>
  sum s = psum (pos s) - psum (neg s)

lemmas.name: sum_Nsbl
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) : !summable s => sum s = 0%r

lemmas.name: psum_eq0P
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) : summable s =>
  (psum s = 0%r) <=> (forall x, s x = 0%r)

lemmas.name: ge0_psum
lemmas.statement: ['a] (s : 'a -> real) : summable s => 0%r <= psum s

lemmas.name: eq_psum
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a -> real) :
  (forall x, `|s1 x| = `|s2 x|) => psum s1 = psum s2

lemmas.name: psum_norm
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a -> real) :
  psum (fun x => `|s x|) = psum s

lemmas.name: psum_sum
lemmas.statement: s : summable<:'a> s => psum s = sum (fun x => `|s x|)

lemmas.name: summable_pos_cnvto
lemmas.statement:
s :
  forall (J : int -> 'a option) (p : 'a -> bool),
       enumerate J p
    => support s <= p
    => summable s
    => RealSeq.convergeto
         (fun n => big predT (fun x => `|s x|) (pmap J (range 0 n)))
         (psum s)

lemmas.name: summable_cnvto
lemmas.statement:
s :
  forall (J : int -> 'a option) (p : 'a -> bool),
       enumerate J p
    => support s <= p
    => summable s
    => RealSeq.convergeto (fun n => big predT s (pmap J (range 0 n))) (sum s)

lemmas.name: summable_cnv
lemmas.statement:
s :
  forall (J : int -> 'a option) (p : 'a -> bool),
       enumerate J p
    => support s <= p
    => summable s
    => RealSeq.converge (fun n => big predT s (pmap J (range 0 n)))

lemmas.name: sumEw
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  forall (J : int -> 'a option) (p : 'a -> bool),
       enumerate J p
    => support s <= p
    => summable s
    => sum s = lim (fun n => big predT s (pmap J (range 0 n)))

lemmas.name: sumE
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  forall (J : int -> 'a option),
       enumerate J (support s)
    => summable s
    => sum s = lim (fun n => big predT s (pmap J (range 0 n)))

lemmas.name: sumEc
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) : summable s => sum s =
  lim (fun n => big predT s (pmap (cenum (support s)) (range 0 n)))

lemmas.name: sum_to_enum
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) : summable s =>
  exists (J : int -> 'a option), enumerate J (support s)

lemmas.name: sumE_fin
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a -> real) (J : 'a list) :
     uniq J
  => (forall x, s x <> 0%r => mem J x)
  => sum s = big predT s J

lemmas.name: fin_sum_cond
lemmas.statement:
(P : 't -> bool) f :
  is_finite P =>
  sum (fun z => if P z then f z else 0%r) = big predT f (to_seq P)

lemmas.name: fin_sum_const
lemmas.statement:
(P : 't -> bool) (v : real) :
  is_finite P =>
  sum (fun z => if P z then v else 0%r) = (size (to_seq P))%r * v

lemmas.name: fin_sum_type
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  is_finite predT<:'a> =>
  sum s = big predT s (to_seq predT<:'a>)

lemmas.name: sum_bool
lemmas.statement:
(f : bool -> real):
  sum f = f true + f false

lemmas.name: lerfin_sum
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) M:
     summable s
  => (forall J, uniq J => big predT s J <= M)
  => sum s <= M

lemmas.name: ler_psum_reindex
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] h s1 s2 :
     injective h
  => (forall x, `|s1 x| <= `|s2 (h x)|)%Real
  => summable s2 => psum<:'a> s1 <= psum<:'b> s2

lemmas.name: ler_psum
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real) :
     (forall x, `|s1 x| <= `|s2 x|)
  => summable s2 => psum s1 <= psum s2

lemmas.name: ler_sum
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real) :
     (forall x, s1 x <= s2 x)
  => summable s1 => summable s2
  => sum s1 <= sum s2

lemmas.name: ge0_sum
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  (forall x, 0%r <= s x) => 0%r <= sum s

lemmas.name: eq_summable_norm
lemmas.statement:
['a] (f g : 'a -> real) :
  (forall x, `|f x| = `|g x|) => summable f <=> summable g

lemmas.name: summable_le_pos
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real) :
     summable s2
  => (forall x, 0%r <= s1 x <= s2 x)
  => summable s1

lemmas.name: ler_sum_pos
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s1 s2 : 'a -> real) :
  (forall (x : 'a), 0%r <= s1 x <= s2 x) =>
  summable s2 => sum s1 <= sum s2

lemmas.name: summable_cond
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) (p : 'a -> bool) :
  summable s => summable (fun x => if p x then s x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: summable_cond_fin
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a -> real) (p : 'a -> bool) :
  is_finite p => summable (fun x => if p x then s x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: eq_sum
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real) :
  (forall x, s1 x = s2 x) => sum s1 = sum s2

lemmas.name: sum_norm
lemmas.statement:
s :
  (forall x, 0%r <= s x) => sum<:'a> (fun x => `|s x|) = sum s

lemmas.name: sum0_eq
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  (forall x, s x = 0%r) => sum s = 0%r

lemmas.name: sumD
lemmas.statement:
s1 s2 : summable s1 => summable s2 =>
  sum<:'a> (fun x => s1 x + s2 x) = sum s1 + sum s2

lemmas.name: sumZ
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) c : sum (fun x => c * s x) = c * sum s

lemmas.name: sumZr
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) c : sum (fun x => s x * c) = sum s * c

lemmas.name: sumN
lemmas.statement: (s : 'a -> real) : sum (fun x => - s x) = - sum s

lemmas.name: sumB
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real) :
  summable s1 => summable s2 => sum (fun x => s1 x - s2 x) = sum s1 - sum s2

lemmas.name: le0_sum
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  (forall x, s x <= 0%r) => sum s <= 0%r

lemmas.name: sum_split
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a -> real) p : summable s => sum s =
    sum (fun x => if  p x then s x else 0%r)
  + sum (fun x => if !p x then s x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: sumD1
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a -> real) x0 : summable s => sum s =
  s x0 + sum (fun x => if x <> x0 then s x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: sum_split_norm
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) : summable s =>
    sum (fun x => `|s x|) =
    sum (fun x => if 0%r <= s x then s x else 0%r) -
    sum (fun x => if ! 0%r <= s x then s x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: sum_split_dist
lemmas.statement:
(f g : 'a -> real) : summable f => summable g =>
  sum (fun x => `|f x - g x|) =
  sum (fun x => if g x <= f x then f x - g x else 0%r) -
  sum (fun x => if ! g x <= f x then f x - g x else 0%r)

lemmas.name: sum_big
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (F : 'a -> 'b -> real) (s : 'b list) :
     (forall y, y \in s => summable (fun x => F x y))
  =>   sum (fun x => big predT (F x) s)
     = big predT (fun y => sum (fun x => F x y)) s

lemmas.name: psum_big
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (F : 'a -> 'b -> real) (s : 'b list) :
     (forall y, y \in s => summable (fun x => F x y))
  =>   psum (fun x => big predT (fun y => `|F x y|) s)
     = big predT (fun y => psum (fun x => F x y)) s

lemmas.name: ler_psum_lub
lemmas.statement:
['a] (s : 'a -> real) z :
     (forall J, uniq J => big predT (fun x => `|s x|) J <= z)
  => psum s <= z

lemmas.name: psumB
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> _) : summable s1 => summable s2 =>
  psum s1 - psum s2 = sum (fun x => `|s1 x| - `|s2 x|)

lemmas.name: ler_big_psum
lemmas.statement:
['a] s J : summable<:'a> s => uniq J =>
  big predT (fun x => `|s x|) J <= psum s

lemmas.name: ler_big_sum
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) (J : 'a list) :
  (forall x, 0%r <= s x) => uniq J => summable s =>
  big predT s J <= sum s

lemmas.name: summable_psum_partition
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) s : summable<:'a> s =>
  forall J, uniq J =>
    big predT (fun b => psum (fun a => if b = f a then s a else 0%r)) J <= psum s

lemmas.name: psum_partition
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) s : summable s =>
  psum s = psum (fun y => psum (fun x => if y = f x then s x else 0%r))

lemmas.name: sum_partition
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) s : summable s =>
  sum s = sum (fun y => sum (fun x => if y = f x then s x else 0%r))

lemmas.name: norm_sum
lemmas.statement: ['a] (s : 'a -> real) : summable s => `|sum s| <= psum s

lemmas.name: summable_partition
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (f : 'a -> 'b) s : summable s =>
  summable (fun y => sum (fun x => if y = f x then s x else 0%r))

lemmas.name: summable_inj
lemmas.statement:
(h : 'a -> 'b) (s : 'b -> real) :
  injective h => summable s => summable (s \o h)

lemmas.name: summable_bij
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (h : 'a -> 'b) s :
  bijective h => summable s => summable (s \o h)

lemmas.name: summableM
lemmas.statement:
(s1 s2 : 'a -> real) :
  summable s1 => summable s2 => summable (fun x => s1 x * s2 x)

lemmas.name: summableM_bound
lemmas.statement:
(k : real) (s1 s2 : 'a -> real)  :
  0%r < k => summable s1 => (forall x, `|s2 x| <= k) =>
  summable (fun x => s1 x * s2 x)

lemmas.name: summable_oapp
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) x :
  summable s => summable (oapp s x)

lemmas.name: sum_reindex
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (h : 'a -> 'b) s :
  bijective h => summable s => sum (s \o h) = sum s

lemmas.name: summable_pair_sum
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a * 'b -> real) :
  summable s => summable (fun x => sum (fun y => s (x, y)))

lemmas.name: sum_pair
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s : 'a * 'b -> real) :
  summable s => sum s = sum (fun a => sum (fun b => s (a, b)))

lemmas.name: summable_pswap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s : 'a * 'b -> real) :
  summable s => summable (s \o pswap)

lemmas.name: summable_swap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (fa : 'a -> real) (fb : 'b -> real) (F : 'a -> 'b -> real) :
     (forall x, 0%r <= fa x)
  => (forall y, 0%r <= fb y)
  => (forall x y, 0%r <= F x y)
  => summable (fun y => sum (fun x => fa x * F x y) * fb y)
  => (forall y, fb y <> 0%r => summable (fun x => fa x * F x y))
  => summable (fun x => fa x * sum (fun y => F x y * fb y))
  /\ (forall x, fa x <> 0%r => summable (fun y => F x y * fb y))

lemmas.name: summable_swapR
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (fa : 'a -> real) (fb : 'b -> real) (F : 'a -> 'b -> real) :
     (forall x, 0%r <= fa x)
  => (forall y, 0%r <= fb y)
  => (forall x y, 0%r <= F x y)
  => summable (fun x => fa x * sum (fun y => F x y * fb y))
  => (forall x, fa x <> 0%r => summable (fun y => F x y * fb y))
  => summable (fun y => sum (fun x => fa x * F x y) * fb y)
  /\ (forall y, fb y <> 0%r => summable (fun x => fa x * F x y))

lemmas.name: pswap_summable
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a * 'b -> real) :
  summable (s \o pswap) => summable s

lemmas.name: sum_swap
lemmas.statement:
['a 'b] (s : 'a * 'b -> real) : summable s =>
  sum (fun a => sum (fun b => s (a, b))) = sum (fun b => sum (fun a => s (a, b)))

lemmas.name: sum_swap'
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> 'b -> real) :
  summable (fun p : 'a * 'b => s p.`1 p.`2) =>
  sum (fun (a : 'a) => sum (fun (b : 'b) => s a b)) =
  sum (fun (b : 'b) => sum (fun (a : 'a) => s a b))

lemmas.name: sump_eq0P
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
     (forall x, 0%r <= s x)
  => summable s
  => (sum s = 0%r <=> forall x, s x = 0%r)

lemmas.name: ler_sum_norm
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  summable s => sum s <= sum (fun x => `|s x|)

lemmas.name: ler_norm_sum
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) :
  summable s => `| sum s | <= sum (fun x => `| s x |)

lemmas.name: sum_oapp
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a -> real) x :
  summable s => sum (oapp s x) = x + sum s

lemmas.name: sumD1_None
lemmas.statement:
(s : 'a option -> real) :
  summable s => sum s = s None + sum (s \o Some)

lemmas.name: prodrDl
lemmas.statement:
['t 'u] (F : 't -> 'u -> real) (r : 't list) (s : 'u list) :
  uniq r => uniq s =>

    BRM.big predT (fun x => big predT (F x) s) r
  = sum (fun sigma => if fixfinfun (mem r) (mem s) sigma then
      BRM.big predT (fun x => F x (sigma x)) r
    else 0%r)

lemmas.name: prodrDl2
lemmas.statement:
(f g : 't -> real) r : is_finite_for predT r =>
    BRM.big predT (fun x => f x + g x) r
  = sum (fun sigma => BRM.big predT (fun x => if sigma x then f x else g x) r)
